[CareCloud_1.html](https://github.com/user-attachments/files/28658327/CareCloud_1.html)
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8" />
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0"/>
<title>CareCloud</title>
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Nunito:wght@400;500;600;700;800&family=Quicksand:wght@400;500;600;700&display=swap" rel="stylesheet"/>
<style>
  *{margin:0;padding:0;box-sizing:border-box}
  :root{
    --pink:#F9C8D8;--pink2:#F4A0BC;--pink3:#D4537E;
    --blue:#C5DFF8;--blue2:#8BBEE8;--blue3:#378ADD;
    --purple:#E8E2FB;--purple2:#C4B8F0;--purple3:#7F77DD;
    --green:#D4EDDA;--green2:#A8D5B5;--green3:#3B8B5C;
    --amber:#FDE8BB;--amber2:#FAC775;--amber3:#BA7517;
    --bg:#FFF5F9;--surface:#FFFFFF;--surface2:#FEF0F5;
    --text:#3A2A35;--text2:#7A5A6A;--text3:#B090A0;
    --border:#F0D8E8;--radius:18px;--radius-sm:12px;
  }
  body{font-family:'Nunito',sans-serif;background:var(--bg);color:var(--text);min-height:100vh;overflow-x:hidden}

  .nav{display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;padding:14px 20px;background:var(--surface);border-bottom:1.5px solid var(--border);position:sticky;top:0;z-index:100}
  .logo{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;font-family:'Quicksand',sans-serif;font-weight:700;font-size:20px;color:var(--pink3)}
  .logo svg{width:36px;height:36px}
  .tabs{display:flex;gap:4px;background:var(--surface2);padding:4px;border-radius:50px;border:1px solid var(--border)}
  .tab{padding:7px 14px;border-radius:50px;border:none;background:transparent;font-family:'Nunito',sans-serif;font-size:13px;font-weight:600;color:var(--text2);cursor:pointer;transition:all .2s;white-space:nowrap}
  .tab.active{background:var(--pink3);color:#fff}
  .tab:hover:not(.active){background:var(--pink);color:var(--pink3)}
  .profile-btn{width:36px;height:36px;border-radius:50%;background:linear-gradient(135deg,var(--purple2),var(--pink2));border:none;cursor:pointer;font-size:16px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center}

  .screen{display:none;padding:20px;max-width:900px;margin:0 auto;animation:fadeUp .3s ease}
  .screen.active{display:block}
  @keyframes fadeUp{from{opacity:0;transform:translateY(12px)}to{opacity:1;transform:translateY(0)}}

  .home-hero{background:var(--surface);border-radius:var(--radius);padding:24px;border:1.5px solid var(--border);margin-bottom:16px;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:20px;position:relative;overflow:hidden}
  .home-hero::before{content:'';position:absolute;top:-30px;right:-30px;width:150px;height:150px;background:radial-gradient(circle,var(--pink) 0%,transparent 70%);opacity:.5}
  .greeting h1{font-family:'Quicksand',sans-serif;font-size:22px;font-weight:700;color:var(--text);margin-bottom:4px}
  .greeting p{font-size:14px;color:var(--text2);line-height:1.5}
  .ai-bubble{background:linear-gradient(135deg,var(--pink),var(--purple));border-radius:var(--radius-sm);padding:14px 16px;margin-top:12px;font-size:13px;color:var(--text);line-height:1.6;border:1px solid var(--pink2)}
  .ai-bubble span{font-weight:700;color:var(--pink3)}

  .stat-row{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr);gap:12px;margin-bottom:16px}
  .stat-card{background:var(--surface);border-radius:var(--radius-sm);padding:16px;border:1.5px solid var(--border);text-align:center}
  .stat-card .num{font-family:'Quicksand',sans-serif;font-size:26px;font-weight:700;color:var(--pink3)}
  .stat-card .lbl{font-size:12px;color:var(--text3);margin-top:2px}

  .section-title{font-size:14px;font-weight:700;color:var(--text2);margin-bottom:10px;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.5px}
  .today-tasks{background:var(--surface);border-radius:var(--radius-sm);border:1.5px solid var(--border);overflow:hidden}
  .task-row{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:12px;padding:12px 16px;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);cursor:pointer;transition:background .15s}
  .task-row:last-child{border-bottom:none}
  .task-row:hover{background:var(--surface2)}
  .task-check{width:20px;height:20px;border-radius:50%;border:2px solid var(--border);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;flex-shrink:0;transition:all .2s}
  .task-check.done{background:var(--green3);border-color:var(--green3);color:#fff;font-size:11px}
  .task-check:not(.done){border-color:var(--pink2)}
  .task-label{flex:1;font-size:14px}
  .task-label.done{text-decoration:line-through;color:var(--text3)}
  .task-tag{font-size:11px;padding:3px 8px;border-radius:50px;font-weight:600}
  .tag-pink{background:var(--pink);color:var(--pink3)}
  .tag-blue{background:var(--blue);color:var(--blue3)}
  .tag-purple{background:var(--purple);color:var(--purple3)}
  .tag-amber{background:var(--amber);color:var(--amber3)}

  .add-task-bar{display:flex;gap:8px;margin-bottom:16px}
  .add-task-bar input{flex:1;padding:10px 16px;border-radius:50px;border:1.5px solid var(--border);font-family:'Nunito',sans-serif;font-size:14px;background:var(--surface);color:var(--text);outline:none}
  .add-task-bar input:focus{border-color:var(--pink2)}
  .add-task-bar select{padding:10px 12px;border-radius:50px;border:1.5px solid var(--border);font-family:'Nunito',sans-serif;font-size:13px;background:var(--surface);color:var(--text);outline:none}
  .btn-pink{padding:10px 18px;border-radius:50px;border:none;background:var(--pink3);color:#fff;font-family:'Nunito',sans-serif;font-size:14px;font-weight:700;cursor:pointer;transition:transform .15s,opacity .15s}
  .btn-pink:hover{opacity:.9;transform:translateY(-1px)}
  .task-group{margin-bottom:20px}
  .task-group-title{font-size:13px;font-weight:700;color:var(--text2);margin-bottom:8px;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:6px}
  .tasks-list{background:var(--surface);border-radius:var(--radius-sm);border:1.5px solid var(--border);overflow:hidden}

  .timer-card{background:var(--surface);border-radius:var(--radius);padding:32px;border:1.5px solid var(--border);text-align:center;margin-bottom:16px}
  .timer-display{font-family:'Quicksand',sans-serif;font-size:64px;font-weight:700;color:var(--pink3);letter-spacing:-2px;margin:20px 0}
  .timer-label{font-size:14px;color:var(--text2)}
  .timer-btns{display:flex;gap:10px;justify-content:center;margin-top:20px}
  .btn-outline{padding:10px 22px;border-radius:50px;border:2px solid var(--pink3);background:transparent;color:var(--pink3);font-family:'Nunito',sans-serif;font-size:14px;font-weight:700;cursor:pointer;transition:all .15s}
  .btn-outline:hover{background:var(--pink);transform:translateY(-1px)}
  .methods-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(2,1fr);gap:12px}
  .method-card{background:var(--surface);border-radius:var(--radius-sm);padding:16px;border:1.5px solid var(--border);cursor:pointer;transition:all .2s}
  .method-card:hover{border-color:var(--pink2);transform:translateY(-2px)}
  .method-card.selected{border-color:var(--pink3);background:var(--pink)}
  .method-detail-hero{background:var(--surface);border-radius:var(--radius);border:1.5px solid var(--border);padding:22px 20px;margin-bottom:14px;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:18px}
  .method-detail-icon{font-size:48px;flex-shrink:0}
  .method-detail-name{font-family:'Quicksand',sans-serif;font-size:24px;font-weight:700;color:var(--text)}
  .method-detail-tagline{font-size:13px;color:var(--text2);margin-top:4px}
  .method-detail-card{background:var(--surface);border-radius:var(--radius-sm);border:1.5px solid var(--border);padding:16px;margin-bottom:12px}
  .method-section-title{font-size:13px;font-weight:700;color:var(--text);margin-bottom:10px}
  .method-section-body{font-size:14px;color:var(--text2);line-height:1.7}
  .method-steps{padding-left:20px;display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:8px}
  .method-steps li{font-size:14px;color:var(--text2);line-height:1.6;padding-left:4px}
  .method-steps li strong{color:var(--text)}
  .method-tags{display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:8px}
  .method-tag{background:var(--surface2);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:50px;padding:5px 14px;font-size:12px;font-weight:600;color:var(--text2)}
  .time-chip{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:6px;padding:7px 12px;border-radius:var(--radius-sm);font-size:12px;font-weight:600;border:1px solid var(--border);background:var(--surface2)}
  .time-chip .tc-dot{width:8px;height:8px;border-radius:50%;flex-shrink:0}
  .time-chip .tc-label{color:var(--text2)}
  .time-chip .tc-dur{color:var(--text);font-weight:700;margin-left:2px}
  .custom-row{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;margin-bottom:14px}
  .custom-row label{font-size:12px;font-weight:700;color:var(--text2);text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.5px;width:120px;flex-shrink:0}
  .custom-num{width:64px;padding:8px 10px;border-radius:var(--radius-sm);border:1.5px solid var(--border);background:var(--surface2);font-family:'Quicksand',sans-serif;font-size:18px;font-weight:700;color:var(--pink3);text-align:center;outline:none}
  .custom-num:focus{border-color:var(--pink2)}
  .custom-unit{font-size:13px;color:var(--text3)}
  .custom-sessions-row{display:flex;gap:8px;flex-wrap:wrap}
  .session-pill{padding:7px 16px;border-radius:50px;border:1.5px solid var(--border);background:var(--surface);font-family:'Nunito',sans-serif;font-size:13px;font-weight:600;color:var(--text2);cursor:pointer;transition:all .15s}
  .session-pill.active{background:var(--pink3);color:#fff;border-color:var(--pink3)}
  .method-icon{font-size:24px;margin-bottom:6px}
  .method-name{font-size:13px;font-weight:700;color:var(--text)}
  .method-desc{font-size:12px;color:var(--text3);margin-top:3px}

  .mood-row{display:flex;gap:12px;margin-bottom:16px;flex-wrap:wrap}
  .mood-btn{padding:10px 18px;border-radius:50px;border:1.5px solid var(--border);background:var(--surface);font-size:20px;cursor:pointer;transition:all .2s;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:6px;font-family:'Nunito',sans-serif;font-size:13px;color:var(--text2)}
  .mood-btn:hover{transform:translateY(-2px);border-color:var(--pink2)}
  .mood-btn.active{background:var(--pink);border-color:var(--pink2);color:var(--pink3);font-weight:700}
  .journal-card{background:var(--surface);border-radius:var(--radius-sm);border:1.5px solid var(--border);padding:16px;margin-bottom:12px}
  .journal-prompt{font-size:13px;font-weight:700;color:var(--pink3);margin-bottom:8px}
  .journal-card textarea{width:100%;border:none;outline:none;font-family:'Nunito',sans-serif;font-size:14px;color:var(--text);resize:none;background:transparent;min-height:70px}
  .ai-insight{background:linear-gradient(135deg,var(--purple),var(--blue));border-radius:var(--radius-sm);padding:16px;border:1px solid var(--purple2);margin-bottom:16px}
  .ai-insight .ai-title{font-size:12px;font-weight:700;color:var(--purple3);text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.5px;margin-bottom:6px}
  .ai-insight p{font-size:13px;color:var(--text);line-height:1.6}

  .island-canvas{background:linear-gradient(180deg,#B8E4F9 0%,#D4F1FF 40%,#A8D5A2 60%,#7CBE75 80%,#5A9E52 100%);border-radius:var(--radius);border:1.5px solid var(--border);overflow:hidden;margin-bottom:16px;position:relative;height:280px}
  .reward-row{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr);gap:10px;margin-bottom:16px}
  .reward-card{background:var(--surface);border-radius:var(--radius-sm);padding:14px;border:1.5px solid var(--border);text-align:center;cursor:pointer;transition:all .2s}
  .reward-card:hover{border-color:var(--amber2);transform:translateY(-2px)}
  .reward-card.unlocked{border-color:var(--amber3)}
  .inv-tabs{display:flex;gap:8px;margin-bottom:14px}
  .inv-tab{padding:7px 18px;border-radius:50px;border:1.5px solid var(--border);background:var(--surface);font-family:'Nunito',sans-serif;font-size:13px;font-weight:600;color:var(--text2);cursor:pointer;transition:all .2s}
  .inv-tab.active{background:var(--amber);border-color:var(--amber2);color:var(--amber3)}
  .inv-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr);gap:10px;margin-bottom:16px}
  .inv-card{background:var(--surface);border-radius:var(--radius-sm);padding:14px;border:1.5px solid var(--amber2);text-align:center;position:relative}
  .inv-card .inv-icon{font-size:30px;margin-bottom:6px}
  .inv-card .inv-name{font-size:12px;font-weight:700;color:var(--text)}
  .inv-card .inv-badge{position:absolute;top:8px;right:8px;background:var(--amber);color:var(--amber3);font-size:10px;font-weight:700;padding:2px 7px;border-radius:50px}
  .inv-empty{text-align:center;padding:32px 16px;color:var(--text3);font-size:14px}
  .inv-empty span{font-size:36px;display:block;margin-bottom:8px}
  .inv-card{cursor:pointer;transition:all .2s}
  .inv-card:hover{transform:translateY(-2px)}
  .inv-card.equipped{border-color:var(--pink3);background:var(--pink)}
  .inv-card.equipped .inv-badge{background:var(--pink);color:var(--pink3)}
  .inv-equip-btn{margin-top:8px;padding:4px 12px;border-radius:50px;border:1.5px solid var(--border);background:transparent;font-family:'Nunito',sans-serif;font-size:11px;font-weight:700;color:var(--text2);cursor:pointer;transition:all .15s;width:100%}
  .inv-card.equipped .inv-equip-btn{border-color:var(--pink2);background:var(--pink3);color:#fff}
  .equipped-bar{background:var(--surface);border-radius:var(--radius-sm);border:1.5px solid var(--pink2);padding:10px 14px;margin-bottom:12px;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;flex-wrap:wrap;min-height:48px}
  .equipped-bar-label{font-size:12px;font-weight:700;color:var(--pink3);white-space:nowrap}
  .equipped-chip{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:5px;background:var(--pink);border:1px solid var(--pink2);border-radius:50px;padding:4px 10px;font-size:12px;font-weight:600;color:var(--text);animation:popIn .2s ease}
  @keyframes popIn{from{transform:scale(.7);opacity:0}to{transform:scale(1);opacity:1}}
  .equipped-none{font-size:12px;color:var(--text3);font-style:italic}
  .profile-tabs{display:flex;gap:6px;margin-bottom:16px}
  .profile-tab{padding:8px 20px;border-radius:50px;border:1.5px solid var(--border);background:var(--surface);font-family:'Nunito',sans-serif;font-size:13px;font-weight:600;color:var(--text2);cursor:pointer;transition:all .2s}
  .profile-tab.active{background:var(--pink3);color:#fff;border-color:var(--pink3)}
  .profile-tab:hover:not(.active){background:var(--pink);color:var(--pink3);border-color:var(--pink2)}
  .history-section{margin-bottom:20px}
  .history-item{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:12px;padding:12px 16px;background:var(--surface);border-radius:var(--radius-sm);border:1.5px solid var(--border);margin-bottom:8px;transition:background .15s}
  .history-item:hover{background:var(--surface2)}
  .history-item.clickable{cursor:pointer}
  .history-item.clickable .history-title{color:var(--pink3);text-decoration:underline dotted;text-underline-offset:3px}
  .reflect-modal-overlay{position:fixed;inset:0;background:rgba(58,42,53,.45);backdrop-filter:blur(4px);z-index:300;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;opacity:0;pointer-events:none;transition:opacity .2s}
  .reflect-modal-overlay.open{opacity:1;pointer-events:all}
  .reflect-modal{background:var(--surface);border-radius:var(--radius);padding:24px;width:420px;max-width:92vw;border:1.5px solid var(--border);animation:fadeUp .25s ease;position:relative;max-height:85vh;overflow-y:auto}
  .reflect-modal-header{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;margin-bottom:16px}
  .reflect-modal-mood{font-size:22px}
  .reflect-modal-meta{flex:1}
  .reflect-modal-title{font-size:15px;font-weight:700;color:var(--text)}
  .reflect-modal-date{font-size:12px;color:var(--text3);margin-top:2px}
  .reflect-modal-close{position:absolute;top:14px;right:14px;background:var(--surface2);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:50%;width:28px;height:28px;font-size:14px;cursor:pointer;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;color:var(--text2)}
  .reflect-modal-close:hover{background:var(--pink);color:var(--pink3)}
  .reflect-section{margin-bottom:14px}
  .reflect-section-label{font-size:11px;font-weight:700;color:var(--pink3);text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.5px;margin-bottom:6px}
  .reflect-section-text{font-size:14px;color:var(--text2);line-height:1.6;background:var(--surface2);border-radius:var(--radius-sm);padding:10px 14px;border:1px solid var(--border);white-space:pre-wrap}
  .reflect-section-empty{font-size:13px;color:var(--text3);font-style:italic}
  .profile-edit-btn{padding:6px 14px;border-radius:50px;border:1.5px solid var(--pink2);background:transparent;font-family:'Nunito',sans-serif;font-size:12px;font-weight:700;color:var(--pink3);cursor:pointer;margin-top:8px;transition:all .15s;display:inline-block}
  .profile-edit-btn:hover{background:var(--pink);transform:translateY(-1px)}
  .goal-chip{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:5px;background:var(--purple);border:1px solid var(--purple2);border-radius:50px;padding:4px 10px;font-size:12px;font-weight:600;color:var(--purple3);margin:3px}
  .goal-chip .remove-goal{cursor:pointer;opacity:.6;font-size:11px}
  .goal-chip .remove-goal:hover{opacity:1}
  .goals-display{display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:2px;margin-top:6px}
  .edit-modal-overlay{position:fixed;inset:0;background:rgba(58,42,53,.45);backdrop-filter:blur(4px);z-index:300;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;opacity:0;pointer-events:none;transition:opacity .2s}
  .edit-modal-overlay.open{opacity:1;pointer-events:all}
  .edit-modal{background:var(--surface);border-radius:var(--radius);padding:24px;width:400px;max-width:92vw;border:1.5px solid var(--border);animation:fadeUp .25s ease;position:relative}
  .edit-modal-title{font-size:16px;font-weight:700;color:var(--text);margin-bottom:4px}
  .edit-modal-sub{font-size:12px;color:var(--text3);margin-bottom:18px}
  .edit-modal-close{position:absolute;top:14px;right:14px;background:var(--surface2);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:50%;width:28px;height:28px;font-size:14px;cursor:pointer;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;color:var(--text2)}
  .edit-modal-close:hover{background:var(--pink);color:var(--pink3)}
  .edit-form-label{font-size:11px;font-weight:700;color:var(--text2);text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.5px;margin-bottom:5px;display:block}
  .edit-form-input{width:100%;padding:9px 14px;border-radius:var(--radius-sm);border:1.5px solid var(--border);font-family:'Nunito',sans-serif;font-size:14px;color:var(--text);background:var(--surface2);outline:none;margin-bottom:14px;transition:border-color .15s}
  .edit-form-input:focus{border-color:var(--pink2)}
  .goal-input-row{display:flex;gap:8px;margin-bottom:8px}
  .goal-input-row input{flex:1;padding:8px 12px;border-radius:var(--radius-sm);border:1.5px solid var(--border);font-family:'Nunito',sans-serif;font-size:13px;color:var(--text);background:var(--surface2);outline:none}
  .goal-input-row input:focus{border-color:var(--pink2)}
  .goal-input-row button{padding:8px 14px;border-radius:var(--radius-sm);border:none;background:var(--pink3);color:#fff;font-family:'Nunito',sans-serif;font-size:13px;font-weight:700;cursor:pointer}
  .goals-edit-list{display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:4px;min-height:32px;margin-bottom:14px}
  .pin-row{display:flex;gap:12px;justify-content:center;margin:16px 0}
  .pin-box{width:52px;height:60px;border-radius:var(--radius-sm);border:2px solid var(--border);background:var(--surface2);font-size:24px;font-weight:700;text-align:center;font-family:'Quicksand',sans-serif;color:var(--pink3);outline:none;caret-color:transparent;transition:border-color .15s}
  .pin-box:focus{border-color:var(--pink3)}
  .pin-hint{font-size:12px;color:var(--text3);text-align:center;margin-bottom:12px}
  .pin-error{font-size:12px;color:#E24B4A;text-align:center;margin-bottom:8px;min-height:18px}
  @keyframes shake{0%,100%{transform:translateX(0)}20%{transform:translateX(-8px)}40%{transform:translateX(8px)}60%{transform:translateX(-6px)}80%{transform:translateX(6px)}}
  .history-icon{width:36px;height:36px;border-radius:50%;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:16px;flex-shrink:0}
  .history-icon.task{background:var(--green);color:#fff}
  .history-icon.focus{background:var(--blue);color:#fff}
  .history-icon.reflect{background:var(--pink);color:#fff}
  .history-icon.streak{background:var(--amber);color:#fff}
  .history-info{flex:1}
  .history-title{font-size:13px;font-weight:600;color:var(--text)}
  .history-sub{font-size:12px;color:var(--text3);margin-top:2px}
  .history-date{font-size:11px;color:var(--text3);flex-shrink:0}
  .history-stats-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(2,1fr);gap:10px;margin-bottom:16px}
  .history-stat{background:var(--surface);border-radius:var(--radius-sm);border:1.5px solid var(--border);padding:14px;text-align:center}
  .history-stat .h-num{font-size:22px;font-weight:700;color:var(--pink3);font-family:'Quicksand',sans-serif}
  .history-stat .h-lbl{font-size:11px;color:var(--text3);margin-top:3px}
  .week-bar-row{display:flex;gap:6px;align-items:flex-end;height:60px;margin-bottom:6px}
  .week-bar-wrap{flex:1;display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;gap:3px}
  .week-bar{width:100%;border-radius:4px 4px 0 0;background:var(--pink2);min-height:4px;transition:height .4s ease}
  .week-bar-lbl{font-size:10px;color:var(--text3);font-weight:600}
  .hist-cal-day{aspect-ratio:1;border-radius:6px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:12px;font-weight:600;cursor:pointer;transition:all .15s;position:relative;border:2px solid transparent}
  .hist-cal-day.other-month{color:var(--text3);opacity:.4;cursor:default}
  .hist-cal-day.active-day{background:var(--pink3);color:#fff}
  .hist-cal-day.active-day:hover{opacity:.85}
  .hist-cal-day.today-day{background:var(--pink);border-color:var(--pink3);color:var(--pink3);font-weight:700}
  .hist-cal-day.no-activity{background:var(--surface2);color:var(--text3)}
  .hist-cal-day.no-activity:hover{border-color:var(--border)}
  .hist-cal-day.has-streak::after{content:'🔥';position:absolute;top:-4px;right:-4px;font-size:8px}
  .hist-cal-day.selected-day{box-shadow:0 0 0 2.5px var(--pink3),0 0 0 4px var(--pink)}
  .hist-detail-item{display:flex;align-items:flex-start;gap:10px;padding:10px 0;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border)}
  .hist-detail-item:last-child{border-bottom:none}
  .hist-detail-icon{width:32px;height:32px;border-radius:50%;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:14px;flex-shrink:0}
  .hist-detail-icon.task{background:var(--green3);color:#fff}
  .hist-detail-icon.focus{background:var(--blue3);color:#fff}
  .hist-detail-icon.reflect{background:var(--pink3);color:#fff}
  .hist-detail-icon.streak{background:var(--amber3);color:#fff}
  .cat-section{margin-bottom:20px}
  .cat-title{font-size:13px;font-weight:700;color:var(--text2);margin-bottom:10px;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:6px;padding:8px 12px;background:var(--surface2);border-radius:var(--radius-sm);border:1px solid var(--border)}
  .cat-title .cat-slot{margin-left:auto;font-size:11px;color:var(--text3);font-weight:400}
  .shop-cat-filter{display:flex;gap:6px;flex-wrap:wrap;margin-bottom:14px}
  .cat-filter-btn{padding:6px 14px;border-radius:50px;border:1.5px solid var(--border);background:var(--surface);font-family:'Nunito',sans-serif;font-size:12px;font-weight:600;color:var(--text2);cursor:pointer;transition:all .15s}
  .cat-filter-btn.active{background:var(--amber);border-color:var(--amber2);color:var(--amber3)}
  .reward-icon{font-size:28px;margin-bottom:6px}
  .reward-name{font-size:12px;font-weight:700;color:var(--text)}
  .reward-cost{font-size:11px;color:var(--text3);margin-top:3px}
  .currency-bar{background:var(--surface);border-radius:var(--radius-sm);border:1.5px solid var(--border);padding:12px 16px;display:flex;gap:20px;margin-bottom:16px}
  .currency-item{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:6px;font-size:13px;font-weight:600;color:var(--text)}

  .profile-header{background:var(--surface);border-radius:var(--radius);padding:24px;border:1.5px solid var(--border);margin-bottom:16px;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:16px}
  .profile-avatar{width:70px;height:70px;border-radius:50%;background:linear-gradient(135deg,var(--pink2),var(--purple2));display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:32px;flex-shrink:0}
  .profile-info h2{font-family:'Quicksand',sans-serif;font-size:20px;font-weight:700;margin-bottom:4px}
  .profile-info p{font-size:13px;color:var(--text2)}
  .badge-row{display:flex;gap:8px;flex-wrap:wrap;margin-top:8px}
  .badge{background:var(--amber);color:var(--amber3);font-size:11px;font-weight:700;padding:4px 10px;border-radius:50px}
  .settings-group{background:var(--surface);border-radius:var(--radius-sm);border:1.5px solid var(--border);overflow:hidden;margin-bottom:12px}
  .setting-row{display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;padding:14px 16px;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border)}
  .setting-row:last-child{border-bottom:none}
  .setting-label{font-size:14px;font-weight:600;color:var(--text)}
  .setting-sub{font-size:12px;color:var(--text3);margin-top:2px}
  .toggle{width:44px;height:24px;border-radius:50px;background:var(--green2);border:none;cursor:pointer;position:relative;transition:background .2s;flex-shrink:0}
  .toggle::after{content:'';position:absolute;top:3px;right:3px;width:18px;height:18px;border-radius:50%;background:#fff;transition:right .2s}
  .toggle.off{background:var(--border)}
  .toggle.off::after{right:23px}
  .color-swatches{display:flex;gap:8px;flex-wrap:wrap}
  .emoji-opt{width:38px;height:38px;border-radius:10px;border:2px solid var(--border);background:var(--surface2);font-size:18px;cursor:pointer;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;transition:all .15s}
  .emoji-opt:hover{transform:scale(1.15);border-color:var(--pink2)}
  .emoji-opt.active{border-color:var(--pink3);background:var(--pink);transform:scale(1.1)}
  .theme-card{border-radius:var(--radius-sm);border:2px solid var(--border);overflow:hidden;cursor:pointer;transition:all .2s}
  .theme-card:hover{transform:translateY(-2px);border-color:var(--pink2)}
  .theme-card.active{border-color:var(--pink3);box-shadow:0 0 0 2px var(--pink3)}
  .theme-preview{background:var(--surface2)}
  .theme-name{font-size:11px;font-weight:700;color:var(--text2);padding:5px 6px;text-align:center;background:var(--surface)}
  .swatch{width:28px;height:28px;border-radius:50%;border:2.5px solid transparent;cursor:pointer;transition:transform .15s}
  .swatch.active,.swatch:hover{transform:scale(1.2);border-color:#fff;box-shadow:0 0 0 2px var(--pink3)}

  .streak-week{display:flex;gap:6px;justify-content:center;margin-top:12px}
  .day-dot{width:32px;height:32px;border-radius:50%;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:11px;font-weight:700;border:2px solid var(--border)}
  .day-dot.done{background:var(--pink3);color:#fff;border-color:var(--pink3)}
  .day-dot.done{cursor:pointer}
  .day-dot.today{cursor:pointer}
  .day-dot:hover{transform:scale(1.12);transition:transform .15s}
  .day-drawer-overlay{position:fixed;inset:0;background:rgba(58,42,53,.35);backdrop-filter:blur(3px);z-index:200;opacity:0;pointer-events:none;transition:opacity .25s}
  .day-drawer-overlay.open{opacity:1;pointer-events:all}
  .day-drawer{position:fixed;bottom:0;left:0;right:0;background:var(--surface);border-radius:var(--radius) var(--radius) 0 0;padding:0 0 32px;z-index:201;transform:translateY(100%);transition:transform .3s cubic-bezier(.32,0,.15,1);max-height:80vh;overflow-y:auto;box-shadow:0 -8px 32px rgba(58,42,53,.15)}
  .day-drawer.open{transform:translateY(0)}
  .day-drawer-handle{width:36px;height:4px;background:var(--border);border-radius:2px;margin:12px auto 16px}
  .day-drawer-header{padding:0 20px 14px;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between}
  .day-drawer-title{font-family:'Quicksand',sans-serif;font-size:18px;font-weight:700;color:var(--text)}
  .day-drawer-sub{font-size:12px;color:var(--text3);margin-top:2px}
  .day-drawer-close{width:28px;height:28px;border-radius:50%;background:var(--surface2);border:1px solid var(--border);cursor:pointer;font-size:14px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;color:var(--text2)}
  .day-drawer-close:hover{background:var(--pink);color:var(--pink3)}
  .day-drawer-body{padding:16px 20px}
  .day-drawer-empty{text-align:center;padding:32px 16px;color:var(--text3);font-size:14px}
  .day-drawer-empty span{font-size:32px;display:block;margin-bottom:8px}
  .day-activity-section{margin-bottom:18px}
  .day-activity-title{font-size:12px;font-weight:700;color:var(--text3);text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.5px;margin-bottom:8px;padding-bottom:6px;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border)}
  .day-activity-body{font-size:13px;color:var(--text2)}
  .day-refl-row{margin-bottom:10px}
  .day-refl-q{font-size:11px;font-weight:700;color:var(--pink3);margin-bottom:3px;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.3px}
  .day-refl-a{font-size:13px;color:var(--text2);line-height:1.6;background:var(--surface2);border-radius:var(--radius-sm);padding:8px 12px;border:1px solid var(--border)}
  .drawer-task-row{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:12px;padding:10px 0;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border)}
  .drawer-task-row:last-child{border-bottom:none}
  .drawer-check{width:20px;height:20px;border-radius:50%;background:var(--green3);border:2px solid var(--green3);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:11px;color:#fff;flex-shrink:0}
  .drawer-task-label{flex:1;font-size:14px;color:var(--text2);text-decoration:line-through}
  .drawer-task-time{font-size:11px;color:var(--text3)}
  /* Ambient sounds */
  @keyframes eq1{0%,100%{height:6px}50%{height:14px}}
  @keyframes eq2{0%,100%{height:14px}50%{height:4px}}
  @keyframes eq3{0%,100%{height:9px}50%{height:16px}}
  .ambient-drawer-overlay{position:fixed;inset:0;background:rgba(58,42,53,.35);backdrop-filter:blur(3px);z-index:200;opacity:0;pointer-events:none;transition:opacity .25s}
  .ambient-drawer-overlay.open{opacity:1;pointer-events:all}
  .ambient-drawer{position:fixed;bottom:0;left:0;right:0;background:var(--surface);border-radius:var(--radius) var(--radius) 0 0;padding:0 0 40px;z-index:201;transform:translateY(100%);transition:transform .3s cubic-bezier(.32,0,.15,1);max-height:85vh;overflow-y:auto;box-shadow:0 -8px 32px rgba(58,42,53,.15)}
  .ambient-drawer.open{transform:translateY(0)}
  .ambient-drawer-handle{width:36px;height:4px;background:var(--border);border-radius:2px;margin:12px auto 16px}
  .ambient-drawer-header{padding:0 20px 14px;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between}
  .ambient-drawer-title{font-family:'Quicksand',sans-serif;font-size:18px;font-weight:700;color:var(--text)}
  .ambient-close{width:28px;height:28px;border-radius:50%;background:var(--surface2);border:1px solid var(--border);cursor:pointer;font-size:14px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;color:var(--text2)}
  .ambient-close:hover{background:var(--pink);color:var(--pink3)}
  .ambient-body{padding:20px}
  .sound-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr);gap:10px;margin-bottom:20px}
  .sound-card{background:var(--surface2);border:1.5px solid var(--border);border-radius:var(--radius-sm);padding:16px 10px;text-align:center;cursor:pointer;transition:all .2s}
  .sound-card:hover{border-color:var(--pink2);transform:translateY(-2px)}
  .sound-card.active{border-color:var(--pink3);background:var(--pink)}
  .sound-card .s-icon{font-size:28px;margin-bottom:6px}
  .sound-card .s-name{font-size:12px;font-weight:700;color:var(--text)}
  .sound-card .s-desc{font-size:10px;color:var(--text3);margin-top:2px}
  .vol-row{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:12px;margin-bottom:16px}
  .vol-label{font-size:13px;font-weight:600;color:var(--text2);width:60px;flex-shrink:0}
  .vol-slider{flex:1;-webkit-appearance:none;height:6px;border-radius:3px;outline:none;cursor:pointer}
  .vol-slider::-webkit-slider-thumb{-webkit-appearance:none;width:20px;height:20px;border-radius:50%;background:var(--pink3);border:2px solid #fff;box-shadow:0 2px 6px rgba(0,0,0,.15);cursor:pointer}
  .vol-val{font-size:12px;color:var(--text3);width:32px;text-align:right;font-family:'Quicksand',sans-serif;font-weight:700}
  .stop-btn{width:100%;padding:12px;border-radius:var(--radius-sm);border:1.5px solid #E24B4A;background:transparent;font-family:'Nunito',sans-serif;font-size:14px;font-weight:700;color:#E24B4A;cursor:pointer;transition:all .15s;margin-top:4px}
  .stop-btn:hover{background:#E24B4A;color:#fff}
  /* Notes */
  .notes-filter{padding:6px 14px;border-radius:50px;border:1.5px solid var(--border);background:var(--surface);font-family:'Nunito',sans-serif;font-size:12px;font-weight:600;color:var(--text2);cursor:pointer;transition:all .15s}
  .notes-filter:hover{border-color:var(--pink2);color:var(--pink3)}
  .notes-filter.active{background:var(--pink3);color:#fff;border-color:var(--pink3)}
  .note-card{background:var(--surface);border:1.5px solid var(--border);border-radius:var(--radius-sm);padding:14px 16px;margin-bottom:10px;cursor:pointer;transition:all .2s;position:relative}
  .note-card:hover{border-color:var(--pink2);transform:translateY(-1px)}
  .note-card-header{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;margin-bottom:6px}
  .note-card-subject{font-size:11px;font-weight:700;padding:2px 10px;border-radius:50px}
  .note-card-date{font-size:11px;color:var(--text3);margin-left:auto}
  .note-card-title{font-size:14px;font-weight:700;color:var(--text);margin-bottom:4px}
  .note-card-preview{font-size:12px;color:var(--text2);line-height:1.5;display:-webkit-box;-webkit-line-clamp:2;-webkit-box-orient:vertical;overflow:hidden}
  .note-card-del{position:absolute;top:10px;right:10px;background:none;border:none;font-size:14px;color:var(--text3);cursor:pointer;opacity:0;transition:opacity .15s;padding:4px}
  .note-card:hover .note-card-del{opacity:1}
  .note-card-del:hover{color:#E24B4A}
  .notes-empty{text-align:center;padding:32px 16px;color:var(--text3);font-size:14px}
  .notes-empty span{font-size:36px;display:block;margin-bottom:8px}
  /* Note editor modal */
  .note-modal{background:var(--surface);border-radius:var(--radius);border:1.5px solid var(--border);width:480px;max-width:94vw;max-height:88vh;display:flex;flex-direction:column;position:relative;animation:fadeUp .25s ease}
  .note-modal-top{padding:18px 18px 12px;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px}
  .note-title-input{flex:1;border:none;outline:none;font-family:'Quicksand',sans-serif;font-size:18px;font-weight:700;color:var(--text);background:transparent;padding:0}
  .note-title-input::placeholder{color:var(--text3)}
  .note-subject-select{padding:5px 10px;border-radius:50px;border:1.5px solid var(--border);font-family:'Nunito',sans-serif;font-size:12px;font-weight:600;color:var(--text2);background:var(--surface2);outline:none;cursor:pointer}
  .note-body{flex:1;padding:14px 18px;overflow-y:auto}
  .note-textarea{width:100%;min-height:220px;border:none;outline:none;font-family:'Nunito',sans-serif;font-size:14px;color:var(--text);background:transparent;resize:none;line-height:1.7}
  .note-textarea::placeholder{color:var(--text3)}
  .note-toolbar{padding:10px 18px;border-top:1px solid var(--border);display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px}
  .note-tool-btn{padding:6px 12px;border-radius:var(--radius-sm);border:1px solid var(--border);background:var(--surface2);font-family:'Nunito',sans-serif;font-size:12px;font-weight:600;color:var(--text2);cursor:pointer;transition:all .15s}
  .note-tool-btn:hover{border-color:var(--pink2);color:var(--pink3);background:var(--pink)}
  .subject-toggle{padding:7px 14px;border-radius:50px;border:1.5px solid var(--border);background:var(--surface2);font-family:'Nunito',sans-serif;font-size:12px;font-weight:600;color:var(--text2);cursor:pointer;transition:all .15s}
  .subject-toggle.active{background:var(--pink);border-color:var(--pink2);color:var(--pink3)}
  .subject-toggle:hover:not(.active){border-color:var(--pink2);color:var(--pink3)}
  .day-dot.today{border-color:var(--pink3);color:var(--pink3)}
  .day-dot.missed{background:var(--border);color:var(--text3)}

  .progress-wrap{background:var(--surface2);border-radius:50px;height:10px;overflow:hidden;margin-top:8px}
  .progress-fill{height:100%;border-radius:50px;background:linear-gradient(90deg,var(--pink2),var(--pink3));transition:width .5s ease}

  .calendar-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(7,1fr);gap:4px;margin-bottom:16px}
  .cal-header{font-size:11px;font-weight:700;color:var(--text3);text-align:center;padding:4px}
  .cal-day{aspect-ratio:1;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;border-radius:50%;font-size:13px;cursor:pointer;transition:all .15s}
  .cal-day:hover{background:var(--pink)}
  .cal-day.today{background:var(--pink3);color:#fff;font-weight:700}
  .cal-day.has-event{position:relative}
  .cal-day.has-event::after{content:'';position:absolute;bottom:3px;left:50%;transform:translateX(-50%);width:4px;height:4px;border-radius:50%;background:var(--pink3)}
  .cal-day.today::after{background:#fff}
  .cal-day.other-month{color:var(--text3)}
  .events-list{background:var(--surface);border-radius:var(--radius-sm);border:1.5px solid var(--border);overflow:hidden}
  .event-item{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:12px;padding:12px 16px;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border)}
  .event-item:last-child{border-bottom:none}
  .event-dot{width:10px;height:10px;border-radius:50%;flex-shrink:0}
  .event-time{font-size:12px;color:var(--text3);width:60px;flex-shrink:0}
  .event-name{font-size:14px;font-weight:600}
  .event-sub{font-size:12px;color:var(--text3)}

  /* Mobile nav fallback */
  .mobile-nav{display:none;position:fixed;bottom:0;left:0;right:0;background:var(--surface);border-top:1.5px solid var(--border);padding:8px 4px;z-index:200;justify-content:space-around}
  .mobile-tab{display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;gap:2px;padding:6px 10px;border:none;background:transparent;font-family:'Nunito',sans-serif;font-size:10px;font-weight:600;color:var(--text3);cursor:pointer;border-radius:10px;transition:all .15s}
  .mobile-tab.active{color:var(--pink3)}
  .mobile-tab span{font-size:20px}

  @media(max-width:700px){
    .tabs{display:none}
    .mobile-nav{display:flex}
    .screen{padding:16px 14px 80px}
    .stat-row{grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr)}
    .methods-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr}
    .reward-row{grid-template-columns:repeat(2,1fr)}
    .home-hero{flex-direction:column;text-align:center}
    .timer-display{font-size:52px}
  }

  /* ── Sign-in page ────────────────────────────────────────── */
  .auth-page{position:fixed;inset:0;z-index:1000;display:flex;flex-direction:column;overflow-y:auto}
  .auth-hero{background:linear-gradient(160deg,#FFF0F5 0%,#F0E8FF 55%,#E8F4FF 100%);flex:1;display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;justify-content:center;padding:40px 24px 32px;text-align:center;min-height:280px}
  .auth-logo-icon{font-size:56px;margin-bottom:10px;animation:floatBear 3s ease-in-out infinite}
  @keyframes floatBear{0%,100%{transform:translateY(0)}50%{transform:translateY(-8px)}}
  .auth-logo-name{font-family:'Quicksand',sans-serif;font-size:32px;font-weight:700;color:var(--pink3);margin-bottom:6px}
  .auth-tagline{font-size:14px;color:var(--text2);line-height:1.5;max-width:260px}
  .auth-panel{background:var(--surface);border-radius:var(--radius) var(--radius) 0 0;padding:28px 24px 40px;box-shadow:0 -6px 30px rgba(58,42,53,.08)}
  .auth-tabs{display:flex;background:var(--surface2);border-radius:50px;padding:4px;gap:4px;margin-bottom:24px;border:1px solid var(--border)}
  .auth-tab{flex:1;padding:9px;border-radius:50px;border:none;font-family:'Nunito',sans-serif;font-size:14px;font-weight:700;color:var(--text2);background:transparent;cursor:pointer;transition:all .2s}
  .auth-tab.active{background:var(--pink3);color:#fff}
  .auth-form{display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:12px}
  .auth-input-wrap{position:relative}
  .auth-input-icon{position:absolute;left:14px;top:50%;transform:translateY(-50%);font-size:16px;pointer-events:none}
  .auth-input{width:100%;padding:12px 14px 12px 40px;border-radius:var(--radius-sm);border:1.5px solid var(--border);font-family:'Nunito',sans-serif;font-size:14px;color:var(--text);background:var(--surface2);outline:none;transition:border-color .15s}
  .auth-input:focus{border-color:var(--pink2)}
  .auth-input::placeholder{color:var(--text3)}
  .auth-btn{width:100%;padding:13px;border-radius:var(--radius-sm);border:none;background:var(--pink3);color:#fff;font-family:'Nunito',sans-serif;font-size:15px;font-weight:700;cursor:pointer;transition:all .2s;margin-top:4px}
  .auth-btn:hover{background:var(--pink2);transform:translateY(-1px)}
  .auth-divider{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;color:var(--text3);font-size:12px;margin:4px 0}
  .auth-divider::before,.auth-divider::after{content:'';flex:1;height:1px;background:var(--border)}
  .auth-error{font-size:12px;color:#E24B4A;text-align:center;min-height:18px}
  .auth-forgot{font-size:12px;color:var(--pink3);text-align:right;cursor:pointer;text-decoration:underline dotted;margin-top:-4px}
  .auth-terms{font-size:11px;color:var(--text3);text-align:center;line-height:1.5;margin-top:8px}
  .auth-terms span{color:var(--pink3);cursor:pointer;text-decoration:underline dotted}
  .strength-bar{height:4px;border-radius:2px;background:var(--border);margin-top:4px;overflow:hidden;transition:all .3s}
  .strength-fill{height:100%;border-radius:2px;width:0%;transition:all .3s}
  .strength-label{font-size:10px;margin-top:3px;font-weight:600}
</style>
</head>
<body>

<!-- SIGN-IN PAGE -->
<div id="auth-page" class="auth-page">

  <div class="auth-hero">
    <img src="data:image/png;base64," style="height:64px;object-fit:contain;margin-bottom:8px" alt="CareCloud"/>
    <div class="auth-tagline">Your cozy study companion — stay focused, feel good, grow every day 🌸</div>
  </div>

  <div class="auth-panel">
    <div class="auth-tabs">
      <button class="auth-tab active" onclick="switchAuthTab('signin', this)">Sign in</button>
      <button class="auth-tab" onclick="switchAuthTab('signup', this)">Sign up</button>
    </div>

    <!-- SIGN IN FORM -->
    <div id="auth-signin">
      <div class="auth-form">
        <div class="auth-input-wrap">
          <span class="auth-input-icon">📧</span>
          <input class="auth-input" id="si-email" type="email" placeholder="Email address" autocomplete="email"/>
        </div>
        <div class="auth-input-wrap">
          <span class="auth-input-icon">🔑</span>
          <input class="auth-input" id="si-password" type="password" placeholder="Password" autocomplete="current-password"/>
        </div>
        <div class="auth-forgot" onclick="showForgot()">Forgot password?</div>
        <div class="auth-error" id="si-error"></div>
        <button class="auth-btn" onclick="signIn()">Sign in 🌸</button>
        <div class="auth-divider">or</div>
        <button class="auth-btn" style="background:var(--surface);color:var(--text);border:1.5px solid var(--border);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;gap:8px" onclick="guestAccess()">
          <span>👤</span> Continue as guest
        </button>
      </div>
    </div>

    <!-- SIGN UP FORM -->
    <div id="auth-signup" style="display:none">
      <div class="auth-form">
        <div class="auth-input-wrap">
          <span class="auth-input-icon">🐻</span>
          <input class="auth-input" id="su-name" type="text" placeholder="Your name" autocomplete="name"/>
        </div>
        <div class="auth-input-wrap">
          <span class="auth-input-icon">📧</span>
          <input class="auth-input" id="su-email" type="email" placeholder="Email address" autocomplete="email"/>
        </div>
        <div class="auth-input-wrap">
          <span class="auth-input-icon">🔑</span>
          <input class="auth-input" id="su-password" type="password" placeholder="Create a password" autocomplete="new-password" oninput="checkStrength(this.value)"/>
          <div class="strength-bar"><div class="strength-fill" id="strength-fill"></div></div>
          <div class="strength-label" id="strength-label" style="color:var(--text3)"></div>
        </div>
        <div class="auth-input-wrap">
          <span class="auth-input-icon">🔒</span>
          <input class="auth-input" id="su-confirm" type="password" placeholder="Confirm password" autocomplete="new-password"/>
        </div>
        <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px">
          <select class="auth-input" id="su-year" style="padding-left:14px;cursor:pointer">
            <option value="" disabled selected>School year</option>
            <option>Year 7</option><option>Year 8</option><option>Year 9</option>
            <option>Year 10</option><option>Year 11</option><option>Year 12</option>
            <option>University</option><option>Other</option>
          </select>
        </div>
        <div class="auth-error" id="su-error"></div>
        <button class="auth-btn" onclick="signUp()">Create account 🌸</button>
        <div class="auth-terms">By signing up you agree to our <span>Terms of Service</span> and <span>Privacy Policy</span></div>
      </div>
    </div>

  </div>
</div>

<!-- LOCK SCREEN -->
<div id="lock-screen" style="position:fixed;inset:0;z-index:999;background:linear-gradient(160deg,#FFF0F5 0%,#F0E8FF 50%,#E8F4FF 100%);display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;justify-content:center;gap:0;padding:32px;display:none">
  <img src="data:image/png;base64," style="height:56px;object-fit:contain;margin-bottom:8px" alt="CareCloud"/>
  <div style="font-size:13px;color:var(--text2);margin-bottom:36px">Enter your PIN to continue</div>

  <div style="display:flex;gap:14px;margin-bottom:8px" id="lock-pin-row">
    <input class="pin-box" id="lpin1" type="password" maxlength="1" inputmode="numeric" pattern="[0-9]" oninput="lockPinMove(this,'lpin2')"/>
    <input class="pin-box" id="lpin2" type="password" maxlength="1" inputmode="numeric" pattern="[0-9]" oninput="lockPinMove(this,'lpin3')" onkeydown="pinBack(event,'lpin1')"/>
    <input class="pin-box" id="lpin3" type="password" maxlength="1" inputmode="numeric" pattern="[0-9]" oninput="lockPinMove(this,'lpin4')" onkeydown="pinBack(event,'lpin2')"/>
    <input class="pin-box" id="lpin4" type="password" maxlength="1" inputmode="numeric" pattern="[0-9]" oninput="lockPinMove(this,null)" onkeydown="pinBack(event,'lpin3')"/>
  </div>
  <div id="lock-error" style="font-size:12px;color:#E24B4A;min-height:18px;margin-bottom:16px;text-align:center"></div>

  <div style="display:flex;gap:10px">
    <button class="btn-pink" onclick="submitLockPin()" style="padding:10px 28px">Unlock 🔓</button>
    <button onclick="skipLock()" style="padding:10px 20px;border-radius:50px;border:1.5px solid var(--border);background:transparent;font-family:'Nunito',sans-serif;font-size:13px;font-weight:600;color:var(--text2);cursor:pointer">Skip for now</button>
  </div>
  <div style="font-size:11px;color:var(--text3);margin-top:28px">New account? Default PIN is <strong>1234</strong></div>
</div>

<nav class="nav">
  <div class="logo"><img src="data:image/png;base64," style="height:36px;object-fit:contain" alt="CareCloud"/></div>
  <div class="tabs">
    <button class="tab active" onclick="showScreen('home')">🏠 Home</button>
    <button class="tab" onclick="showScreen('tasks')">✅ Tasks</button>
    <button class="tab" onclick="showScreen('planner')">📅 Planner</button>
    <button class="tab" onclick="showScreen('focus')">⏱ Focus</button>
    <button class="tab" onclick="showScreen('reflect')">🌸 Reflect</button>
    <button class="tab" onclick="showScreen('island')">🏝 Island</button>
    <button class="tab" onclick="showScreen('profile')">👤 Profile</button>
  </div>
  <button class="profile-btn" onclick="showScreen('profile')">🐻</button>
</nav>

<!-- MOBILE BOTTOM NAV -->
<div class="mobile-nav">
  <button class="mobile-tab active" onclick="showScreen('home',this)"><span>🏠</span>Home</button>
  <button class="mobile-tab" onclick="showScreen('tasks',this)"><span>✅</span>Tasks</button>
  <button class="mobile-tab" onclick="showScreen('focus',this)"><span>⏱</span>Focus</button>
  <button class="mobile-tab" onclick="showScreen('reflect',this)"><span>🌸</span>Reflect</button>
  <button class="mobile-tab" onclick="showScreen('island',this)"><span>🏝</span>Island</button>
  <button class="mobile-tab" onclick="showScreen('profile',this)"><span>👤</span>Profile</button>
</div>

<!-- HOME -->
<div class="screen active" id="screen-home">
  <div class="home-hero">
    <div class="bear-svg">
      <!-- BEAR PLACEHOLDER — replace this div with your bear image -->
      <div id="main-bear" style="width:110px;height:110px;border-radius:16px;background:linear-gradient(135deg,#F9EDE3,#EDD9C8);border:2px dashed #C8A882;display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;justify-content:center;gap:4px;flex-shrink:0">
        <span style="font-size:28px">🐻</span>
        <span style="font-size:9px;font-weight:700;color:#A07A50;text-align:center;line-height:1.3;padding:0 6px">Bear image<br/>goes here</span>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div style="flex:1">
      <div class="greeting">
        <h1>Good morning, Mia! ☀️</h1>
        <p>You've studied <strong>3 days in a row</strong> — you're on a roll! 🌟</p>
      </div>
      <div class="ai-bubble">
        <span>🌸 AI Tip:</span> You've focused 3 days straight — maybe take a longer break tonight! Your Biology mind maps are really working for you 📚
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="stat-row">
    <div class="stat-card">
      <div class="num" id="tasks-done-count">3</div>
      <div class="lbl">Tasks done today</div>
    </div>
    <div class="stat-card">
      <div class="num">🔥 3</div>
      <div class="lbl">Day streak</div>
    </div>
    <div class="stat-card">
      <div class="num">⭐ 48</div>
      <div class="lbl">Stars earned</div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <p class="section-title">Today's focus</p>
  <div class="today-tasks" id="home-tasks"></div>

  <div style="margin-top:16px">
    <p class="section-title">Daily progress</p>
    <div class="stat-card" style="text-align:left;padding:16px">
      <div style="display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;margin-bottom:6px">
        <span style="font-size:13px;color:var(--text2)">Today's tasks</span>
        <span style="font-size:13px;font-weight:700;color:var(--pink3)" id="prog-label">3 / 5</span>
      </div>
      <div class="progress-wrap"><div class="progress-fill" id="home-progress" style="width:60%"></div></div>
    </div>
    <div class="streak-week" style="margin-top:16px">
      <div class="day-dot done" data-day="Mon" onclick="openDayDrawer(this)">M</div>
      <div class="day-dot done" data-day="Tue" onclick="openDayDrawer(this)">T</div>
      <div class="day-dot done" data-day="Wed" onclick="openDayDrawer(this)">W</div>
      <div class="day-dot today" data-day="Thu" onclick="openDayDrawer(this)">T</div>
      <div class="day-dot missed" data-day="Fri" onclick="openDayDrawer(this)">F</div>
      <div class="day-dot missed" data-day="Sat" onclick="openDayDrawer(this)">S</div>
      <div class="day-dot missed" data-day="Sun" onclick="openDayDrawer(this)">S</div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- Ambient sounds button -->
  <div style="margin-top:16px">
    <button id="ambient-home-btn" onclick="openAmbientDrawer()" style="width:100%;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;padding:14px 18px;border-radius:var(--radius-sm);border:1.5px solid var(--border);background:var(--surface);font-family:'Nunito',sans-serif;cursor:pointer;transition:all .2s" onmouseover="this.style.borderColor='var(--pink2)'" onmouseout="this.style.borderColor='var(--border)'">
      <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px">
        <span style="font-size:20px">🎵</span>
        <div style="text-align:left">
          <div style="font-size:14px;font-weight:700;color:var(--text)" id="ambient-btn-label">Ambient Sounds</div>
          <div style="font-size:12px;color:var(--text3)" id="ambient-btn-sub">Tap to choose a sound</div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div id="ambient-playing-indicator" style="display:none;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:6px">
        <span style="display:flex;gap:2px;align-items:flex-end" id="eq-bars">
          <span style="width:3px;height:8px;background:var(--pink3);border-radius:2px;animation:eq1 .8s ease infinite"></span>
          <span style="width:3px;height:14px;background:var(--pink3);border-radius:2px;animation:eq2 .8s ease infinite"></span>
          <span style="width:3px;height:10px;background:var(--pink3);border-radius:2px;animation:eq3 .8s ease infinite"></span>
        </span>
      </div>
    </button>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- TASKS -->
<div class="screen" id="screen-tasks">
  <div class="add-task-bar">
    <input type="text" id="new-task-input" placeholder="Add a new task..." />
    <select id="new-task-subject">
      <option>Biology</option><option>Math</option><option>English</option>
      <option>Chemistry</option><option>History</option><option>Art</option>
    </select>
    <button class="btn-pink" onclick="addTask()">+ Add</button>
  </div>
  <div id="tasks-container">
    <div class="task-group">
      <div class="task-group-title">📌 Priority</div>
      <div class="tasks-list" id="priority-tasks"></div>
    </div>
    <div class="task-group">
      <div class="task-group-title">✅ Completed today</div>
      <div class="tasks-list" id="completed-tasks"></div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- PLANNER -->
<div class="screen" id="screen-planner">
  <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;margin-bottom:16px">
    <button class="btn-outline">← May</button>
    <span style="font-family:'Quicksand',sans-serif;font-size:18px;font-weight:700">May 2026</span>
    <button class="btn-outline">Jun →</button>
  </div>
  <div class="calendar-grid">
    <div class="cal-header">Sun</div><div class="cal-header">Mon</div><div class="cal-header">Tue</div>
    <div class="cal-header">Wed</div><div class="cal-header">Thu</div><div class="cal-header">Fri</div><div class="cal-header">Sat</div>
    <div class="cal-day other-month">27</div><div class="cal-day other-month">28</div><div class="cal-day other-month">29</div><div class="cal-day other-month">30</div><div class="cal-day other-month">1</div><div class="cal-day has-event">2</div><div class="cal-day has-event">3</div>
    <div class="cal-day">4</div><div class="cal-day has-event">5</div><div class="cal-day">6</div><div class="cal-day has-event">7</div><div class="cal-day">8</div><div class="cal-day">9</div><div class="cal-day">10</div>
    <div class="cal-day">11</div><div class="cal-day">12</div><div class="cal-day has-event">13</div><div class="cal-day">14</div><div class="cal-day">15</div><div class="cal-day has-event">16</div><div class="cal-day">17</div>
    <div class="cal-day">18</div><div class="cal-day">19</div><div class="cal-day">20</div><div class="cal-day">21</div><div class="cal-day has-event">22</div><div class="cal-day today">23</div><div class="cal-day">24</div>
    <div class="cal-day">25</div><div class="cal-day has-event">26</div><div class="cal-day">27</div><div class="cal-day has-event">28</div><div class="cal-day">29</div><div class="cal-day">30</div><div class="cal-day">31</div>
  </div>
  <p class="section-title">Thursday, 23 May</p>
  <div class="events-list">
    <div class="event-item">
      <div class="event-dot" style="background:var(--pink3)"></div>
      <div class="event-time">9:00 AM</div>
      <div><div class="event-name">Biology — Chapter 4 Review</div><div class="event-sub">45 min study block</div></div>
    </div>
    <div class="event-item">
      <div class="event-dot" style="background:var(--blue3)"></div>
      <div class="event-time">11:00 AM</div>
      <div><div class="event-name">Math — Practice Problems</div><div class="event-sub">30 min · Pomodoro mode</div></div>
    </div>
    <div class="event-item">
      <div class="event-dot" style="background:var(--purple3)"></div>
      <div class="event-time">2:00 PM</div>
      <div><div class="event-name">English Essay — Outline</div><div class="event-sub">60 min study block</div></div>
    </div>
    <div class="event-item">
      <div class="event-dot" style="background:var(--amber3)"></div>
      <div class="event-time">4:30 PM</div>
      <div><div class="event-name">Chemistry Flashcards</div><div class="event-sub">20 min · Active recall</div></div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- FOCUS -->
<div class="screen" id="screen-focus">
  <div class="timer-card">
    <div class="timer-label" id="timer-mode-label">Pomodoro — Work Session</div>
    <div class="timer-display" id="timer-display">25:00</div>
    <div style="margin-bottom:16px">
      <div style="display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;margin-bottom:4px">
        <span style="font-size:12px;color:var(--text3)">Session progress</span>
        <span style="font-size:12px;color:var(--pink3);font-weight:700" id="session-count">Session 1 of 4</span>
      </div>
      <div class="progress-wrap"><div class="progress-fill" id="timer-progress" style="width:0%"></div></div>
    </div>
    <div class="timer-btns">
      <button class="btn-pink" id="start-btn" onclick="toggleTimer()">▶ Start</button>
      <button class="btn-outline" onclick="resetTimer()">↺ Reset</button>
      <button class="btn-outline" onclick="skipTimer()">⏭ Skip</button>
    </div>
  </div>
  <p class="section-title">Study methods <span style="font-size:11px;color:var(--text3);font-weight:400;text-transform:none;letter-spacing:0">· tap to select · double-tap for info</span></p>
  <div class="methods-grid">
    <div class="method-card selected" data-key="pomodoro">
      <div class="method-icon">🍅</div>
      <div class="method-name">Pomodoro</div>
      <div class="method-desc">25 min focus, 5 min break</div>
    </div>
    <div class="method-card" data-key="blurting">
      <div class="method-icon">✏️</div>
      <div class="method-name">Blurting</div>
      <div class="method-desc">Write everything you know</div>
    </div>
    <div class="method-card" data-key="active-recall">
      <div class="method-icon">🧠</div>
      <div class="method-name">Active Recall</div>
      <div class="method-desc">Test yourself from memory</div>
    </div>
    <div class="method-card" data-key="feynman">
      <div class="method-icon">💡</div>
      <div class="method-name">Feynman</div>
      <div class="method-desc">Teach it simply</div>
    </div>
    <div class="method-card" data-key="custom">
      <div class="method-icon">⚙️</div>
      <div class="method-name">Custom</div>
      <div class="method-desc">Set your own timer</div>
    </div>
    <div class="method-card" data-key="mind-map">
      <div class="method-icon">🗺️</div>
      <div class="method-name">Mind Map</div>
      <div class="method-desc">Visual concept linking</div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- NOTES SECTION -->
  <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;margin-bottom:10px;margin-top:8px">
    <p class="section-title" style="margin-bottom:0">📝 Study Notes</p>
    <button class="btn-pink" style="padding:7px 16px;font-size:13px" onclick="openNewNote()">+ New note</button>
  </div>

  <!-- Subject filter tabs -->
  <div style="display:flex;gap:6px;flex-wrap:wrap;margin-bottom:12px" id="notes-filter-row">
    <button class="notes-filter active" onclick="filterNotes('all',this)">All</button>
    <button class="notes-filter" onclick="filterNotes('Biology',this)">🌿 Biology</button>
    <button class="notes-filter" onclick="filterNotes('Math',this)">📐 Math</button>
    <button class="notes-filter" onclick="filterNotes('English',this)">📖 English</button>
    <button class="notes-filter" onclick="filterNotes('Chemistry',this)">🧪 Chemistry</button>
    <button class="notes-filter" onclick="filterNotes('History',this)">🏛 History</button>
    <button class="notes-filter" onclick="filterNotes('Art',this)">🎨 Art</button>
  </div>

  <div id="notes-list"></div>
</div>

<!-- EDIT PROFILE SCREEN -->
<div class="screen" id="screen-edit-profile">
  <button onclick="closeEditProfileScreen()" style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:6px;background:none;border:none;font-family:'Nunito',sans-serif;font-size:14px;font-weight:700;color:var(--pink3);cursor:pointer;margin-bottom:20px;padding:0">← Back to Profile</button>

  <div style="display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;margin-bottom:24px">
    <div class="profile-avatar" id="ep-avatar-preview" style="width:80px;height:80px;font-size:38px;margin-bottom:8px">🐻</div>
    <div style="font-size:12px;color:var(--text3)">Your profile picture</div>
  </div>

  <div class="stat-card" style="margin-bottom:14px">
    <label class="edit-form-label">Your name</label>
    <input class="edit-form-input" id="ep-name" type="text" placeholder="e.g. Mia Tanaka"/>
  </div>

  <div class="stat-card" style="margin-bottom:14px">
    <label class="edit-form-label">School year</label>
    <select class="edit-form-input" id="ep-year" style="cursor:pointer">
      <option>Year 7</option><option>Year 8</option><option>Year 9</option>
      <option selected>Year 10</option><option>Year 11</option><option>Year 12</option>
      <option>University</option><option>Other</option>
    </select>
  </div>

  <div class="stat-card" style="margin-bottom:14px">
    <label class="edit-form-label">My goals</label>
    <div class="goal-input-row" style="margin-bottom:10px">
      <input type="text" id="ep-goal-input" placeholder="Add a goal and press +" onkeydown="if(event.key==='Enter')addEpGoal()"/>
      <button onclick="addEpGoal()" class="btn-pink" style="padding:8px 16px">+</button>
    </div>
    <div class="goals-edit-list" id="ep-goals-list"></div>
  </div>

  <div class="stat-card" style="margin-bottom:14px">
    <label class="edit-form-label">My subjects</label>
    <div style="font-size:12px;color:var(--text3);margin-bottom:10px">Tap to add or remove · these appear in Tasks, Notes & Planner</div>
    <div style="display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:8px;margin-bottom:12px" id="ep-subject-presets">
      <button class="subject-toggle active" data-subject="Biology" onclick="toggleSubject(this)">🌿 Biology</button>
      <button class="subject-toggle active" data-subject="Math" onclick="toggleSubject(this)">📐 Math</button>
      <button class="subject-toggle active" data-subject="English" onclick="toggleSubject(this)">📖 English</button>
      <button class="subject-toggle active" data-subject="Chemistry" onclick="toggleSubject(this)">🧪 Chemistry</button>
      <button class="subject-toggle active" data-subject="History" onclick="toggleSubject(this)">🏛 History</button>
      <button class="subject-toggle active" data-subject="Art" onclick="toggleSubject(this)">🎨 Art</button>
      <button class="subject-toggle" data-subject="Physics" onclick="toggleSubject(this)">⚛️ Physics</button>
      <button class="subject-toggle" data-subject="Geography" onclick="toggleSubject(this)">🌍 Geography</button>
      <button class="subject-toggle" data-subject="Music" onclick="toggleSubject(this)">🎵 Music</button>
      <button class="subject-toggle" data-subject="Economics" onclick="toggleSubject(this)">📊 Economics</button>
      <button class="subject-toggle" data-subject="Languages" onclick="toggleSubject(this)">🗣 Languages</button>
      <button class="subject-toggle" data-subject="Drama" onclick="toggleSubject(this)">🎭 Drama</button>
      <button class="subject-toggle" data-subject="PE" onclick="toggleSubject(this)">🏃 PE</button>
      <button class="subject-toggle" data-subject="Psychology" onclick="toggleSubject(this)">🧠 Psychology</button>
    </div>
    <div style="display:flex;gap:8px">
      <input type="text" id="ep-custom-subject" placeholder="Add a custom subject..." style="flex:1;padding:8px 12px;border-radius:var(--radius-sm);border:1.5px solid var(--border);font-family:'Nunito',sans-serif;font-size:13px;color:var(--text);background:var(--surface2);outline:none" onkeydown="if(event.key==='Enter')addCustomSubject()"/>
      <button onclick="addCustomSubject()" class="btn-pink" style="padding:8px 16px;font-size:13px">+</button>
    </div>
  </div>

  <button class="btn-pink" style="width:100%;padding:13px;font-size:15px" onclick="saveEditProfileScreen()">Save changes 🌸</button>
  <div id="ep-saved-msg" style="text-align:center;font-size:13px;color:var(--green3);margin-top:10px;min-height:20px"></div>
</div>

<!-- METHOD DETAIL PAGE -->
<div class="screen" id="screen-method">
  <button onclick="closeMethodPage()" style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:6px;background:none;border:none;font-family:'Nunito',sans-serif;font-size:14px;font-weight:700;color:var(--pink3);cursor:pointer;margin-bottom:16px;padding:0">← Back to Focus</button>
  <div class="method-detail-hero" id="method-hero">
    <div class="method-detail-icon" id="method-detail-icon">🍅</div>
    <div>
      <div class="method-detail-name" id="method-detail-name">Pomodoro</div>
      <div class="method-detail-tagline" id="method-detail-tagline">25 min focus, 5 min break</div>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div class="method-detail-card" id="method-what">
    <div class="method-section-title">📖 What is it?</div>
    <div class="method-section-body" id="method-what-body"></div>
  </div>
  <div class="method-detail-card" id="method-how">
    <div class="method-section-title">✅ How to do it</div>
    <ol class="method-steps" id="method-steps"></ol>
  </div>
  <div class="method-detail-card">
    <div class="method-section-title">💡 Best for</div>
    <div class="method-tags" id="method-tags"></div>
  </div>
  <div class="method-detail-card" style="background:linear-gradient(135deg,var(--pink),var(--purple));border-color:var(--pink2)">
    <div class="method-section-title" style="color:var(--pink3)">🌸 CareCloud tip</div>
    <div class="method-section-body" id="method-tip" style="color:var(--text)"></div>
  </div>
  <div class="method-detail-card" id="method-time-card" style="border-color:var(--pink2)">
    <div class="method-section-title">⏱ Total session time</div>
    <div id="method-time-breakdown" style="display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:8px;margin-bottom:10px"></div>
    <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;padding-top:10px;border-top:1px solid var(--border)">
      <span style="font-size:13px;color:var(--text2)">Total</span>
      <span style="font-family:'Quicksand',sans-serif;font-size:22px;font-weight:700;color:var(--pink3)" id="method-total-time"></span>
    </div>
  </div>
  <button class="btn-pink" style="width:100%;margin-top:4px;font-size:15px" id="method-start-btn" onclick="startMethodTimer()">▶ Start this method</button>
</div>

<!-- REFLECT -->
<div class="screen" id="screen-reflect">
  <div class="ai-insight">
    <div class="ai-title">🌸 AI Reflection Summary</div>
    <p>You seem happiest on days with lighter workloads and creative tasks. Your mood has been mostly positive this week — keep that up! Consider adding some self-care time on exam days 💜</p>
  </div>
  <p class="section-title">How are you feeling today?</p>
  <div class="mood-row">
    <button class="mood-btn" onclick="selectMood(this)">😊 Happy</button>
    <button class="mood-btn active" onclick="selectMood(this)">😌 Calm</button>
    <button class="mood-btn" onclick="selectMood(this)">😤 Stressed</button>
    <button class="mood-btn" onclick="selectMood(this)">😴 Tired</button>
    <button class="mood-btn" onclick="selectMood(this)">🥰 Motivated</button>
    <button class="mood-btn" onclick="selectMood(this)">😟 Anxious</button>
  </div>
  <div class="journal-card">
    <div class="journal-prompt">✨ What went well today?</div>
    <textarea id="reflect-q1" placeholder="I managed to finish my Biology reading and it actually made sense this time..."></textarea>
  </div>
  <div class="journal-card">
    <div class="journal-prompt">💭 What challenged you?</div>
    <textarea id="reflect-q2" placeholder="Chemistry flashcards are still hard for me..."></textarea>
  </div>
  <div class="journal-card">
    <div class="journal-prompt">🌸 What made you happy today?</div>
    <textarea id="reflect-q3" placeholder="Listening to lo-fi music while studying really helped me focus..."></textarea>
  </div>
  <button class="btn-pink" style="width:100%;margin-top:4px" onclick="saveReflection()">Save today's reflection 🌸</button>
</div>

<!-- ISLAND -->
<div class="screen" id="screen-island">
  <div class="currency-bar">
    <div class="currency-item">🐚 <span id="shells">24</span> shells</div>
    <div class="currency-item">⭐ <span id="stars">48</span> stars</div>
    <div class="currency-item">🍓 <span id="berries">12</span> berries</div>
    <div class="currency-item">☁️ <span id="clouds-count">6</span> clouds</div>
  </div>
  <div class="island-canvas">
    <svg width="100%" height="100%" viewBox="0 0 700 280" preserveAspectRatio="xMidYMid slice">
      <rect width="700" height="280" fill="#B8E4F9"/>
      <g opacity=".9"><ellipse cx="80" cy="50" rx="45" ry="20" fill="white"/><ellipse cx="55" cy="55" rx="25" ry="18" fill="white"/><ellipse cx="110" cy="55" rx="25" ry="18" fill="white"/></g>
      <g opacity=".8"><ellipse cx="580" cy="70" rx="40" ry="17" fill="white"/><ellipse cx="558" cy="74" rx="22" ry="15" fill="white"/><ellipse cx="605" cy="74" rx="22" ry="15" fill="white"/></g>
      <g opacity=".6"><ellipse cx="320" cy="30" rx="30" ry="13" fill="white"/><ellipse cx="300" cy="33" rx="18" ry="11" fill="white"/><ellipse cx="342" cy="33" rx="18" ry="11" fill="white"/></g>
      <rect x="0" y="200" width="700" height="80" fill="#78C4E8" opacity=".5"/>
      <ellipse cx="350" cy="210" rx="230" ry="55" fill="#5A9E52"/>
      <ellipse cx="350" cy="200" rx="230" ry="50" fill="#7CBE75"/>
      <ellipse cx="350" cy="192" rx="200" ry="40" fill="#A8D5A2"/>
      <ellipse cx="350" cy="182" rx="160" ry="28" fill="#C8E8C0"/>
      <ellipse cx="350" cy="185" rx="40" ry="18" fill="#D4EDDA" opacity=".6"/>
      <rect x="195" y="145" width="8" height="40" fill="#8B6914"/>
      <circle cx="199" cy="135" r="25" fill="#5A9E52"/>
      <circle cx="185" cy="145" r="18" fill="#7CBE75"/>
      <circle cx="213" cy="145" r="18" fill="#7CBE75"/>
      <rect x="470" y="150" width="8" height="38" fill="#8B6914"/>
      <circle cx="474" cy="140" r="22" fill="#5A9E52"/>
      <circle cx="460" cy="150" r="16" fill="#7CBE75"/>
      <circle cx="488" cy="150" r="16" fill="#7CBE75"/>
      <circle cx="280" cy="178" r="4" fill="#F9C8D8"/><circle cx="292" cy="182" r="3" fill="#F4A0BC"/><circle cx="275" cy="185" r="3.5" fill="#FFD4E8"/>
      <circle cx="415" cy="178" r="4" fill="#F9C8D8"/><circle cx="425" cy="183" r="3" fill="#FFB8CC"/><circle cx="408" cy="184" r="3.5" fill="#F4A0BC"/>
      <rect x="320" y="148" width="60" height="40" fill="#FEEFD4" rx="4"/>
      <polygon points="316,148 384,148 350,118" fill="#F4A0BC"/>
      <rect x="338" y="165" width="16" height="23" fill="#D4537E" rx="2"/>
      <rect x="326" y="155" width="14" height="12" fill="#C5DFF8" rx="2"/>
      <rect x="362" y="155" width="14" height="12" fill="#C5DFF8" rx="2"/>
      <circle cx="365" cy="114" r="4" fill="white" opacity=".6"/>
      <circle cx="369" cy="106" r="5" fill="white" opacity=".4"/>
      <circle cx="363" cy="98" r="6" fill="white" opacity=".25"/>
      <!-- BEAR PLACEHOLDER (island scene) — replace with your bear image -->
      <rect x="558" y="78" width="84" height="70" rx="10" fill="#F9EDE3" opacity=".9"/>
      <rect x="558" y="78" width="84" height="70" rx="10" fill="none" stroke="#C8A882" stroke-width="1.5" stroke-dasharray="4 3"/>
      <text x="600" y="108" font-size="18" text-anchor="middle">🐻</text>
      <text x="600" y="122" font-size="8" text-anchor="middle" fill="#A07A50" font-family="Nunito, sans-serif">bear image</text>
      <text x="600" y="132" font-size="8" text-anchor="middle" fill="#A07A50" font-family="Nunito, sans-serif">goes here</text>
      <!-- Cloud under placeholder bear -->
      <ellipse cx="600" cy="148" rx="36" ry="11" fill="white"/>
      <ellipse cx="578" cy="145" rx="18" ry="12" fill="white"/>
      <ellipse cx="622" cy="145" rx="18" ry="12" fill="white"/>
      <text x="140" y="90" font-size="14" fill="#F9C8D8" opacity=".8">✦</text>
      <text x="520" y="50" font-size="12" fill="#C5DFF8" opacity=".8">✦</text>
      <text x="430" y="100" font-size="10" fill="#E8E2FB" opacity=".7">✦</text>
      <rect x="20" y="18" width="180" height="44" rx="10" fill="white" opacity=".9"/>
      <text x="30" y="35" font-size="10" fill="#D4537E" font-family="Nunito, sans-serif" font-weight="700">🏝 TODAY'S MISSION</text>
      <text x="30" y="52" font-size="11" fill="#3A2A35" font-family="Nunito, sans-serif">Complete 5 tasks to unlock</text>
      <text x="30" y="64" font-size="11" fill="#3A2A35" font-family="Nunito, sans-serif">a new island decoration!</text>
    </svg>
  </div>
  <div class="inv-tabs">
    <button class="inv-tab active" onclick="switchIslandTab('shop',this)">🛍 Shop</button>
    <button class="inv-tab" onclick="switchIslandTab('inventory',this)">🎒 My Inventory</button>
  </div>

  <div id="island-shop-panel">
  <p class="section-title">Island shop</p>
  <div class="shop-cat-filter">
    <button class="cat-filter-btn active" onclick="filterShop('all',this)">🌟 All</button>
    <button class="cat-filter-btn" onclick="filterShop('hats',this)">🎩 Hats</button>
    <button class="cat-filter-btn" onclick="filterShop('accessories',this)">💎 Accessories</button>
    <button class="cat-filter-btn" onclick="filterShop('companions',this)">🐾 Companions</button>
    <button class="cat-filter-btn" onclick="filterShop('decorations',this)">🏡 Decorations</button>
  </div>

  <div class="cat-section" data-shop-cat="hats">
    <div class="cat-title">🎩 Hats</div>
    <div class="reward-row">
      <div class="reward-card unlocked" data-cat="hats" data-item="Pink Bow" data-icon="🎀"><div class="reward-icon">🎀</div><div class="reward-name">Pink Bow</div><div class="reward-cost" style="color:var(--amber3)">✅ Owned</div></div>
      <div class="reward-card" data-cat="hats" data-item="Flower Crown" data-icon="🌸" onclick="buyReward(this,6,'shells')"><div class="reward-icon">🌸</div><div class="reward-name">Flower Crown</div><div class="reward-cost">🐚 6 shells</div></div>
      <div class="reward-card" data-cat="hats" data-item="Witch Hat" data-icon="🧙" onclick="buyReward(this,10,'stars')"><div class="reward-icon">🧙</div><div class="reward-name">Witch Hat</div><div class="reward-cost">⭐ 10 stars</div></div>
      <div class="reward-card" data-cat="hats" data-item="Cozy Beanie" data-icon="🍄" onclick="buyReward(this,8,'berries')"><div class="reward-icon">🍄</div><div class="reward-name">Mushroom Cap</div><div class="reward-cost">🍓 8 berries</div></div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="cat-section" data-shop-cat="accessories">
    <div class="cat-title">💎 Accessories</div>
    <div class="reward-row">
      <div class="reward-card" data-cat="accessories" data-item="Star Wand" data-icon="⭐" onclick="buyReward(this,8,'stars')"><div class="reward-icon">⭐</div><div class="reward-name">Star Wand</div><div class="reward-cost">⭐ 8 stars</div></div>
      <div class="reward-card" data-cat="accessories" data-item="Heart Glasses" data-icon="🩷" onclick="buyReward(this,5,'shells')"><div class="reward-icon">🩷</div><div class="reward-name">Heart Glasses</div><div class="reward-cost">🐚 5 shells</div></div>
      <div class="reward-card" data-cat="accessories" data-item="Rainbow Scarf" data-icon="🌈" onclick="buyReward(this,6,'berries')"><div class="reward-icon">🌈</div><div class="reward-name">Rainbow Scarf</div><div class="reward-cost">🍓 6 berries</div></div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="cat-section" data-shop-cat="companions">
    <div class="cat-title">🐾 Companions</div>
    <div class="reward-row">
      <div class="reward-card" data-cat="companions" data-item="Island Cat" data-icon="🐱" onclick="buyReward(this,12,'stars')"><div class="reward-icon">🐱</div><div class="reward-name">Island Cat</div><div class="reward-cost">⭐ 12 stars</div></div>
      <div class="reward-card" data-cat="companions" data-item="Baby Duck" data-icon="🐥" onclick="buyReward(this,8,'shells')"><div class="reward-icon">🐥</div><div class="reward-name">Baby Duck</div><div class="reward-cost">🐚 8 shells</div></div>
      <div class="reward-card" data-cat="companions" data-item="Bunny Friend" data-icon="🐰" onclick="buyReward(this,10,'berries')"><div class="reward-icon">🐰</div><div class="reward-name">Bunny Friend</div><div class="reward-cost">🍓 10 berries</div></div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="cat-section" data-shop-cat="decorations">
    <div class="cat-title">🏡 Decorations</div>
    <div class="reward-row">
      <div class="reward-card" data-cat="decorations" data-item="Cozy Cottage" data-icon="🏡" onclick="buyReward(this,8,'stars')"><div class="reward-icon">🏡</div><div class="reward-name">Cozy Cottage</div><div class="reward-cost">⭐ 8 stars</div></div>
      <div class="reward-card" data-cat="decorations" data-item="Sunflower Patch" data-icon="🌻" onclick="buyReward(this,5,'shells')"><div class="reward-icon">🌻</div><div class="reward-name">Sunflower Patch</div><div class="reward-cost">🐚 5 shells</div></div>
      <div class="reward-card" data-cat="decorations" data-item="Festive Tent" data-icon="🎪" onclick="buyReward(this,15,'stars')"><div class="reward-icon">🎪</div><div class="reward-name">Festive Tent</div><div class="reward-cost">⭐ 15 stars</div></div>
    </div>
  </div>
  </div>

  <div id="island-inventory-panel" style="display:none">
  <p class="section-title">My inventory</p>
  <div class="equipped-bar" id="equipped-bar">
    <span class="equipped-bar-label">✨ Equipped:</span>
    <span class="equipped-none" id="equipped-none">Nothing equipped yet</span>
  </div>

  <div class="cat-section">
    <div class="cat-title">🎩 Hats <span class="cat-slot">1 slot</span></div>
    <div class="inv-grid" id="inv-hats">
      <div class="inv-card" data-cat="hats" data-item="Pink Bow" onclick="toggleEquip(this)">
        <div class="inv-badge">owned</div>
        <div class="inv-icon">🎀</div>
        <div class="inv-name">Pink Bow</div>
        <button class="inv-equip-btn">Equip</button>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="cat-section">
    <div class="cat-title">💎 Accessories <span class="cat-slot">1 slot</span></div>
    <div class="inv-grid" id="inv-accessories">
      <div class="inv-empty"><span>💎</span>No accessories yet</div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="cat-section">
    <div class="cat-title">🐾 Companions <span class="cat-slot">1 slot</span></div>
    <div class="inv-grid" id="inv-companions">
      <div class="inv-empty"><span>🐾</span>No companions yet</div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="cat-section">
    <div class="cat-title">🏡 Decorations <span class="cat-slot">1 slot</span></div>
    <div class="inv-grid" id="inv-decorations">
      <div class="inv-empty"><span>🏡</span>No decorations yet</div>
    </div>
  </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- PROFILE -->
<div class="screen" id="screen-profile">
  <div class="profile-header">
    <div class="profile-avatar" id="avatar-circle">🐻</div>
    <div class="profile-info">
      <h2 id="profile-name">Mia Tanaka</h2>
      <p id="profile-year">Year 10 · CareCloud since Jan 2026</p>
      <div class="badge-row">
        <span class="badge">🔥 3-day streak</span>
        <span class="badge">📚 50 tasks done</span>
        <span class="badge">🌸 Reflector</span>
      </div>
      <div class="goals-display" id="goals-display">
        <span class="goal-chip">🎯 Get into uni</span>
