        <span class="goal-chip">📚 Study every day</span>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- Sub-tabs -->
  <div class="profile-tabs">
    <button class="profile-tab active" onclick="switchProfileTab('settings', this)">👤 Profile</button>
    <button class="profile-tab" onclick="switchProfileTab('customise', this)">🎨 Customise</button>
    <button class="profile-tab" onclick="switchProfileTab('history', this)">📖 History</button>
  </div>

  <!-- SETTINGS PANEL -->
  <div id="profile-settings-panel">
    <p class="section-title">Settings</p>
    <div class="settings-group">
      <div class="setting-row">
        <div><div class="setting-label">✏️ Edit Profile</div><div class="setting-sub">Name, year and goals</div></div>
        <button class="btn-pink" style="padding:7px 14px;font-size:13px" onclick="showEditProfileScreen()">Edit</button>
      </div>
      <div class="setting-row">
        <div><div class="setting-label">AI Companion</div><div class="setting-sub">Personalised feedback & suggestions</div></div>
        <button class="toggle" onclick="this.classList.toggle('off')"></button>
      </div>
      <div class="setting-row">
        <div><div class="setting-label">AI frequency</div><div class="setting-sub">Supportive</div></div>
        <select style="border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:50px;padding:6px 10px;font-family:'Nunito',sans-serif;font-size:13px;background:var(--surface);color:var(--text);outline:none">
          <option>Minimal</option><option>Balanced</option><option selected>Supportive</option>
        </select>
      </div>
      <div class="setting-row">
        <div><div class="setting-label">Notifications</div><div class="setting-sub">Study reminders & streaks</div></div>
        <button class="toggle" onclick="this.classList.toggle('off')"></button>
      </div>
      <div class="setting-row">
        <div><div class="setting-label">Ambient sounds</div><div class="setting-sub">Lo-fi, rain, café</div></div>
        <button class="toggle off" onclick="this.classList.toggle('off')"></button>
      </div>
    </div>

    <p class="section-title">Account</p>
    <div class="settings-group">
      <div class="setting-row">
        <div>
          <div class="setting-label">📧 Email address</div>
          <div class="setting-sub" id="email-display">mia@example.com</div>
        </div>
        <button class="btn-pink" style="padding:7px 14px;font-size:13px" onclick="openEmailModal()">Change</button>
      </div>
      <div class="setting-row">
        <div>
          <div class="setting-label">🔑 Passcode</div>
          <div class="setting-sub" id="passcode-display">4-digit PIN set</div>
        </div>
        <button class="btn-pink" style="padding:7px 14px;font-size:13px" onclick="openPasscodeModal()">Change</button>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="settings-group">
      <div class="setting-row">
        <div><div class="setting-label">🔒 Parents Privacy Tab</div><div class="setting-sub">Control what parents can view</div></div>
        <button class="btn-pink" style="padding:7px 14px;font-size:13px">Manage</button>
      </div>
    </div>
    <p class="section-title">Language</p>
    <div class="settings-group">
      <div class="setting-row">
        <div class="setting-label">App language</div>
        <select style="border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:50px;padding:6px 10px;font-family:'Nunito',sans-serif;font-size:13px;background:var(--surface);color:var(--text);outline:none">
          <option>🇬🇧 English</option><option>🇯🇵 Japanese</option><option>🇰🇷 Korean</option>
          <option>🇨🇳 Mandarin</option><option>🇪🇸 Spanish</option><option>🇫🇷 French</option>
          <option>🇸🇦 Arabic</option><option>🇮🇳 Hindi</option>
        </select>
      </div>
    </div>

    <p class="section-title">Account</p>
    <div class="settings-group">
      <div class="setting-row">
        <div><div class="setting-label" style="color:#E24B4A">🚪 Log out</div><div class="setting-sub">You'll be taken back to the sign-in page</div></div>
        <button onclick="confirmLogout()" style="padding:7px 14px;border-radius:50px;border:1.5px solid #E24B4A;background:transparent;font-family:'Nunito',sans-serif;font-size:13px;font-weight:700;color:#E24B4A;cursor:pointer;transition:all .15s" onmouseover="this.style.background='#FDE8E8'" onmouseout="this.style.background='transparent'">Log out</button>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- CUSTOMISE PANEL -->
  <div id="profile-customise-panel" style="display:none">

    <p class="section-title">Profile emoji</p>
    <div class="stat-card" style="margin-bottom:16px">
      <div style="font-size:13px;color:var(--text2);margin-bottom:10px">Choose your profile icon</div>
      <div style="display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:8px" id="emoji-picker">
        <button class="emoji-opt active" onclick="pickEmoji(this,'🐻')">🐻</button>
        <button class="emoji-opt" onclick="pickEmoji(this,'🐱')">🐱</button>
        <button class="emoji-opt" onclick="pickEmoji(this,'🐰')">🐰</button>
        <button class="emoji-opt" onclick="pickEmoji(this,'🐼')">🐼</button>
        <button class="emoji-opt" onclick="pickEmoji(this,'🦊')">🦊</button>
        <button class="emoji-opt" onclick="pickEmoji(this,'🐸')">🐸</button>
        <button class="emoji-opt" onclick="pickEmoji(this,'🐧')">🐧</button>
        <button class="emoji-opt" onclick="pickEmoji(this,'🦋')">🦋</button>
        <button class="emoji-opt" onclick="pickEmoji(this,'🌸')">🌸</button>
        <button class="emoji-opt" onclick="pickEmoji(this,'⭐')">⭐</button>
        <button class="emoji-opt" onclick="pickEmoji(this,'🌙')">🌙</button>
        <button class="emoji-opt" onclick="pickEmoji(this,'🍀')">🍀</button>
      </div>
    </div>

    <p class="section-title">App colour theme</p>
    <div class="stat-card" style="margin-bottom:16px">
      <div style="font-size:13px;color:var(--text2);margin-bottom:12px">Pick a theme for the whole app</div>
      <div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr);gap:8px" id="theme-picker">
        <div class="theme-card active" data-theme="pink" onclick="applyTheme(this)">
          <div class="theme-preview">
            <div style="background:#D4537E;border-radius:4px 4px 0 0;height:18px"></div>
            <div style="display:flex;gap:2px;padding:4px">
              <div style="background:#F9C8D8;flex:1;border-radius:3px;height:10px"></div>
              <div style="background:#F4A0BC;flex:1;border-radius:3px;height:10px"></div>
            </div>
          </div>
          <div class="theme-name">Blossom 🌸</div>
        </div>
        <div class="theme-card" data-theme="purple" onclick="applyTheme(this)">
          <div class="theme-preview">
            <div style="background:#7F77DD;border-radius:4px 4px 0 0;height:18px"></div>
            <div style="display:flex;gap:2px;padding:4px">
              <div style="background:#E8E2FB;flex:1;border-radius:3px;height:10px"></div>
              <div style="background:#C4B8F0;flex:1;border-radius:3px;height:10px"></div>
            </div>
          </div>
          <div class="theme-name">Lavender 💜</div>
        </div>
        <div class="theme-card" data-theme="blue" onclick="applyTheme(this)">
          <div class="theme-preview">
            <div style="background:#378ADD;border-radius:4px 4px 0 0;height:18px"></div>
            <div style="display:flex;gap:2px;padding:4px">
              <div style="background:#C5DFF8;flex:1;border-radius:3px;height:10px"></div>
              <div style="background:#8BBEE8;flex:1;border-radius:3px;height:10px"></div>
            </div>
          </div>
          <div class="theme-name">Sky 💙</div>
        </div>
        <div class="theme-card" data-theme="green" onclick="applyTheme(this)">
          <div class="theme-preview">
            <div style="background:#3B8B5C;border-radius:4px 4px 0 0;height:18px"></div>
            <div style="display:flex;gap:2px;padding:4px">
              <div style="background:#D4EDDA;flex:1;border-radius:3px;height:10px"></div>
              <div style="background:#A8D5B5;flex:1;border-radius:3px;height:10px"></div>
            </div>
          </div>
          <div class="theme-name">Sage 🍃</div>
        </div>
        <div class="theme-card" data-theme="peach" onclick="applyTheme(this)">
          <div class="theme-preview">
            <div style="background:#E07A5F;border-radius:4px 4px 0 0;height:18px"></div>
            <div style="display:flex;gap:2px;padding:4px">
              <div style="background:#FAD7CC;flex:1;border-radius:3px;height:10px"></div>
              <div style="background:#F2A897;flex:1;border-radius:3px;height:10px"></div>
            </div>
          </div>
          <div class="theme-name">Peach 🍑</div>
        </div>
        <div class="theme-card" data-theme="night" onclick="applyTheme(this)">
          <div class="theme-preview">
            <div style="background:#2D2B55;border-radius:4px 4px 0 0;height:18px"></div>
            <div style="display:flex;gap:2px;padding:4px">
              <div style="background:#3D3B6E;flex:1;border-radius:3px;height:10px"></div>
              <div style="background:#5A58A0;flex:1;border-radius:3px;height:10px"></div>
            </div>
          </div>
          <div class="theme-name">Night 🌙</div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <p class="section-title">Bear colour</p>
    <div class="stat-card" style="margin-bottom:16px">
      <div style="font-size:13px;color:var(--text2);margin-bottom:10px">Tint your bear's fur colour</div>
      <div class="color-swatches" id="bear-swatches">
        <div class="swatch active" style="background:#F9C8D8" data-color="#F9C8D8" onclick="changeBearColor(this)"></div>
        <div class="swatch" style="background:#D4EDDA" data-color="#D4EDDA" onclick="changeBearColor(this)"></div>
        <div class="swatch" style="background:#C5DFF8" data-color="#C5DFF8" onclick="changeBearColor(this)"></div>
        <div class="swatch" style="background:#E8E2FB" data-color="#E8E2FB" onclick="changeBearColor(this)"></div>
        <div class="swatch" style="background:#F5DEB3" data-color="#F5DEB3" onclick="changeBearColor(this)"></div>
        <div class="swatch" style="background:#FFFFFF;border:1px solid var(--border)" data-color="#FFFFFF" onclick="changeBearColor(this)"></div>
      </div>
    </div>

  </div>

  <!-- HISTORY PANEL -->
  <div id="profile-history-panel" style="display:none">

    <p class="section-title">This week at a glance</p>
    <div class="history-stats-grid">
      <div class="history-stat"><div class="h-num" id="hist-tasks-num">18</div><div class="h-lbl">Tasks completed</div></div>
      <div class="history-stat"><div class="h-num">4h 20m</div><div class="h-lbl">Total focus time</div></div>
      <div class="history-stat"><div class="h-num" id="hist-reflect-num">5</div><div class="h-lbl">Reflections logged</div></div>
      <div class="history-stat"><div class="h-num">🔥 3</div><div class="h-lbl">Day streak</div></div>
    </div>

    <p class="section-title">Activity calendar</p>
    <div class="stat-card" style="margin-bottom:16px;padding:16px">
      <!-- Month nav -->
      <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;margin-bottom:14px">
        <button onclick="shiftHistoryMonth(-1)" style="background:none;border:none;font-size:18px;cursor:pointer;color:var(--text2);padding:4px 8px;border-radius:8px" onmouseover="this.style.background='var(--surface2)'" onmouseout="this.style.background='none'">‹</button>
        <span id="history-month-label" style="font-family:'Quicksand',sans-serif;font-size:15px;font-weight:700;color:var(--text)"></span>
        <button onclick="shiftHistoryMonth(1)" style="background:none;border:none;font-size:18px;cursor:pointer;color:var(--text2);padding:4px 8px;border-radius:8px" onmouseover="this.style.background='var(--surface2)'" onmouseout="this.style.background='none'">›</button>
      </div>
      <!-- Day headers -->
      <div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(7,1fr);gap:3px;margin-bottom:4px">
        <div style="text-align:center;font-size:10px;font-weight:700;color:var(--text3)">S</div>
        <div style="text-align:center;font-size:10px;font-weight:700;color:var(--text3)">M</div>
        <div style="text-align:center;font-size:10px;font-weight:700;color:var(--text3)">T</div>
        <div style="text-align:center;font-size:10px;font-weight:700;color:var(--text3)">W</div>
        <div style="text-align:center;font-size:10px;font-weight:700;color:var(--text3)">T</div>
        <div style="text-align:center;font-size:10px;font-weight:700;color:var(--text3)">F</div>
        <div style="text-align:center;font-size:10px;font-weight:700;color:var(--text3)">S</div>
      </div>
      <!-- Calendar grid -->
      <div id="history-cal-grid" style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(7,1fr);gap:4px"></div>
      <!-- Legend -->
      <div style="display:flex;gap:14px;margin-top:12px;flex-wrap:wrap">
        <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:5px;font-size:11px;color:var(--text3)"><div style="width:12px;height:12px;border-radius:3px;background:var(--pink3)"></div>Active day</div>
        <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:5px;font-size:11px;color:var(--text3)"><div style="width:12px;height:12px;border-radius:3px;background:var(--pink);border:1px solid var(--pink2)"></div>Today</div>
        <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:5px;font-size:11px;color:var(--text3)"><div style="width:12px;height:12px;border-radius:3px;background:var(--border)"></div>No activity</div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <!-- Day detail panel -->
    <div id="history-day-detail" style="display:none">
      <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;margin-bottom:10px">
        <p class="section-title" style="margin-bottom:0" id="history-detail-title">Activity for Monday</p>
        <button onclick="document.getElementById('history-day-detail').style.display='none'" style="background:none;border:none;font-size:13px;color:var(--text3);cursor:pointer;font-family:'Nunito',sans-serif">✕ Close</button>
      </div>
      <div id="history-detail-body"></div>
    </div>

    <p class="section-title">Recent activity</p>
    <div class="history-section">
      <div style="font-size:12px;font-weight:700;color:var(--text3);margin-bottom:8px;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.4px">Today</div>
      <div class="history-item clickable" onclick="openReflectModal({mood:'😌 Calm',date:'Thursday, 22 May · 1:00 PM',q1:'Finished all of my planned tasks.',q2:'Flashcards are still tricky.',q3:'Lo-fi music really helped me focus.'})">
        <div class="history-icon reflect">🌸</div>
        <div class="history-info"><div class="history-title">Reflection logged — 😌 Calm</div><div class="history-sub">Mood: Calm · Tap to read entry</div></div>
        <div class="history-date">1:00 PM</div>
      </div>
      <div class="history-item">
        <div class="history-icon task">✓</div>
        <div class="history-info"><div class="history-title">Read Chapter 4 — Biology</div><div class="history-sub">Task completed · Biology</div></div>
        <div class="history-date">9:12 AM</div>
      </div>
      <div class="history-item">
        <div class="history-icon focus">⏱</div>
        <div class="history-info"><div class="history-title">Pomodoro session — 25 min</div><div class="history-sub">Focus · Math practice</div></div>
        <div class="history-date">10:30 AM</div>
      </div>
      <div style="font-size:12px;font-weight:700;color:var(--text3);margin:14px 0 8px;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.4px">Yesterday</div>
      <div class="history-item clickable" onclick="openReflectModal({mood:'🥰 Motivated',date:'Wednesday, 21 May · 8:30 PM',q1:'Got through 5 tasks — felt really productive!',q2:'Chemistry formulas are still tricky.',q3:'Had a nice study break with friends.'})">
        <div class="history-icon reflect">🌸</div>
        <div class="history-info"><div class="history-title">Reflection logged — 🥰 Motivated</div><div class="history-sub">Mood: Motivated · Tap to read entry</div></div>
        <div class="history-date">8:30 PM</div>
      </div>
      <div class="history-item">
        <div class="history-icon streak">🔥</div>
        <div class="history-info"><div class="history-title">2-day streak reached!</div><div class="history-sub">Keep it up — you're on a roll 🌟</div></div>
        <div class="history-date">All day</div>
      </div>
      <div class="history-item">
        <div class="history-icon focus">⏱</div>
        <div class="history-info"><div class="history-title">Active Recall session — 20 min</div><div class="history-sub">Focus · Chemistry flashcards</div></div>
        <div class="history-date">4:00 PM</div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

</div>

<script>
// ── Persistence (localStorage) ─────────────────────────────────
// Each user's data is stored under their own email key, so multiple
// users on the same device each have private, separate progress.

let currentUserEmail = 'guest';

const STORE = {
  key(k)      { return 'cc_' + currentUserEmail + '_' + k; },
  save(k, v)  { try { localStorage.setItem(this.key(k), JSON.stringify(v)); } catch(e){} },
  load(k, def){ try { const v = localStorage.getItem(this.key(k)); return v !== null ? JSON.parse(v) : def; } catch(e){ return def; } },
  // User registry: email → hashed password (simple hash for demo)
  saveUser(email, passHash, name, year) {
    const users = this.loadUsers();
    users[email.toLowerCase()] = { passHash, name, year, created: Date.now() };
    try { localStorage.setItem('cc_users', JSON.stringify(users)); } catch(e){}
  },
  loadUsers() { try { return JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('cc_users') || '{}'); } catch(e){ return {}; } },
  userExists(email) { return !!this.loadUsers()[email.toLowerCase()]; },
  checkPassword(email, passHash) {
    const u = this.loadUsers()[email.toLowerCase()];
    return u && u.passHash === passHash;
  },
};

// Simple hash (not cryptographic — for demo only)
function hashPass(str) {
  let h = 0;
  for (let i = 0; i < str.length; i++) h = (Math.imul(31, h) + str.charCodeAt(i)) | 0;
  return 'h' + Math.abs(h).toString(36);
}


let currentTheme = 'pink';

function saveAll() {
  STORE.save('tasks',        tasks);
  STORE.save('nextId',       nextId);
  STORE.save('notes',        notes);
  STORE.save('nextNoteId',   nextNoteId);
  STORE.save('editGoals',    editGoals);
  STORE.save('userSubjects', userSubjects);
  STORE.save('savedPin',     savedPin);
  STORE.save('theme',        currentTheme);
  STORE.save('ambientVolume',ambientVolume);
  STORE.save('profile', {
    name:  document.getElementById('profile-name')?.textContent  || 'Mia Tanaka',
    year:  document.getElementById('profile-year')?.textContent  || 'Year 10 · CareCloud since Jan 2026',
    email: document.getElementById('email-display')?.textContent || 'mia@example.com',
    emoji: document.getElementById('avatar-circle')?.textContent || '🐻',
  });
  STORE.save('currency', {
    stars:   parseInt(document.getElementById('stars')?.textContent  || 48),
    shells:  parseInt(document.getElementById('shells')?.textContent || 24),
    berries: parseInt(document.getElementById('berries')?.textContent|| 12),
    clouds:  parseInt(document.getElementById('clouds-count')?.textContent || 6),
  });
  // Inventory state
  const inv = {};
  document.querySelectorAll('.inv-card[data-item]').forEach(card => {
    inv[card.dataset.item] = { cat: card.dataset.cat, icon: card.querySelector('.inv-icon')?.textContent || '', equipped: card.classList.contains('equipped') };
  });
  STORE.save('inventory', inv);
}

function loadAll() {
  // Tasks
  const t = STORE.load('tasks', null);
  if (t) { tasks.length = 0; t.forEach(x => tasks.push(x)); }
  nextId = STORE.load('nextId', nextId);

  // Notes
  const n = STORE.load('notes', null);
  if (n) { notes.length = 0; n.forEach(x => notes.push(x)); }
  nextNoteId = STORE.load('nextNoteId', nextNoteId);

  // Goals & subjects
  const g = STORE.load('editGoals', null); if (g) editGoals = g;
  const s = STORE.load('userSubjects', null); if (s) userSubjects = s;

  // PIN
  const pin = STORE.load('savedPin', null); if (pin) savedPin = pin;

  // Profile
  const prof = STORE.load('profile', null);
  if (prof) {
    const setEl = (id, val) => { const el = document.getElementById(id); if (el && val) el.textContent = val; };
    setEl('profile-name', prof.name); setEl('profile-year', prof.year);
    setEl('email-display', prof.email); setEl('avatar-circle', prof.emoji);
    if (prof.name) {
      const fn = prof.name.split(' ')[0], h = new Date().getHours();
      const tod = h < 12 ? 'morning' : h < 17 ? 'afternoon' : 'evening';
      const gr = document.querySelector('.greeting h1');
      if (gr) gr.textContent = 'Good ' + tod + ', ' + fn + '! ☀️';
    }
  }

  // Theme
  const th = STORE.load('theme', 'pink');
  if (th && themes[th]) {
    currentTheme = th;
    Object.entries(themes[th]).forEach(([k,v]) => document.documentElement.style.setProperty(k, v));
    setTimeout(() => {
      const card = document.querySelector('[data-theme="' + th + '"]');
      if (card) { document.querySelectorAll('.theme-card').forEach(c => c.classList.remove('active')); card.classList.add('active'); }
    }, 50);
  }

  // Currency
  const cur = STORE.load('currency', null);
  if (cur) {
    const setNum = (id, val) => { const el = document.getElementById(id); if (el && val !== undefined) el.textContent = val; };
    setNum('stars', cur.stars); setNum('shells', cur.shells); setNum('berries', cur.berries); setNum('clouds-count', cur.clouds);
  }

  // Volume
  const vol = STORE.load('ambientVolume', 0.6);
  ambientVolume = vol;
  const sl = document.getElementById('ambient-vol');
  if (sl) { const pct = Math.round(vol * 100); sl.value = pct; sl.style.background = `linear-gradient(to right, var(--pink3) ${pct}%, var(--border) ${pct}%)`; }
  const vv = document.getElementById('ambient-vol-val');
  if (vv) vv.textContent = Math.round(vol * 100) + '%';

  // Subjects dropdown
  const taskSel = document.getElementById('new-task-subject');
  if (taskSel && userSubjects.length) taskSel.innerHTML = userSubjects.map(s => '<option>' + s + '</option>').join('');

  // Inventory
  const inv = STORE.load('inventory', null);
  if (inv) {
    Object.entries(inv).forEach(([itemName, data]) => {
      // Mark shop card as owned
      const shopCard = document.querySelector('[data-item="' + itemName + '"]');
      if (shopCard) {
        shopCard.classList.add('unlocked');
        const costEl = shopCard.querySelector('.reward-cost');
        if (costEl) { costEl.textContent = '✅ Owned'; costEl.style.color = 'var(--amber3)'; shopCard.onclick = null; }
      }
      // Add to inventory (avoid duplicates)
      const existing = document.querySelector('.inv-card[data-item="' + itemName + '"]');
      if (!existing) addToInventory(data.icon, itemName, data.cat);
    });
    // Restore equipped state after cards are rendered
    setTimeout(() => {
      Object.entries(inv).forEach(([itemName, data]) => {
        if (data.equipped) {
          const card = document.querySelector('.inv-card[data-item="' + itemName + '"]');
          if (card) { card.classList.add('equipped'); const b = card.querySelector('.inv-equip-btn'); if(b) b.textContent = 'Unequip'; }
        }
      });
      updateEquippedBar(); updateBearAccessories();
    }, 200);
  }
}

let timerInterval = null;
let timerRunning = false;
let totalSeconds = 25 * 60;
let remainingSeconds = 25 * 60;
let doneTasks = 3;
let totalTasks = 5;

// Boot — render both task views from shared data

function showScreen(name, mobileTabEl) {
  document.querySelectorAll('.screen').forEach(s => s.classList.remove('active'));
  document.querySelectorAll('.tab').forEach(t => t.classList.remove('active'));
  document.querySelectorAll('.mobile-tab').forEach(t => t.classList.remove('active'));
  document.getElementById('screen-' + name).classList.add('active');
  const map = {home:0,tasks:1,planner:2,focus:3,reflect:4,island:5,profile:6,method:3};
  const tabs = document.querySelectorAll('.tab');
  if (map[name] !== undefined && tabs[map[name]]) tabs[map[name]].classList.add('active');
  if (mobileTabEl) mobileTabEl.classList.add('active');
  window.scrollTo(0, 0);
}

// ── Shared task data ──────────────────────────────────────────
const tasks = [
  { id:1, label:'Read Chapter 4 — Biology',  subject:'Biology',   tag:'tag-pink',   done:true  },
  { id:2, label:'Math practice problems',     subject:'Math',      tag:'tag-blue',   done:true  },
  { id:3, label:'Essay outline — English',    subject:'English',   tag:'tag-purple', done:true  },
  { id:4, label:'Flashcards — Chemistry',     subject:'Chemistry', tag:'tag-amber',  done:false },
  { id:5, label:'Review History notes',       subject:'History',   tag:'tag-blue',   done:false },
];
let nextId = 6;

const tagColors = {Biology:'tag-pink',Math:'tag-blue',English:'tag-purple',Chemistry:'tag-amber',History:'tag-blue',Art:'tag-purple'};

function getTask(id) { return tasks.find(t => t.id === id); }

function renderAll() {
  renderHome();
  renderTasksScreen();
  syncCounts();
}

function renderHome() {
  const el = document.getElementById('home-tasks');
  if (!el) return;
  el.innerHTML = '';
  tasks.forEach(t => {
    const row = document.createElement('div');
    row.className = 'task-row';
    row.dataset.id = t.id;
    row.innerHTML =
      '<div class="task-check' + (t.done ? ' done' : '') + '">' + (t.done ? '✓' : '') + '</div>' +
      '<div class="task-label' + (t.done ? ' done' : '') + '">' + t.label + '</div>' +
      '<span class="task-tag ' + t.tag + '">' + t.subject + '</span>';
    row.onclick = () => toggleById(t.id);
    el.appendChild(row);
  });
}

function renderTasksScreen() {
  const pending   = document.getElementById('priority-tasks');
  const completed = document.getElementById('completed-tasks');
  if (!pending || !completed) return;
  pending.innerHTML = '';
  completed.innerHTML = '';
  tasks.forEach(t => {
    const row = document.createElement('div');
    row.className = 'task-row';
    row.dataset.id = t.id;
    row.innerHTML =
      '<div class="task-check' + (t.done ? ' done' : '') + '">' + (t.done ? '✓' : '') + '</div>' +
      '<div class="task-label' + (t.done ? ' done' : '') + '">' + t.label + '</div>' +
      '<span class="task-tag ' + t.tag + '">' + t.subject + '</span>';
    row.onclick = () => toggleById(t.id);
    (t.done ? completed : pending).appendChild(row);
  });
  if (!pending.children.length)   pending.innerHTML   = '<div class="task-row" style="color:var(--text3);font-size:13px;justify-content:center">All done! 🎉</div>';
  if (!completed.children.length) completed.innerHTML = '<div class="task-row" style="color:var(--text3);font-size:13px;justify-content:center">Nothing completed yet</div>';
}

function syncCounts() {
  doneTasks  = tasks.filter(t => t.done).length;
  totalTasks = tasks.length;
  updateProgress();
}

function toggleById(id) {
  const t = getTask(id);
  if (!t) return;
  const wasDown = t.done;
  t.done = !t.done;
  renderAll();
  if (!wasDown) {
    // just completed — celebrate + log history
    const anyRow = document.querySelector('[data-id="' + id + '"]');
    if (anyRow) spawnStar(anyRow);
    addHistoryEntry(t.label, t.subject);
  }
  saveAll();
}

// Keep addTask wired up to the shared array
function addTask() {
  const input   = document.getElementById('new-task-input');
  const subject = document.getElementById('new-task-subject').value;
  const text    = input.value.trim();
  if (!text) return;
  tasks.push({ id: nextId++, label: text, subject, tag: tagColors[subject] || 'tag-pink', done: false });
  input.value = '';
  renderAll();
  saveAll();
}

// Legacy stubs — no longer called but kept so nothing breaks
function toggleHomeTask() {}
function toggleTask() {}

function updateProgress() {
  const pct = Math.round((doneTasks / totalTasks) * 100);
  document.getElementById('home-progress').style.width = pct + '%';
  document.getElementById('prog-label').textContent = doneTasks + ' / ' + totalTasks;
  document.getElementById('tasks-done-count').textContent = doneTasks;
}

function addHistoryEntry(taskName, subject) {
  // Format current time
  const now = new Date();
  const hrs = now.getHours();
  const mins = now.getMinutes().toString().padStart(2, '0');
  const ampm = hrs >= 12 ? 'PM' : 'AM';
  const time = (hrs % 12 || 12) + ':' + mins + ' ' + ampm;

  // Build the new history item
  const item = document.createElement('div');
  item.className = 'history-item';
  item.style.animation = 'fadeUp .3s ease';
  item.innerHTML =
    '<div class="history-icon task">✓</div>' +
    '<div class="history-info">' +
      '<div class="history-title">' + taskName + '</div>' +
      '<div class="history-sub">Task completed' + (subject ? ' · ' + subject : '') + '</div>' +
    '</div>' +
    '<div class="history-date">' + time + '</div>';

  // Insert at the top of the Today section (right after the "Today" label)
  const todayLabel = document.querySelector('.history-section > div');
  if (todayLabel) {
    todayLabel.insertAdjacentElement('afterend', item);
  }

  // Update the "tasks completed this week" stat card
  const hNum = document.querySelector('#profile-history-panel .history-stats-grid .history-stat:first-child .h-num');
  if (hNum) hNum.textContent = parseInt(hNum.textContent) + 1;

  // Update today's bar in the week chart (Thu = index 3)
  const bars = document.querySelectorAll('.week-bar');
  if (bars.length > 3) {
    const todayBar = bars[3];
    const curH = parseInt(todayBar.style.height) || 4;
    todayBar.style.height = Math.min(curH + 8, 56) + 'px';
  }
}

function spawnStar(el) {
  const star = document.createElement('div');
  star.textContent = '⭐';
  star.style.cssText = 'position:fixed;font-size:20px;pointer-events:none;z-index:9999;transition:all .8s ease;';
  const rect = el.getBoundingClientRect();
  star.style.left = (rect.left + rect.width / 2) + 'px';
  star.style.top = rect.top + 'px';
  document.body.appendChild(star);
  requestAnimationFrame(() => {
    star.style.transform = 'translateY(-60px) scale(1.5)';
    star.style.opacity = '0';
    setTimeout(() => star.remove(), 900);
  });
}

function addTask() {
  const input = document.getElementById('new-task-input');
  const subject = document.getElementById('new-task-subject').value;
  const text = input.value.trim();
  if (!text) return;
  const colors = {Biology:'tag-pink',Math:'tag-blue',English:'tag-purple',Chemistry:'tag-amber',History:'tag-blue',Art:'tag-purple'};
  const tag = colors[subject] || 'tag-pink';
  const row = document.createElement('div');
  row.className = 'task-row';
  row.innerHTML = '<div class="task-check"></div><div class="task-label">' + text + '</div><span class="task-tag ' + tag + '">' + subject + '</span>';
  row.onclick = function() { toggleTask(this); };
  document.getElementById('priority-tasks').appendChild(row);
  totalTasks++; input.value = ''; updateProgress();
}

let currentSession = 1;
const totalSessions = 4;
let isBreak = false;
let isLongBreak = false;
let studyMinutes = 25;
let isSingleSession = false;

// Custom sequence support — array of {label, mins, colour} steps; null = use default Pomodoro logic
let customSequence = null;
let customStep = 0;

function updateSessionLabel() {
  const el = document.getElementById('session-count');
  if (customSequence)          el.textContent = customSequence[customStep].label;
  else if (isSingleSession)    el.textContent = 'Single session — 20 min';
  else if (isLongBreak)        el.textContent = '🌿 Long break — well done!';
  else if (isBreak)            el.textContent = '☁️ Break — Session ' + (currentSession - 1) + ' of ' + totalSessions + ' done';
  else                         el.textContent = 'Session ' + currentSession + ' of ' + totalSessions;
}

function setTimerFace(label, mins, colour) {
  document.getElementById('timer-mode-label').textContent = label;
  document.getElementById('timer-display').style.color = colour || 'var(--pink3)';
  totalSeconds = mins * 60;
  remainingSeconds = mins * 60;
  const m = mins.toString().padStart(2, '0');
  document.getElementById('timer-display').textContent = m + ':00';
  document.getElementById('timer-progress').style.width = '0%';
  document.getElementById('start-btn').textContent = '▶ Start';
}

function completeSession() {
  clearInterval(timerInterval);
  timerRunning = false;
  document.getElementById('timer-progress').style.width = '100%';
  document.getElementById('start-btn').textContent = '▶ Start';

  setTimeout(() => {
    // ── Custom sequence (e.g. Active Recall) ──
    if (customSequence) {
      customStep++;
      if (customStep >= customSequence.length) customStep = 0; // loop
      const step = customSequence[customStep];
      setTimerFace(step.timerLabel, step.mins, step.colour);
      updateSessionLabel();
      return;
    }

    // ── Single session (e.g. Blurting) ──
    if (isSingleSession) {
      remainingSeconds = totalSeconds;
      const m = Math.floor(totalSeconds / 60).toString().padStart(2, '0');
      document.getElementById('timer-display').textContent = m + ':00';
      document.getElementById('timer-progress').style.width = '0%';
      document.getElementById('start-btn').textContent = '▶ Start';
      return;
    }

    // ── Default Pomodoro cycle ──
    if (isBreak || isLongBreak) {
      isBreak = false; isLongBreak = false;
      if (currentSession > totalSessions) currentSession = 1;
      totalSeconds = studyMinutes * 60;
      setTimerFace('Pomodoro — Work Session', studyMinutes, 'var(--pink3)');
    } else {
      if (currentSession < totalSessions) {
        currentSession++;
        isBreak = true; isLongBreak = false;
        setTimerFace('☁️ Short Break — breathe & stretch!', 5, 'var(--blue3)');
      } else {
        currentSession++;
        isBreak = false; isLongBreak = true;
        setTimerFace('🌿 Long Break — great work today!', 20, 'var(--green3)');
      }
    }
    updateSessionLabel();
  }, 700);
}

function toggleTimer() {
  if (timerRunning) {
    clearInterval(timerInterval); timerRunning = false;
    document.getElementById('start-btn').textContent = '▶ Resume';
  } else {
    timerRunning = true;
    document.getElementById('start-btn').textContent = '⏸ Pause';
    timerInterval = setInterval(() => {
      if (remainingSeconds <= 0) { completeSession(); return; }
      remainingSeconds--;
      const pct = Math.round(((totalSeconds - remainingSeconds) / totalSeconds) * 100);
      document.getElementById('timer-progress').style.width = pct + '%';
      const m = Math.floor(remainingSeconds / 60).toString().padStart(2, '0');
      const s = (remainingSeconds % 60).toString().padStart(2, '0');
      document.getElementById('timer-display').textContent = m + ':' + s;
    }, 1000);
  }
}

function resetTimer() {
  clearInterval(timerInterval); timerRunning = false;
  isBreak = false; isLongBreak = false;
  currentSession = 1;

  if (customSequence) {
    customStep = 0;
    const first = customSequence[0];
    setTimerFace(first.timerLabel, first.mins, first.colour);
  } else {
    totalSeconds = studyMinutes * 60;
    remainingSeconds = totalSeconds;
    const m = studyMinutes.toString().padStart(2, '0');
    document.getElementById('timer-display').textContent = m + ':00';
    document.getElementById('timer-display').style.color = 'var(--pink3)';
    document.getElementById('timer-mode-label').textContent = 'Pomodoro — Work Session';
    document.getElementById('timer-progress').style.width = '0%';
  }

  document.getElementById('start-btn').textContent = '▶ Start';
  updateSessionLabel();
}

function skipTimer() {
  clearInterval(timerInterval); timerRunning = false;
  remainingSeconds = 0;
  completeSession();
}

// Custom sequences keyed by method name
const methodSequences = {
  'Active Recall': [
    { label: '🧠 Focus — Active Recall',         timerLabel: '🧠 Active Recall — Focus',          mins: 10, colour: 'var(--pink3)' },
    { label: '☁️ Quick Break — rest your brain',  timerLabel: '☁️ Quick Break — rest & breathe',   mins: 2,  colour: 'var(--blue3)' },
    { label: '✏️ Fill Your Gaps',                 timerLabel: '✏️ Fill Your Gaps — review missed',  mins: 8,  colour: 'var(--purple3)' },
  ],
  'Blurting': [
    { label: '✏️ Blurting — Write it all out',    timerLabel: '✏️ Blurting — Write everything you know', mins: 15, colour: 'var(--pink3)' },
    { label: '☁️ Quick Break — rest your brain',  timerLabel: '☁️ Quick Break — rest & breathe',         mins: 2,  colour: 'var(--blue3)' },
    { label: '🔍 Check Your Gaps',                timerLabel: '🔍 Check Your Gaps — compare & review',   mins: 8,  colour: 'var(--purple3)' },
  ],
  'Feynman Technique': [
    { label: '💡 Feynman — Teach it simply',      timerLabel: '💡 Feynman — Explain it out loud',        mins: 10, colour: 'var(--pink3)' },
    { label: '📖 Go Back & Fill the Gaps',        timerLabel: '📖 Go Back — review what you missed',     mins: 5,  colour: 'var(--amber3)' },
  ],
};

function selectMethod(el, name, mins) {
  document.querySelectorAll('.method-card').forEach(c => c.classList.remove('selected'));
  el.classList.add('selected');
  studyMinutes = mins;
  isBreak = false; isLongBreak = false;
  isSingleSession = (name === 'Mind Map');
  currentSession = 1;

  // Map short card names to full sequence keys
  const nameMap = { 'Feynman': 'Feynman Technique' };
  const seqName = nameMap[name] || name;

  if (methodSequences[seqName]) {
    customSequence = methodSequences[seqName];
    customStep = 0;
    const first = customSequence[0];
    totalSeconds = first.mins * 60;
    setTimerFace(first.timerLabel, first.mins, first.colour);
  } else {
    customSequence = null;
    customStep = 0;
    totalSeconds = mins * 60; remainingSeconds = mins * 60;
    const m = mins.toString().padStart(2, '0');
    document.getElementById('timer-display').textContent = m + ':00';
    document.getElementById('timer-display').style.color = 'var(--pink3)';
    document.getElementById('timer-mode-label').textContent = name + ' — Work Session';
    document.getElementById('timer-progress').style.width = '0%';
    document.getElementById('start-btn').textContent = '▶ Start';
  }

  updateSessionLabel();
  clearInterval(timerInterval); timerRunning = false;
}

function selectMood(btn) {
  document.querySelectorAll('.mood-btn').forEach(b => b.classList.remove('active'));
  btn.classList.add('active');
}

function saveReflection() {
  const btn = document.querySelector('#screen-reflect .btn-pink');
  btn.textContent = '✅ Reflection saved! +5 stars 🌸';
  btn.style.background = 'var(--green3)';
  const starEl = document.getElementById('stars');
  if (starEl) starEl.textContent = parseInt(starEl.textContent) + 5;
  setTimeout(() => { btn.textContent = "Save today's reflection 🌸"; btn.style.background = ''; }, 2500);

  // Clear fields and reset mood after a short delay
  setTimeout(() => {
    document.getElementById('reflect-q1').value = '';
    document.getElementById('reflect-q2').value = '';
    document.getElementById('reflect-q3').value = '';
    document.querySelectorAll('.mood-btn').forEach(b => b.classList.remove('active'));
    document.querySelector('.mood-btn:nth-child(2)').classList.add('active'); // reset to 😌 Calm
  }, 600);

  // Capture mood and journal text
  const activeMood = document.querySelector('.mood-btn.active');
  const moodText = activeMood ? activeMood.textContent.trim() : '🌸';
  const q1 = document.getElementById('reflect-q1').value.trim();
  const q2 = document.getElementById('reflect-q2').value.trim();
  const q3 = document.getElementById('reflect-q3').value.trim();

  // Format time
  const now = new Date();
  const hrs = now.getHours(), mins = now.getMinutes().toString().padStart(2,'0');
  const ampm = hrs >= 12 ? 'PM' : 'AM';
  const time = (hrs % 12 || 12) + ':' + mins + ' ' + ampm;
  const dateStr = now.toLocaleDateString('en-AU', {weekday:'long', day:'numeric', month:'long'}) + ' · ' + time;

  // Store snapshot for the modal
  const snapshot = { mood: moodText, date: dateStr, q1, q2, q3 };

  // Build history entry
  const item = document.createElement('div');
  item.className = 'history-item clickable';
  item.style.animation = 'fadeUp .3s ease';
  item.innerHTML =
    '<div class="history-icon reflect">🌸</div>' +
    '<div class="history-info">' +
      '<div class="history-title">Reflection logged — ' + moodText + '</div>' +
      '<div class="history-sub">Mood: ' + moodText + ' · Tap to read entry</div>' +
    '</div>' +
    '<div class="history-date">' + time + '</div>';

  item.onclick = () => openReflectModal(snapshot);

  const todayLabel = document.querySelector('.history-section > div');
  if (todayLabel) todayLabel.insertAdjacentElement('afterend', item);

  // Update reflections stat
  const reflectStat = document.querySelector('#profile-history-panel .history-stats-grid .history-stat:nth-child(3) .h-num');
  if (reflectStat) reflectStat.textContent = parseInt(reflectStat.textContent) + 1;
  saveAll();
}

function openReflectModal(snap) {
  const moodEmoji = snap.mood.split(' ')[0];
  document.getElementById('rm-mood').textContent  = moodEmoji;
  document.getElementById('rm-title').textContent = 'Reflection — ' + snap.mood;
  document.getElementById('rm-date').textContent  = snap.date;

  const q1el = document.getElementById('rm-q1');
  const q2el = document.getElementById('rm-q2');
  const q3el = document.getElementById('rm-q3');

  q1el.textContent = snap.q1 || 'Nothing written';
  q2el.textContent = snap.q2 || 'Nothing written';
  q3el.textContent = snap.q3 || 'Nothing written';

  [q1el,q2el,q3el].forEach(el => {
    el.classList.toggle('reflect-section-empty', !el.textContent || el.textContent === 'Nothing written');
  });

  document.getElementById('reflect-modal-overlay').classList.add('open');
}

function closeReflectModal() {
  document.getElementById('reflect-modal-overlay').classList.remove('open');
}

// ── Study method detail pages ──────────────────────────────────
const methodData = {
  'pomodoro': {
    icon:'🍅', name:'Pomodoro', tagline:'25 min focus, 5 min break', mins:25,
    what:'The Pomodoro Technique is a time-management method developed by Francesco Cirillo. You break your study time into short, focused intervals (called "pomodoros") separated by brief breaks. It trains your brain to focus intensely for short bursts and prevents burnout.',
    steps:[
      '<strong>Choose one task</strong> you want to work on.',
      '<strong>Set a timer for 25 minutes</strong> and work on that task with full focus — no phone, no distractions.',
      '<strong>When the timer rings</strong>, take a 5-minute break. Stretch, breathe, grab water.',
      '<strong>After 4 pomodoros</strong>, take a longer 15–30 minute break.',
      '<strong>Repeat</strong> until your task is done.'
    ],
    tags:['📚 Any subject','📝 Long assignments','😤 When distracted','⏱ Building focus'],
    tip:'Try putting your phone in another room during the 25 minutes. Even one distraction can break your flow — protect your pomodoro! 🍅'
  },
  'blurting': {
    icon:'✏️', name:'Blurting', tagline:'Write everything you know', mins:15,
    what:'Blurting is a powerful revision technique where you close your notes and write down absolutely everything you can remember about a topic. It exposes gaps in your knowledge instantly — whatever you can\'t remember is exactly what you need to review next.',
    steps:[
      '<strong>Read your notes</strong> on a topic once through carefully.',
      '<strong>Close everything</strong> — notes, textbook, browser.',
      '<strong>On a blank page</strong>, write (or "blurt") every single thing you can remember. Don\'t edit, just dump it all.',
      '<strong>Open your notes</strong> and compare. Highlight anything you missed.',
      '<strong>Re-read the gaps</strong> and repeat the blurt for just those sections.'
    ],
    tags:['🧬 Sciences','📖 Humanities','🗓 Before exams','🔍 Finding gaps'],
    tip:'Don\'t worry if your blurt looks messy — that\'s the point! The messier it is, the more honest your brain is being with you. 🌸'
  },
  'active-recall': {
    icon:'🧠', name:'Active Recall', tagline:'Test yourself from memory', mins:20,
    what:'Active Recall is one of the most research-backed study techniques. Instead of re-reading your notes passively, you actively retrieve information from memory. This strengthens neural pathways and dramatically improves long-term retention compared to highlighting or re-reading.',
    steps:[
      '<strong>After studying a section</strong>, close your notes.',
      '<strong>Ask yourself questions</strong> — "What were the 3 causes of WWI?" or "How does photosynthesis work?"',
      '<strong>Answer out loud or in writing</strong> without looking.',
      '<strong>Check your answers</strong> against your notes and mark what you got wrong.',
      '<strong>Focus your next study session</strong> on the things you couldn\'t recall.'
    ],
    tags:['📝 Any subject','🗓 Regular revision','🃏 Works with flashcards','🔁 Long-term memory'],
    tip:'Turn your notes into questions before the session. "The mitochondria is the powerhouse of the cell" → "What is the powerhouse of the cell?" Then quiz yourself! 💡'
  },
  'feynman': {
    icon:'💡', name:'Feynman Technique', tagline:'Teach it like you\'re explaining to a 12-year-old', mins:30,
    what:'Named after Nobel Prize-winning physicist Richard Feynman, this technique is based on the idea that if you can\'t explain something simply, you don\'t truly understand it. Teaching a concept — even to an imaginary student — forces you to process it deeply and identify what\'s fuzzy in your understanding.',
    steps:[
      '<strong>Pick a concept</strong> you\'ve been studying.',
      '<strong>Explain it out loud or on paper</strong> as if you\'re teaching it to a 12-year-old — use simple words, no jargon.',
      '<strong>Notice where you get stuck</strong> or have to say "um" — those are your knowledge gaps.',
      '<strong>Go back to your source</strong> (notes, textbook) and fill those gaps.',
      '<strong>Repeat</strong> until you can explain it clearly from start to finish.'
    ],
    tags:['🔬 Complex concepts','📐 Maths & science','🗣 Verbal learners','💡 Deep understanding'],
    tip:'Try explaining it to a teddy bear, a pet, or even just record yourself on your phone. Hearing yourself stumble is the fastest way to find what you don\'t know yet. 🐻'
  },
  'spaced-repetition': {
    icon:'🔁', name:'Spaced Repetition', tagline:'Review at growing intervals', mins:45,
    what:'Spaced Repetition is a scientifically proven memorisation technique that schedules reviews at increasing intervals — just before you\'re about to forget something. By spacing out your reviews strategically, you can memorise large amounts of information with far less total study time.',
    steps:[
      '<strong>Learn new material</strong> today.',
      '<strong>Review it tomorrow</strong> (1 day later).',
      '<strong>Review again in 3 days</strong> if you remembered it well, sooner if you struggled.',
      '<strong>Keep extending the interval</strong> — 1 week, 2 weeks, 1 month.',
      '<strong>Use flashcard apps</strong> like Anki which do the scheduling for you automatically.'
    ],
    tags:['🗃 Flashcards','📅 Long-term study','🌍 Languages','🔬 Definitions & facts'],
    tip:'Start your spaced repetition for an exam at least 4 weeks out. Cramming the night before works against this method — give your brain time to consolidate! 🌙'
  },
  'custom': {
    icon:'⚙️', name:'Custom Timer', tagline:'Your own focus session', mins:25,
    what:'The Custom Timer lets you design your own study session. Set a focus duration that works for you — whether that\'s 10 minutes, 45 minutes, or anything in between. You can also add an optional break between sessions.',
    steps:[
      '<strong>Choose your focus duration</strong> — how long do you want to study?',
      '<strong>Set an optional break</strong> between sessions if you want one.',
      '<strong>Choose your number of sessions</strong> — do it once or repeat.',
      '<strong>Press Start</strong> and get to work on your own terms!',
    ],
    tags:['🎯 Any subject','⏱ Flexible timing','💡 Your own pace','✨ Custom routine'],
    tip:'Not sure how long to study? Try 20 minutes to start — it\'s long enough to get into flow but short enough to not feel overwhelming. You can always add more! 🌸'
  },
  'mind-map': {
    icon:'🗺️', name:'Mind Map', tagline:'Connect ideas visually', mins:20,
    what:'Mind mapping is a visual thinking tool that helps you organise information around a central concept. By drawing connections between ideas spatially, you engage both logical and creative thinking, making it easier to see the big picture and remember how concepts relate to each other.',
    steps:[
      '<strong>Write your main topic</strong> in the centre of a blank page and circle it.',
      '<strong>Draw branches outward</strong> for each major sub-topic or theme.',
      '<strong>Add smaller branches</strong> from each sub-topic for details, examples, or facts.',
      '<strong>Use colours, symbols and small drawings</strong> — your brain remembers visuals better than plain text.',
      '<strong>Review your map</strong> after completing it and add any connections between branches you notice.'
    ],
    tags:['🌱 Biology','📚 Essay planning','🔗 Seeing connections','🎨 Visual learners'],
    tip:'Don\'t stress about making it perfect — a messy, colourful mind map that\'s all yours is worth more than a neat one someone else made. Colour-code by subject or theme! 🌈'
  }
};

let currentMethodKey = null;

function openMethodPage(key) {
  const m = methodData[key];
  if (!m) return;
  currentMethodKey = key;

  document.getElementById('method-detail-icon').textContent = m.icon;
  document.getElementById('method-detail-name').textContent = m.name;
  document.getElementById('method-detail-tagline').textContent = m.tagline;
  document.getElementById('method-what-body').textContent = m.what;
  document.getElementById('method-tip').textContent = m.tip;

  const stepsList = document.getElementById('method-steps');
  stepsList.innerHTML = '';
  m.steps.forEach(s => { const li = document.createElement('li'); li.innerHTML = s; stepsList.appendChild(li); });

  const tagsEl = document.getElementById('method-tags');
  tagsEl.innerHTML = '';
  m.tags.forEach(t => { const chip = document.createElement('span'); chip.className = 'method-tag'; chip.textContent = t; tagsEl.appendChild(chip); });

  document.getElementById('method-start-btn').textContent = '▶ Start ' + m.name + ' (' + m.mins + ' min)';

  // ── Time breakdown ──
  const breakdown = document.getElementById('method-time-breakdown');
  const totalEl   = document.getElementById('method-total-time');
  breakdown.innerHTML = '';

  const nameMap = { 'Feynman': 'Feynman Technique' };
  const seqName = nameMap[m.name] || m.name;
  const seq = methodSequences[seqName];

  const chipColours = {
    'var(--pink3)':   { bg:'#FEE8F0', dot:'#D4537E' },
    'var(--blue3)':   { bg:'#EAF3FD', dot:'#378ADD' },
    'var(--purple3)': { bg:'#EDEBFB', dot:'#7F77DD' },
    'var(--amber3)':  { bg:'#FEF4E0', dot:'#BA7517' },
    'var(--green3)':  { bg:'#E6F5EB', dot:'#3B8B5C' },
  };

  let totalMins = 0;

  if (seq) {
    seq.forEach(step => {
      totalMins += step.mins;
      const c = chipColours[step.colour] || chipColours['var(--pink3)'];
      const chip = document.createElement('div');
      chip.className = 'time-chip';
      chip.style.background = c.bg;
      chip.innerHTML =
        '<div class="tc-dot" style="background:' + c.dot + '"></div>' +
        '<span class="tc-label">' + step.label.replace(/^[^\s]+\s/,'') + '</span>' +
        '<span class="tc-dur">' + step.mins + ' min</span>';
      breakdown.appendChild(chip);
    });
  } else if (m.name === 'Mind Map') {
    totalMins = 20;
    const chip = document.createElement('div');
    chip.className = 'time-chip';
    chip.style.background = chipColours['var(--pink3)'].bg;
    chip.innerHTML = '<div class="tc-dot" style="background:#D4537E"></div><span class="tc-label">Mind Map session</span><span class="tc-dur">20 min</span>';
    breakdown.appendChild(chip);
  } else {
    // Pomodoro / Spaced Repetition — 4 sessions + breaks
    const workMins  = m.mins;
    const breakMins = 5;
    const longBreak = 20;
    totalMins = (workMins * 4) + (breakMins * 3) + longBreak;
    ['Work','Work','Work','Work'].forEach((_, i) => {
      const chip = document.createElement('div');
      chip.className = 'time-chip';
      chip.style.background = chipColours['var(--pink3)'].bg;
      chip.innerHTML = '<div class="tc-dot" style="background:#D4537E"></div><span class="tc-label">Session ' + (i+1) + '</span><span class="tc-dur">' + workMins + ' min</span>';
      breakdown.appendChild(chip);
      if (i < 3) {
        const br = document.createElement('div');
        br.className = 'time-chip';
        br.style.background = chipColours['var(--blue3)'].bg;
        br.innerHTML = '<div class="tc-dot" style="background:#378ADD"></div><span class="tc-label">Short break</span><span class="tc-dur">5 min</span>';
        breakdown.appendChild(br);
      }
    });
    const lb = document.createElement('div');
    lb.className = 'time-chip';
    lb.style.background = chipColours['var(--green3)'].bg;
    lb.innerHTML = '<div class="tc-dot" style="background:#3B8B5C"></div><span class="tc-label">Long break</span><span class="tc-dur">20 min</span>';
    breakdown.appendChild(lb);
  }

  const hrs = Math.floor(totalMins / 60);
  const mins2 = totalMins % 60;
  totalEl.textContent = hrs > 0 ? hrs + 'h ' + (mins2 > 0 ? mins2 + 'm' : '') : totalMins + ' min';

  // Show method screen, hide focus screen
  document.querySelectorAll('.screen').forEach(s => s.classList.remove('active'));
  document.querySelectorAll('.tab').forEach(t => t.classList.remove('active'));
  document.getElementById('screen-method').classList.add('active');
  const tabs = document.querySelectorAll('.tab');
  if (tabs[3]) tabs[3].classList.add('active'); // Focus tab stays highlighted
  window.scrollTo(0,0);
}

function closeMethodPage() {
  document.querySelectorAll('.screen').forEach(s => s.classList.remove('active'));
  document.getElementById('screen-focus').classList.add('active');
  window.scrollTo(0,0);
}

function startMethodTimer() {
  const m = methodData[currentMethodKey];
  if (!m) return;
  closeMethodPage();
  studyMinutes = m.mins;
  isSingleSession = (m.name === 'Mind Map');
  isBreak = false; isLongBreak = false;
  currentSession = 1;

  if (methodSequences[m.name]) {
    customSequence = methodSequences[m.name];
    customStep = 0;
    const first = customSequence[0];
    totalSeconds = first.mins * 60;
    setTimerFace(first.timerLabel, first.mins, first.colour);
  } else {
    customSequence = null; customStep = 0;
    totalSeconds = m.mins * 60;
    remainingSeconds = m.mins * 60;
    const mins = m.mins.toString().padStart(2,'0');
    document.getElementById('timer-display').textContent = mins + ':00';
    document.getElementById('timer-display').style.color = 'var(--pink3)';
    document.getElementById('timer-mode-label').textContent = m.name + ' — Work Session';
    document.getElementById('timer-progress').style.width = '0%';
    document.getElementById('start-btn').textContent = '▶ Start';
  }

  updateSessionLabel();
  clearInterval(timerInterval); timerRunning = false;
  // Highlight the right card
  document.querySelectorAll('.method-card').forEach(c => c.classList.remove('selected'));
  const keyMap = {'pomodoro':0,'blurting':1,'active-recall':2,'feynman':3,'spaced-repetition':4,'mind-map':5};
  const cards = document.querySelectorAll('.method-card');
  if (cards[keyMap[currentMethodKey]]) cards[keyMap[currentMethodKey]].classList.add('selected');
  // Auto-start timer
  toggleTimer();
}

// ── Logout ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────
function confirmLogout() {
  document.getElementById('logout-modal-overlay').classList.add('open');
}

function closeLogoutModal() {
  document.getElementById('logout-modal-overlay').classList.remove('open');
}

function logOut() {
  closeLogoutModal();
  // Fade out the whole app
  document.querySelector('nav').style.transition = 'opacity .3s ease';
  document.querySelector('nav').style.opacity = '0';
  document.querySelectorAll('.screen,.mobile-nav').forEach(el => {
    el.style.transition = 'opacity .3s ease';
    el.style.opacity = '0';
  });
  setTimeout(() => {
    // Reset auth form fields
    ['si-email','si-password','su-name','su-email','su-password','su-confirm'].forEach(id => {
      const el = document.getElementById(id); if (el) el.value = '';
    });
    document.getElementById('su-year').selectedIndex = 0;
    document.getElementById('si-error').textContent = '';
    document.getElementById('su-error').textContent = '';
    // Reset PIN boxes
    ['lpin1','lpin2','lpin3','lpin4'].forEach(id => {
      const el = document.getElementById(id); if (el) el.value = '';
    });
    document.getElementById('lock-error').textContent = '';
    // Hide lock, hide app, show auth
    document.getElementById('lock-screen').style.display = 'none';
    document.querySelector('nav').style.opacity = '1';
    document.querySelectorAll('.screen,.mobile-nav').forEach(el => el.style.opacity = '1');
    // Show auth page with fade-in
    const auth = document.getElementById('auth-page');
    auth.style.opacity = '0';
    auth.style.transform = 'translateY(0)';
    auth.style.transition = 'opacity .4s ease';
    auth.style.display = 'flex';
    requestAnimationFrame(() => { auth.style.opacity = '1'; });
    // Switch back to sign-in tab
    const tabs = document.querySelectorAll('.auth-tab');
    if (tabs[0]) { tabs[0].classList.add('active'); tabs[1].classList.remove('active'); }
    document.getElementById('auth-signin').style.display = '';
    document.getElementById('auth-signup').style.display = 'none';
    setTimeout(() => { const e = document.getElementById('si-email'); if (e) e.focus(); }, 300);
  }, 350);
}

// ── Auth (sign-in / sign-up) ───────────────────────────────────
function switchAuthTab(tab, btn) {
  document.querySelectorAll('.auth-tab').forEach(t => t.classList.remove('active'));
  btn.classList.add('active');
  document.getElementById('auth-signin').style.display = tab === 'signin' ? '' : 'none';
  document.getElementById('auth-signup').style.display = tab === 'signup' ? '' : 'none';
  document.getElementById('si-error').textContent = '';
  document.getElementById('su-error').textContent = '';
}

function checkStrength(pw) {
  const fill  = document.getElementById('strength-fill');
  const label = document.getElementById('strength-label');
  if (!pw) { fill.style.width='0%'; label.textContent=''; return; }
  let score = 0;
  if (pw.length >= 8)              score++;
  if (/[A-Z]/.test(pw))           score++;
  if (/[0-9]/.test(pw))           score++;
  if (/[^A-Za-z0-9]/.test(pw))    score++;
  const levels = [
    { w:'20%', c:'#E24B4A',        l:'Weak'   },
    { w:'45%', c:'var(--amber3)',   l:'Fair'   },
    { w:'70%', c:'var(--blue3)',    l:'Good'   },
    { w:'100%',c:'var(--green3)',   l:'Strong' },
  ];
  const lv = levels[Math.min(score, 3)];
  fill.style.width      = lv.w;
  fill.style.background = lv.c;
  label.textContent     = lv.l;
  label.style.color     = lv.c;
}

function signIn() {
  const email = document.getElementById('si-email').value.trim().toLowerCase();
  const pass  = document.getElementById('si-password').value;
  const err   = document.getElementById('si-error');
  const emailRe = /^[^\s@]+@[^\s@]+\.[^\s@]+$/;
  if (!emailRe.test(email)) { err.textContent = 'Please enter a valid email address.'; return; }
  if (!pass)                 { err.textContent = 'Please enter your password.'; return; }

  if (!STORE.userExists(email)) {
    err.textContent = 'No account found for this email. Please sign up first.'; return;
  }
  if (!STORE.checkPassword(email, hashPass(pass))) {
    err.textContent = 'Incorrect password — please try again.'; return;
  }

  err.textContent = '';
  currentUserEmail = email;
  // Load this user's saved PIN into the lock screen
  const userPin = STORE.load('savedPin', '1234');
  savedPin = userPin;
  proceedToLock();
}

function signUp() {
  const name    = document.getElementById('su-name').value.trim();
  const email   = document.getElementById('su-email').value.trim().toLowerCase();
  const pass    = document.getElementById('su-password').value;
  const confirm = document.getElementById('su-confirm').value;
  const year    = document.getElementById('su-year').value;
  const err     = document.getElementById('su-error');
  const emailRe = /^[^\s@]+@[^\s@]+\.[^\s@]+$/;
  if (!name)                { err.textContent = 'Please enter your name.'; return; }
  if (!emailRe.test(email)) { err.textContent = 'Please enter a valid email address.'; return; }
  if (pass.length < 6)      { err.textContent = 'Password must be at least 6 characters.'; return; }
  if (pass !== confirm)     { err.textContent = "Passwords don't match — please try again."; return; }
  if (STORE.userExists(email)) { err.textContent = 'An account already exists for this email. Please sign in.'; return; }

  err.textContent = '';
  // Register new user
  STORE.saveUser(email, hashPass(pass), name, year);
  currentUserEmail = email;

  // Set up their initial profile in storage
  STORE.save('profile', {
    name, year: (year || 'Year 10') + ' · CareCloud since ' + new Date().getFullYear(),
    email, emoji: '🐻',
  });

  // Pre-fill profile UI
  document.getElementById('profile-name').textContent = name;
  if (year) document.getElementById('profile-year').textContent = year + ' · CareCloud since ' + new Date().getFullYear();
  document.getElementById('email-display').textContent = email;
  const greeting = document.querySelector('.greeting h1');
  if (greeting) greeting.textContent = 'Good morning, ' + name.split(' ')[0] + '! ☀️';

  savedPin = '1234'; // default PIN for new users
  proceedToLock();
}

function guestAccess() {
  currentUserEmail = 'guest';
  savedPin = '1234';
  proceedToLock();
}

function showForgot() {
  const err   = document.getElementById('si-error');
  const email = document.getElementById('si-email').value.trim();
  if (email) {
    err.style.color = 'var(--green3)';
    err.textContent = '✅ Reset link sent to ' + email + ' (demo)';
    setTimeout(() => { err.style.color = ''; err.textContent = ''; }, 3000);
  } else {
    err.textContent = 'Enter your email first, then tap Forgot password.';
  }
}

function proceedToLock() {
  const auth = document.getElementById('auth-page');
  auth.style.transition = 'opacity .4s ease, transform .4s ease';
  auth.style.opacity    = '0';
  auth.style.transform  = 'translateY(-12px)';
  setTimeout(() => {
    auth.style.display = 'none';
    const ls = document.getElementById('lock-screen');
    ls.style.display = 'flex';
    setTimeout(() => document.getElementById('lpin1').focus(), 150);
  }, 420);
}

function lockPinMove(el, nextId) {
  if (!/^[0-9]$/.test(el.value)) { el.value = ''; return; }
  if (nextId) document.getElementById(nextId).focus();
  if (el.id === 'lpin4') submitLockPin();
}

function submitLockPin() {
  const entered = ['lpin1','lpin2','lpin3','lpin4'].map(id => document.getElementById(id).value).join('');
  if (entered.length < 4) {
    document.getElementById('lock-error').textContent = 'Please enter all 4 digits.';
    return;
  }
  if (entered === savedPin) {
    unlockApp();
  } else {
    document.getElementById('lock-error').textContent = 'Incorrect PIN — try again.';
    ['lpin1','lpin2','lpin3','lpin4'].forEach(id => document.getElementById(id).value = '');
    document.getElementById('lpin1').focus();
    const row = document.getElementById('lock-pin-row');
    row.style.animation = 'shake .35s ease';
    setTimeout(() => row.style.animation = '', 400);
  }
}

function unlockApp() {
  const ls = document.getElementById('lock-screen');
  ls.style.transition = 'opacity .4s ease, transform .4s ease';
  ls.style.opacity = '0';
  ls.style.transform = 'scale(1.04)';
  setTimeout(() => {
    ls.style.display = 'none';
    // Load this user's data now that they're authenticated
    loadAll();
    renderAll();
    renderNotes();
  }, 420);
}

function skipLock() { unlockApp(); }

// Auto-focus first pin box on load
document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', () => {
  renderAll();      // render with default data first
  renderNotes();
  setTimeout(() => {
    const firstInput = document.getElementById('si-email');
    if (firstInput) firstInput.focus();
  }, 200);
  ['custom-focus','custom-break'].forEach(id => {
    const el = document.getElementById(id);
    if (el) el.addEventListener('input', updateCustomPreview);
  });
  // Auto-save when tab is hidden or closed
  document.addEventListener('visibilitychange', () => { if (document.hidden) saveAll(); });
  window.addEventListener('beforeunload', saveAll);
});

// ── Method card tap detection ──────────────────────────────────
(function() {
  const DOUBLE_TAP_MS = 300;
  let lastTap = 0;
  let lastCard = null;
  let tapTimer = null;

  function handleMethodTap(card) {
    const key  = card.dataset.key;
    const name = card.querySelector('.method-name').textContent;
    const desc = card.querySelector('.method-desc').textContent;
    const now  = Date.now();

    // Build a minimal mins value from methodData if available
    const mdEntry = Object.values(methodData).find(m => {
      const keyMap = {'pomodoro':'Pomodoro','blurting':'Blurting','active-recall':'Active Recall',
                      'feynman':'Feynman Technique','spaced-repetition':'Spaced Repetition','mind-map':'Mind Map'};
      return m.name === (keyMap[key] || name);
    });
    const mins = mdEntry ? mdEntry.mins : 25;

    if (lastCard === card && (now - lastTap) < DOUBLE_TAP_MS) {
      // Double tap → open info page
      clearTimeout(tapTimer);
      lastTap = 0; lastCard = null;
      openMethodPage(key);
    } else {
      // Potential single tap — wait to see if double arrives
      lastTap = now;
      lastCard = card;
      clearTimeout(tapTimer);
      tapTimer = setTimeout(() => {
        // Single tap confirmed → select method
        selectMethod(card, name, mins);
        lastTap = 0; lastCard = null;
      }, DOUBLE_TAP_MS);
    }
  }

  document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', () => {
    document.querySelectorAll('.method-card').forEach(card => {
      // Mouse: use dblclick + click
      let clickTimer = null;
      card.addEventListener('click', e => {
        if (clickTimer) {
          clearTimeout(clickTimer);
          clickTimer = null;
          openMethodPage(card.dataset.key);
        } else {
          clickTimer = setTimeout(() => {
            clickTimer = null;
            if (card.dataset.key === 'custom') { openCustomTimer(); return; }
            const name = card.querySelector('.method-name').textContent;
            const keyMap = {'pomodoro':'Pomodoro','blurting':'Blurting','active-recall':'Active Recall',
                            'feynman':'Feynman Technique','custom':'Custom Timer','mind-map':'Mind Map'};
            const mdEntry = Object.values(methodData).find(m => m.name === (keyMap[card.dataset.key] || name));
            selectMethod(card, name, mdEntry ? mdEntry.mins : 25);
          }, DOUBLE_TAP_MS);
        }
      });

      // Touch: manual double-tap
      let lastTouch = 0;
      card.addEventListener('touchend', e => {
        e.preventDefault();
        const now = Date.now();
        if (now - lastTouch < DOUBLE_TAP_MS) {
          openMethodPage(card.dataset.key);
          lastTouch = 0;
        } else {
          lastTouch = now;
          setTimeout(() => {
            if (Date.now() - lastTouch >= DOUBLE_TAP_MS - 10) {
              if (card.dataset.key === 'custom') { openCustomTimer(); return; }
              const name = card.querySelector('.method-name').textContent;
              const keyMap = {'pomodoro':'Pomodoro','blurting':'Blurting','active-recall':'Active Recall',
                              'feynman':'Feynman Technique','custom':'Custom Timer','mind-map':'Mind Map'};
              const mdEntry = Object.values(methodData).find(m => m.name === (keyMap[card.dataset.key] || name));
              selectMethod(card, name, mdEntry ? mdEntry.mins : 25);
            }
          }, DOUBLE_TAP_MS);
        }
      });
    });
  });
})();
const pastDayActivity = {
  'Mon': {
    mood: { emoji:'😊', label:'Happy' },
    reflection: { q1:'Finished all my Biology reading and it clicked!', q2:'Algebra was harder than expected.', q3:'Listening to lo-fi while studying helped a lot.' },
    focus: [
      { method:'🍅 Pomodoro', duration:'25 min', subject:'Biology', time:'9:00 AM' },
      { method:'🧠 Active Recall', duration:'20 min', subject:'Math', time:'11:30 AM' },
    ],
    tasks: [
      { label:'Read Chapter 2 — Biology',  subject:'Biology',  time:'9:15 AM' },
      { label:'Algebra practice set',       subject:'Math',     time:'11:00 AM' },
      { label:'Vocab flashcards — Spanish', subject:'Spanish',  time:'2:30 PM' },
      { label:'History essay draft',        subject:'History',  time:'4:00 PM' },
    ],
  },
  'Tue': {
    mood: { emoji:'🥰', label:'Motivated' },
    reflection: { q1:'Got through 5 tasks — felt really productive!', q2:'Chemistry formulas are still tricky.', q3:'Had a nice study break with friends.' },
    focus: [
      { method:'✏️ Blurting', duration:'15 min', subject:'Biology', time:'8:30 AM' },
      { method:'🍅 Pomodoro', duration:'25 min', subject:'English', time:'1:00 PM' },
      { method:'🔁 Active Recall', duration:'20 min', subject:'Chemistry', time:'6:30 PM' },
    ],
    tasks: [
      { label:'Biology lab report',         subject:'Biology',   time:'8:45 AM' },
      { label:'Geometry problem sheet',     subject:'Math',      time:'10:30 AM' },
      { label:'English comprehension',      subject:'English',   time:'1:15 PM' },
      { label:'Art project brainstorm',     subject:'Art',       time:'5:00 PM' },
      { label:'Chemistry formulas review',  subject:'Chemistry', time:'7:00 PM' },
    ],
  },
  'Wed': {
    mood: { emoji:'😌', label:'Calm' },
    reflection: { q1:'Steady and consistent today.', q2:'Feeling a bit tired by the afternoon.', q3:'Nice walk after studying helped clear my head.' },
    focus: [
      { method:'🗺️ Mind Map', duration:'20 min', subject:'Biology', time:'9:00 AM' },
      { method:'🍅 Pomodoro', duration:'25 min', subject:'History', time:'3:00 PM' },
    ],
    tasks: [
      { label:'Read Chapter 3 — Biology',  subject:'Biology',  time:'9:00 AM' },
      { label:'Math practice problems',    subject:'Math',     time:'11:30 AM' },
      { label:'History notes review',      subject:'History',  time:'3:00 PM' },
    ],
  },
  'Thu': null,
  'Fri': null, 'Sat': null, 'Sun': null,
};

const dayFullNames = { Mon:'Monday', Tue:'Tuesday', Wed:'Wednesday', Thu:'Thursday', Fri:'Friday', Sat:'Saturday', Sun:'Sunday' };
const tagColorMap  = { Biology:'tag-pink', Math:'tag-blue', English:'tag-purple', Chemistry:'tag-amber', History:'tag-blue', Art:'tag-purple', Spanish:'tag-purple' };
const moodColors   = { Happy:'var(--green)', Calm:'var(--blue3)', Motivated:'var(--pink3)', Tired:'var(--amber3)', Stressed:'var(--red,#E24B4A)', Anxious:'var(--purple3)' };

function openDayDrawer(dotEl) {
  const day      = dotEl.dataset.day;
  const isToday  = dotEl.classList.contains('today');
  const isMissed = dotEl.classList.contains('missed');
  const fullName = dayFullNames[day] || day;

  document.getElementById('drawer-title').textContent = fullName;
  const body = document.getElementById('drawer-body');
  body.innerHTML = '';

  // ── Missed / no data ──
  if (isMissed) {
    document.getElementById('drawer-sub').textContent = 'No activity yet';
    body.innerHTML = '<div class="day-drawer-empty"><span>🌙</span>No study session logged for this day.</div>';
    document.getElementById('day-drawer-overlay').classList.add('open');
    document.getElementById('day-drawer').classList.add('open');
    return;
  }

  // ── Today — pull live data ──
  if (isToday) {
    const doneTodayTasks = tasks.filter(t => t.done);
    const activeMoodEl  = document.querySelector('.mood-btn.active');
    const moodLabel     = activeMoodEl ? activeMoodEl.textContent.trim() : null;
    const totalItems    = doneTodayTasks.length;
    document.getElementById('drawer-sub').textContent = totalItems + ' task' + (totalItems !== 1 ? 's' : '') + ' completed · Today';

    // Mood
    if (moodLabel) {
      body.appendChild(makeDaySection('😊 Today\'s mood', `
        <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;padding:8px 0">
          <span style="font-size:28px">${moodLabel.split(' ')[0]}</span>
          <span style="font-size:14px;font-weight:600;color:var(--text)">${moodLabel}</span>
        </div>`));
    }

    // Tasks
    if (doneTodayTasks.length > 0) {
      body.appendChild(makeDaySection('✅ Completed tasks',
        doneTodayTasks.map(t =>
          `<div class="drawer-task-row"><div class="drawer-check">✓</div><div class="drawer-task-label">${t.label}</div><span class="task-tag ${tagColorMap[t.subject]||'tag-pink'}" style="flex-shrink:0">${t.subject}</span></div>`
        ).join('')
      ));
    } else {
      body.appendChild(makeDaySection('✅ Completed tasks', '<div style="font-size:13px;color:var(--text3);padding:8px 0">No tasks completed yet today.</div>'));
    }

    document.getElementById('day-drawer-overlay').classList.add('open');
    document.getElementById('day-drawer').classList.add('open');
    return;
  }

  // ── Past day — pull rich activity data ──
  const activity = pastDayActivity[day];
  if (!activity) {
    document.getElementById('drawer-sub').textContent = 'No activity logged';
    body.innerHTML = '<div class="day-drawer-empty"><span>🌸</span>No activity logged for this day.</div>';
    document.getElementById('day-drawer-overlay').classList.add('open');
    document.getElementById('day-drawer').classList.add('open');
    return;
  }

  const totalTasks  = activity.tasks ? activity.tasks.length : 0;
  const totalFocus  = activity.focus ? activity.focus.length : 0;
  document.getElementById('drawer-sub').textContent = totalTasks + ' tasks · ' + totalFocus + ' focus session' + (totalFocus !== 1 ? 's' : '');

  // Mood + reflection
  if (activity.mood) {
    const r  = activity.reflection || {};
    const moodColour = moodColors[activity.mood.label] || 'var(--pink3)';
    let reflHTML = `
      <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;padding:6px 0 12px;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);margin-bottom:12px">
        <span style="font-size:28px">${activity.mood.emoji}</span>
        <span style="font-size:14px;font-weight:700;color:var(--text)">${activity.mood.label}</span>
      </div>`;
    if (r.q1) reflHTML += `<div class="day-refl-row"><div class="day-refl-q">✨ What went well?</div><div class="day-refl-a">${r.q1}</div></div>`;
    if (r.q2) reflHTML += `<div class="day-refl-row"><div class="day-refl-q">💭 What challenged you?</div><div class="day-refl-a">${r.q2}</div></div>`;
    if (r.q3) reflHTML += `<div class="day-refl-row"><div class="day-refl-q">🌸 What made you happy?</div><div class="day-refl-a">${r.q3}</div></div>`;
    body.appendChild(makeDaySection('🌸 Mood & reflection', reflHTML));
  }

  // Focus sessions
  if (activity.focus && activity.focus.length > 0) {
    const focusHTML = activity.focus.map(f => `
      <div class="drawer-task-row">
        <div style="font-size:18px;flex-shrink:0">${f.method.split(' ')[0]}</div>
        <div style="flex:1">
          <div style="font-size:13px;font-weight:600;color:var(--text)">${f.method.substring(f.method.indexOf(' ')+1)}</div>
          <div style="font-size:11px;color:var(--text3)">${f.subject} · ${f.duration}</div>
        </div>
        <div class="drawer-task-time">${f.time}</div>
      </div>`).join('');
    body.appendChild(makeDaySection('⏱ Focus sessions', focusHTML));
  }

  // Completed tasks
  if (activity.tasks && activity.tasks.length > 0) {
    const tasksHTML = activity.tasks.map(t => `
      <div class="drawer-task-row">
        <div class="drawer-check">✓</div>
        <div class="drawer-task-label">${t.label}</div>
        <span class="task-tag ${tagColorMap[t.subject]||'tag-pink'}" style="flex-shrink:0">${t.subject}</span>
        <div class="drawer-task-time">${t.time}</div>
      </div>`).join('');
    body.appendChild(makeDaySection('✅ Completed tasks', tasksHTML));
  }

  document.getElementById('day-drawer-overlay').classList.add('open');
  document.getElementById('day-drawer').classList.add('open');
}

function makeDaySection(title, contentHTML) {
  const sec = document.createElement('div');
  sec.className = 'day-activity-section';
  sec.innerHTML = `<div class="day-activity-title">${title}</div><div class="day-activity-body">${contentHTML}</div>`;
  return sec;
}

function closeDayDrawer() {
  document.getElementById('day-drawer-overlay').classList.remove('open');
  document.getElementById('day-drawer').classList.remove('open');
}

// ── Custom timer ───────────────────────────────────────────────
let customSessions = 4;

function openCustomTimer() {
  updateCustomPreview();
  document.getElementById('custom-timer-overlay').classList.add('open');
}
function closeCustomTimer() {
  document.getElementById('custom-timer-overlay').classList.remove('open');
}

function selectSessions(btn, n) {
  document.querySelectorAll('.session-pill').forEach(p => p.classList.remove('active'));
  btn.classList.add('active');
  customSessions = n;
  updateCustomPreview();
}

function updateCustomPreview() {
  const focus = parseInt(document.getElementById('custom-focus').value) || 25;
  const brk   = parseInt(document.getElementById('custom-break').value) || 0;
  const sess  = customSessions;
  const total = (focus * sess) + (brk * Math.max(0, sess - 1));
  const hrs   = Math.floor(total / 60);
  const mins  = total % 60;
  const totalStr = hrs > 0 ? hrs + 'h ' + (mins > 0 ? mins + 'm' : '') : total + ' min';
  let desc = sess + ' × ' + focus + ' min focus';
  if (brk > 0) desc += ' + ' + brk + ' min break between sessions';
  desc += '<br>⏱ <strong>Total: ' + totalStr + '</strong>';
  document.getElementById('custom-preview').innerHTML = desc;
}

function startCustomTimer() {
  const focus = parseInt(document.getElementById('custom-focus').value) || 25;
  const brk   = parseInt(document.getElementById('custom-break').value) || 0;
  const sess  = customSessions;
  closeCustomTimer();
  const seq = [];
  for (let i = 0; i < sess; i++) {
    seq.push({ label: '⚙️ Session ' + (i + 1) + ' of ' + sess,
               timerLabel: '⚙️ Custom Focus — Session ' + (i + 1) + ' of ' + sess,
               mins: focus, colour: 'var(--pink3)' });
    if (brk > 0 && i < sess - 1) {
      seq.push({ label: '☁️ Break',
                 timerLabel: '☁️ Break — breathe & stretch!',
                 mins: brk, colour: 'var(--blue3)' });
    }
  }
  customSequence = seq; customStep = 0;
  isSingleSession = false; isBreak = false; isLongBreak = false;
  studyMinutes = focus;
  const first = seq[0];
  totalSeconds = first.mins * 60;
  setTimerFace(first.timerLabel, first.mins, first.colour);
  updateSessionLabel();
  document.querySelectorAll('.method-card').forEach(c => c.classList.remove('selected'));
  const card = document.querySelector('[data-key="custom"]');
  if (card) card.classList.add('selected');
  clearInterval(timerInterval); timerRunning = false;
