  toggleTimer();
}

// ── Email modal ────────────────────────────────────────────────
function openEmailModal() {
  document.getElementById('email-current').value = '';
  document.getElementById('email-new').value = '';
  document.getElementById('email-confirm').value = '';
  document.getElementById('email-error').textContent = '';
  document.getElementById('email-modal-overlay').classList.add('open');
  setTimeout(() => document.getElementById('email-current').focus(), 100);
}
function closeEmailModal() {
  document.getElementById('email-modal-overlay').classList.remove('open');
}
function saveEmail() {
  const cur     = document.getElementById('email-current').value.trim();
  const next    = document.getElementById('email-new').value.trim();
  const confirm = document.getElementById('email-confirm').value.trim();
  const err     = document.getElementById('email-error');
  const emailRe = /^[^\s@]+@[^\s@]+\.[^\s@]+$/;
  if (!cur)                      { err.textContent = 'Please enter your current email.'; return; }
  if (!emailRe.test(next))       { err.textContent = 'Please enter a valid new email.'; return; }
  if (next !== confirm)          { err.textContent = 'Emails don\'t match — please try again.'; return; }
  err.textContent = '';
  document.getElementById('email-display').textContent = next;
  const btn = document.querySelector('#email-modal-overlay .btn-pink');
  btn.textContent = '✅ Saved!';
  setTimeout(() => { btn.textContent = 'Save email'; closeEmailModal(); }, 900);
}

// ── Passcode modal ─────────────────────────────────────────────
let savedPin = '1234';
function openPasscodeModal() {
  ['pin1','pin2','pin3','pin4','pin5','pin6','pin7','pin8'].forEach(id => {
    const el = document.getElementById(id); if (el) el.value = '';
  });
  document.getElementById('pin-error').textContent = '';
  document.getElementById('pin-row-confirm').style.display = 'none';
  document.getElementById('pin-confirm-hint').style.display = 'none';
  document.getElementById('pin-hint').textContent = 'Enter new PIN';
  document.getElementById('passcode-modal-overlay').classList.add('open');
  setTimeout(() => document.getElementById('pin1').focus(), 100);
}
function closePasscodeModal() {
  document.getElementById('passcode-modal-overlay').classList.remove('open');
}
function pinMove(el, nextId) {
  if (!/^[0-9]$/.test(el.value)) { el.value = ''; return; }
  if (nextId) document.getElementById(nextId).focus();
  if (el.id === 'pin4') {
    // First PIN complete — show confirm row
    const p1 = ['pin1','pin2','pin3','pin4'].map(id => document.getElementById(id).value).join('');
    if (p1.length === 4) {
      document.getElementById('pin-row-confirm').style.display = 'flex';
      document.getElementById('pin-confirm-hint').style.display = 'block';
      setTimeout(() => document.getElementById('pin5').focus(), 50);
    }
  }
}
function pinBack(e, prevId) {
  if (e.key === 'Backspace' && !e.target.value) document.getElementById(prevId).focus();
}
function confirmPinDone() {
  const p1 = ['pin1','pin2','pin3','pin4'].map(id => document.getElementById(id).value).join('');
  const p2 = ['pin5','pin6','pin7','pin8'].map(id => document.getElementById(id).value).join('');
  if (p2.length < 4) return;
  const err = document.getElementById('pin-error');
  if (p1 !== p2) {
    err.textContent = 'PINs don\'t match — please try again.';
    ['pin5','pin6','pin7','pin8'].forEach(id => document.getElementById(id).value = '');
    document.getElementById('pin5').focus();
    return;
  }
  err.textContent = '';
}
function savePasscode() {
  const p1 = ['pin1','pin2','pin3','pin4'].map(id => document.getElementById(id).value).join('');
  const p2 = ['pin5','pin6','pin7','pin8'].map(id => document.getElementById(id).value).join('');
  const err = document.getElementById('pin-error');
  if (p1.length < 4) { err.textContent = 'Please enter a 4-digit PIN.'; return; }
  if (p2.length < 4) { err.textContent = 'Please confirm your PIN.'; return; }
  if (p1 !== p2)     { err.textContent = 'PINs don\'t match — please try again.'; return; }
  savedPin = p1;
  document.getElementById('passcode-display').textContent = '4-digit PIN set ✓';
  saveAll();
  const btn = document.getElementById('pin-save-btn');
  btn.textContent = '✅ Passcode saved!';
  setTimeout(() => { btn.textContent = 'Set passcode'; closePasscodeModal(); }, 900);
}
let editGoals = ['🎯 Get into uni', '📚 Study every day'];
let epGoals   = [];

// ── Edit Profile screen ────────────────────────────────────────
function showEditProfileScreen() {
  document.getElementById('ep-name').value = document.getElementById('profile-name').textContent;
  const yearText = document.getElementById('profile-year').textContent.split('·')[0].trim();
  const sel = document.getElementById('ep-year');
  for (let o of sel.options) { if (o.value === yearText) { o.selected = true; break; } }
  document.getElementById('ep-avatar-preview').textContent = document.getElementById('avatar-circle').textContent;
  epGoals = [...editGoals];
  renderEpGoals();
  document.getElementById('ep-saved-msg').textContent = '';
  document.querySelectorAll('.screen').forEach(s => s.classList.remove('active'));
  document.querySelectorAll('.tab').forEach(t => t.classList.remove('active'));
  document.getElementById('screen-edit-profile').classList.add('active');
  const tabs = document.querySelectorAll('.tab');
  if (tabs[6]) tabs[6].classList.add('active');
  window.scrollTo(0, 0);
  setTimeout(() => document.getElementById('ep-name').focus(), 100);
}

function closeEditProfileScreen() {
  document.querySelectorAll('.screen').forEach(s => s.classList.remove('active'));
  document.getElementById('screen-profile').classList.add('active');
  document.querySelectorAll('.tab').forEach(t => t.classList.remove('active'));
  const tabs = document.querySelectorAll('.tab');
  if (tabs[6]) tabs[6].classList.add('active');
  window.scrollTo(0, 0);
}

function renderEpGoals() {
  const list = document.getElementById('ep-goals-list');
  list.innerHTML = '';
  epGoals.forEach((g, i) => {
    const chip = document.createElement('span');
    chip.className = 'goal-chip';
    chip.innerHTML = g + ' <span class="remove-goal" onclick="removeEpGoal(' + i + ')">✕</span>';
    list.appendChild(chip);
  });
}

function addEpGoal() {
  const input = document.getElementById('ep-goal-input');
  const val = input.value.trim();
  if (!val) return;
  epGoals.push(val);
  input.value = '';
  renderEpGoals();
}

function removeEpGoal(i) {
  epGoals.splice(i, 1);
  renderEpGoals();
}

// Stubs kept for any lingering references
function openEditModal()  { showEditProfileScreen(); }
function closeEditModal() { closeEditProfileScreen(); }
function addGoalChip()    { addEpGoal(); }
function removeGoal(i)    { removeEpGoal(i); }
function saveProfile()    { saveEditProfileScreen(); }

// ── Subject management ─────────────────────────────────────────
let userSubjects = ['Biology','Math','English','Chemistry','History','Art'];

const subjectEmojis = {
  Biology:'🌿',Math:'📐',English:'📖',Chemistry:'🧪',History:'🏛',Art:'🎨',
  Physics:'⚛️',Geography:'🌍',Music:'🎵',Economics:'📊',Languages:'🗣',
  Drama:'🎭',PE:'🏃',Psychology:'🧠',
};

function toggleSubject(btn) {
  btn.classList.toggle('active');
}

function addCustomSubject() {
  const input = document.getElementById('ep-custom-subject');
  const name  = input.value.trim();
  if (!name) return;
  const presets = document.getElementById('ep-subject-presets');
  // Check not already there
  if ([...presets.querySelectorAll('.subject-toggle')].some(b => b.dataset.subject.toLowerCase() === name.toLowerCase())) {
    input.value = ''; return;
  }
  const btn = document.createElement('button');
  btn.className = 'subject-toggle active';
  btn.dataset.subject = name;
  btn.textContent = name;
  btn.onclick = function() { toggleSubject(this); };
  presets.appendChild(btn);
  input.value = '';
}

function saveEditProfileScreen() {
  const name = document.getElementById('ep-name').value.trim() || 'Student';
  const year = document.getElementById('ep-year').value;

  // Collect active subjects
  const activeSubjects = [...document.querySelectorAll('#ep-subject-presets .subject-toggle.active')]
    .map(b => b.dataset.subject);
  userSubjects = activeSubjects.length > 0 ? activeSubjects : ['General'];

  // Update task subject dropdown
  const taskSel = document.getElementById('new-task-subject');
  if (taskSel) {
    taskSel.innerHTML = userSubjects.map(s => '<option>' + s + '</option>').join('');
  }

  // Update note subject dropdown
  const noteSel = document.getElementById('note-subject-select');
  if (noteSel) {
    noteSel.innerHTML = userSubjects.map(s => '<option>' + s + '</option>').join('') + '<option>Other</option>';
  }

  // Update notes filter bar
  const filterRow = document.getElementById('notes-filter-row');
  if (filterRow) {
    filterRow.innerHTML = '<button class="notes-filter active" onclick="filterNotes(\'all\',this)">All</button>' +
      userSubjects.map(s => {
        const em = subjectEmojis[s] || '📚';
        return '<button class="notes-filter" onclick="filterNotes(\'' + s + '\',this)">' + em + ' ' + s + '</button>';
      }).join('');
  }

  // Update profile header
  document.getElementById('profile-name').textContent = name;
  document.getElementById('profile-year').textContent = year + ' · CareCloud since Jan 2026';
  const greeting = document.querySelector('.greeting h1');
  if (greeting) {
    const firstName = name.split(' ')[0];
    const hour = new Date().getHours();
    const tod = hour < 12 ? 'morning' : hour < 17 ? 'afternoon' : 'evening';
    greeting.textContent = 'Good ' + tod + ', ' + firstName + '! ☀️';
  }

  // Update goals
  editGoals = [...epGoals];
  const display = document.getElementById('goals-display');
  display.innerHTML = '';
  editGoals.forEach(g => {
    const chip = document.createElement('span'); chip.className = 'goal-chip'; chip.textContent = g;
    display.appendChild(chip);
  });

  const msg = document.getElementById('ep-saved-msg');
  msg.textContent = '✅ Profile saved!';
  saveAll();
  setTimeout(() => closeEditProfileScreen(), 900);
}

// ── History calendar ───────────────────────────────────────────
// Activity data keyed by YYYY-MM-DD
const calendarActivity = {
  '2026-05-19': { tasks:3, focus:2, mood:'😊', streak:false,
    items:[ {type:'streak',label:'Streak started!',sub:'Day 1 — great start 🌸',time:'All day'},
            {type:'focus', label:'Mind Map — 20 min',sub:'Focus · Biology',time:'3:15 PM'},
            {type:'task',  label:'Art project brainstorm',sub:'Task · Art',time:'6:00 PM'} ] },
  '2026-05-20': { tasks:4, focus:3, mood:'😌', streak:true,
    items:[ {type:'streak',label:'2-day streak!',sub:'Keep it up 🌟',time:'All day'},
            {type:'focus', label:'Active Recall — 20 min',sub:'Focus · Chemistry',time:'4:00 PM'},
            {type:'task',  label:'History notes review',sub:'Task · History',time:'5:20 PM'},
            {type:'reflect',label:'Reflection — 🥰 Motivated',sub:'Mood: Motivated',time:'8:30 PM'} ] },
  '2026-05-21': { tasks:4, focus:2, mood:'😊', streak:true,
    items:[ {type:'streak',label:'3-day streak!',sub:'Amazing focus 🔥',time:'All day'},
            {type:'focus', label:'Blurting — 15 min',sub:'Focus · Biology',time:'8:30 AM'},
            {type:'task',  label:'Read Chapter 2 — Biology',sub:'Task · Biology',time:'9:15 AM'},
            {type:'task',  label:'Algebra practice set',sub:'Task · Math',time:'11:00 AM'},
            {type:'reflect',label:'Reflection — 😊 Happy',sub:'Mood: Happy',time:'9:00 PM'} ] },
  '2026-05-22': { tasks:5, focus:2, mood:'🥰', streak:true,
    items:[ {type:'focus', label:'Pomodoro — 25 min',sub:'Focus · English',time:'1:00 PM'},
            {type:'task',  label:'Biology lab report',sub:'Task · Biology',time:'8:45 AM'},
            {type:'task',  label:'English comprehension',sub:'Task · English',time:'1:15 PM'},
            {type:'task',  label:'Art project brainstorm',sub:'Task · Art',time:'5:00 PM'},
            {type:'reflect',label:'Reflection — 🥰 Motivated',sub:'Mood: Motivated',time:'8:00 PM'} ] },
  '2026-05-23': { tasks:3, focus:2, mood:'😌', streak:true,
    items:[ {type:'focus', label:'Mind Map — 20 min',sub:'Focus · Biology',time:'9:00 AM'},
            {type:'task',  label:'Read Chapter 3 — Biology',sub:'Task · Biology',time:'9:00 AM'},
            {type:'task',  label:'Math practice problems',sub:'Task · Math',time:'11:30 AM'},
            {type:'reflect',label:'Reflection — 😌 Calm',sub:'Mood: Calm',time:'7:00 PM'} ] },
};

let historyYear  = 2026;
let historyMonth = 4; // 0-indexed = May

function buildHistoryCalendar() {
  const grid  = document.getElementById('history-cal-grid');
  const label = document.getElementById('history-month-label');
  if (!grid || !label) return;

  const monthNames = ['January','February','March','April','May','June','July','August','September','October','November','December'];
  label.textContent = monthNames[historyMonth] + ' ' + historyYear;
  grid.innerHTML = '';

  const today    = new Date(2026, 4, 23); // Thu 23 May 2026
  const firstDay = new Date(historyYear, historyMonth, 1).getDay();
  const daysInMonth = new Date(historyYear, historyMonth + 1, 0).getDate();
  const prevDays    = new Date(historyYear, historyMonth, 0).getDate();

  // Prev month padding
  for (let i = firstDay - 1; i >= 0; i--) {
    const d = document.createElement('div');
    d.className = 'hist-cal-day other-month';
    d.textContent = prevDays - i;
    grid.appendChild(d);
  }

  // Current month days
  for (let day = 1; day <= daysInMonth; day++) {
    const dateKey = `${historyYear}-${String(historyMonth+1).padStart(2,'0')}-${String(day).padStart(2,'0')}`;
    const act     = calendarActivity[dateKey];
    const isToday = (historyYear === 2026 && historyMonth === 4 && day === 23);
    const isFuture = new Date(historyYear, historyMonth, day) > today;

    const d = document.createElement('div');
    d.textContent = day;

    if (isToday) {
      d.className = 'hist-cal-day today-day';
    } else if (isFuture || !act) {
      d.className = 'hist-cal-day no-activity';
      if (isFuture) d.style.opacity = '.3';
    } else {
      d.className = 'hist-cal-day active-day';
      if (act.streak) d.classList.add('has-streak');
      // Intensity based on task count
      const opacity = Math.min(0.5 + (act.tasks / 10), 1);
      d.style.opacity = opacity;
    }

    if (!isFuture) {
      d.style.cursor = 'pointer';
      d.addEventListener('click', () => showHistoryDayDetail(dateKey, day, isToday, d));
    }

    grid.appendChild(d);
  }

  // Next month padding
  const total = firstDay + daysInMonth;
  const remain = total % 7 === 0 ? 0 : 7 - (total % 7);
  for (let i = 1; i <= remain; i++) {
    const d = document.createElement('div');
    d.className = 'hist-cal-day other-month';
    d.textContent = i;
    grid.appendChild(d);
  }
}

function shiftHistoryMonth(dir) {
  historyMonth += dir;
  if (historyMonth > 11) { historyMonth = 0; historyYear++; }
  if (historyMonth < 0)  { historyMonth = 11; historyYear--; }
  buildHistoryCalendar();
  document.getElementById('history-day-detail').style.display = 'none';
}

function showHistoryDayDetail(dateKey, day, isToday, calCell) {
  // Highlight selected day
  document.querySelectorAll('.hist-cal-day').forEach(c => c.classList.remove('selected-day'));
  calCell.classList.add('selected-day');

  const monthNames = ['January','February','March','April','May','June','July','August','September','October','November','December'];
  const dayNames   = ['Sunday','Monday','Tuesday','Wednesday','Thursday','Friday','Saturday'];
  const dateObj    = new Date(historyYear, historyMonth, day);
  const fullDate   = dayNames[dateObj.getDay()] + ', ' + day + ' ' + monthNames[historyMonth];

  document.getElementById('history-detail-title').textContent = fullDate;
  const body = document.getElementById('history-detail-body');
  body.innerHTML = '';

  const act = isToday ? null : calendarActivity[dateKey];

  if (isToday) {
    // Live today data
    const doneTasks_live = tasks.filter(t => t.done);
    const moodEl = document.querySelector('.mood-btn.active');
    const moodTxt = moodEl ? moodEl.textContent.trim() : null;

    if (moodTxt) {
      body.innerHTML += makeHistDetailItem('reflect','🌸',`Mood: ${moodTxt}`, 'Today\'s reflection', '');
    }
    if (doneTasks_live.length === 0 && !moodTxt) {
      body.innerHTML = '<div style="font-size:13px;color:var(--text3);padding:12px 0">No activity logged yet today.</div>';
    } else {
      doneTasks_live.forEach(t => {
        body.innerHTML += makeHistDetailItem('task','✓', t.label, 'Task · ' + t.subject, '');
      });
    }
  } else if (!act) {
    body.innerHTML = '<div style="font-size:13px;color:var(--text3);padding:12px 0">No activity logged for this day.</div>';
  } else {
    // Mood summary pill
    if (act.mood) {
      body.innerHTML += `<div style="display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:6px;background:var(--pink);border:1px solid var(--pink2);border-radius:50px;padding:5px 14px;font-size:13px;font-weight:600;color:var(--pink3);margin-bottom:12px">${act.mood} Mood logged</div>`;
    }
    act.items.forEach(item => {
      body.innerHTML += makeHistDetailItem(item.type, item.type==='task'?'✓':item.type==='focus'?'⏱':item.type==='streak'?'🔥':'🌸', item.label, item.sub, item.time);
    });
  }

  document.getElementById('history-day-detail').style.display = 'block';
  document.getElementById('history-day-detail').scrollIntoView({behavior:'smooth', block:'nearest'});
}

function makeHistDetailItem(type, icon, label, sub, time) {
  return `<div class="hist-detail-item">
    <div class="hist-detail-icon ${type}">${icon}</div>
    <div style="flex:1"><div style="font-size:13px;font-weight:600;color:var(--text)">${label}</div><div style="font-size:11px;color:var(--text3);margin-top:2px">${sub}</div></div>
    ${time ? `<div style="font-size:11px;color:var(--text3);flex-shrink:0">${time}</div>` : ''}
  </div>`;
}

function switchProfileTab(tab, btn) {
  document.querySelectorAll('.profile-tab').forEach(t => t.classList.remove('active'));
  btn.classList.add('active');
  document.getElementById('profile-settings-panel').style.display  = tab === 'settings'  ? '' : 'none';
  document.getElementById('profile-customise-panel').style.display = tab === 'customise' ? '' : 'none';
  document.getElementById('profile-history-panel').style.display   = tab === 'history'   ? '' : 'none';
  if (tab === 'history') buildHistoryCalendar();
}

function buildWeekBars() {
  const bars   = document.getElementById('week-bars');
  const labels = document.getElementById('week-labels');
  if (bars.children.length > 0) return; // already built
  const data = [
    {day:'Mon', tasks:4}, {day:'Tue', tasks:6}, {day:'Wed', tasks:3},
    {day:'Thu', tasks:5}, {day:'Fri', tasks:0}, {day:'Sat', tasks:0}, {day:'Sun', tasks:0}
  ];
  const max = Math.max(...data.map(d => d.tasks), 1);
  data.forEach(d => {
    const wrap = document.createElement('div'); wrap.className = 'week-bar-wrap';
    const bar  = document.createElement('div'); bar.className  = 'week-bar';
    bar.style.height = Math.round((d.tasks / max) * 56) + 'px';
    bar.title = d.tasks + ' tasks';
    if (d.day === 'Thu') bar.style.background = 'var(--pink3)'; // today
    const lbl = document.createElement('div'); lbl.className = 'week-bar-lbl'; lbl.textContent = d.day;
    wrap.appendChild(bar); wrap.appendChild(lbl);
    bars.appendChild(wrap);
    const spacer = document.createElement('div');
    spacer.style.flex = '1'; spacer.style.textAlign = 'center';
    labels.appendChild(spacer);
  });
}

function switchIslandTab(tab, btn) {
  document.querySelectorAll('.inv-tab').forEach(t => t.classList.remove('active'));
  btn.classList.add('active');
  document.getElementById('island-shop-panel').style.display = tab === 'shop' ? '' : 'none';
  document.getElementById('island-inventory-panel').style.display = tab === 'inventory' ? '' : 'none';
}

function buyReward(card, cost, currency) {
  const currencyMap = {stars:'stars', shells:'shells', berries:'berries'};
  const el = document.getElementById(currencyMap[currency]);
  const cur = parseInt(el.textContent);
  if (cur >= cost) {
    el.textContent = cur - cost;
    card.classList.add('unlocked');
    card.querySelector('.reward-cost').textContent = '✅ Owned';
    card.querySelector('.reward-cost').style.color = 'var(--amber3)';
    card.onclick = null;
    spawnStar(card);
    const icon = card.querySelector('.reward-icon').textContent;
    const name = card.querySelector('.reward-name').textContent;
    addToInventory(icon, name);
  } else {
    card.style.borderColor = '#E24B4A';
    setTimeout(() => card.style.borderColor = '', 800);
  }
}

// ── Profile emoji picker ───────────────────────────────────────
function pickEmoji(btn, emoji) {
  document.querySelectorAll('.emoji-opt').forEach(b => b.classList.remove('active'));
  btn.classList.add('active');
  const av = document.getElementById('avatar-circle');
  av.textContent = emoji;
  av.style.fontSize = '32px';
}

// ── Colour themes ──────────────────────────────────────────────
const themes = {
  pink: {
    '--pink':'#F9C8D8','--pink2':'#F4A0BC','--pink3':'#D4537E',
    '--bg':'#FFF5F9','--surface':'#FFFFFF','--surface2':'#FEF0F5','--border':'#F0D8E8',
    '--text':'#3A2A35','--text2':'#7A5A6A','--text3':'#B090A0',
  },
  purple: {
    '--pink':'#E8E2FB','--pink2':'#C4B8F0','--pink3':'#7F77DD',
    '--bg':'#F7F5FF','--surface':'#FFFFFF','--surface2':'#F0EEFF','--border':'#DDD8F8',
    '--text':'#2A2440','--text2':'#5A5080','--text3':'#9A90C0',
  },
  blue: {
    '--pink':'#C5DFF8','--pink2':'#8BBEE8','--pink3':'#378ADD',
    '--bg':'#F3F8FF','--surface':'#FFFFFF','--surface2':'#EAF3FD','--border':'#C8DEFA',
    '--text':'#1A2A40','--text2':'#3A5A80','--text3':'#7A9EC0',
  },
  green: {
    '--pink':'#D4EDDA','--pink2':'#A8D5B5','--pink3':'#3B8B5C',
    '--bg':'#F3FAF5','--surface':'#FFFFFF','--surface2':'#E8F5EC','--border':'#C0E0CA',
    '--text':'#1A3025','--text2':'#3A6048','--text3':'#7AAA88',
  },
  peach: {
    '--pink':'#FAD7CC','--pink2':'#F2A897','--pink3':'#E07A5F',
    '--bg':'#FFF7F5','--surface':'#FFFFFF','--surface2':'#FEF0EC','--border':'#F5D5CC',
    '--text':'#3A1A10','--text2':'#7A4A40','--text3':'#C09088',
  },
  night: {
    '--pink':'#3D3B6E','--pink2':'#5A58A0','--pink3':'#9895E0',
    '--bg':'#1A1828','--surface':'#242240','--surface2':'#2D2B55','--border':'#3D3B6E',
    '--text':'#E8E6FF','--text2':'#A8A5D8','--text3':'#6865A8',
  },
};

function applyTheme(card) {
  const key  = card.dataset.theme;
  const vars = themes[key];
  if (!vars) return;
  Object.entries(vars).forEach(([k,v]) => document.documentElement.style.setProperty(k, v));
  document.querySelectorAll('.theme-card').forEach(c => c.classList.remove('active'));
  card.classList.add('active');
  currentTheme = key;
  saveAll();
}

function changeBearColor(swatch) {
  const color = swatch.dataset.color;
  document.querySelectorAll('.swatch').forEach(s => s.classList.remove('active'));
  swatch.classList.add('active');
  const ids = ['bear-body','bear-head','bear-ear-l','bear-ear-r','bear-leg-l','bear-leg-r','bear-arm-l','bear-arm-r'];
  ids.forEach(id => { const el = document.getElementById(id); if(el) el.setAttribute('fill', color); });
  document.getElementById('avatar-circle').style.background = color;
}
function filterShop(cat, btn) {
  document.querySelectorAll('.cat-filter-btn').forEach(b => b.classList.remove('active'));
  btn.classList.add('active');
  document.querySelectorAll('[data-shop-cat]').forEach(sec => {
    sec.style.display = (cat === 'all' || sec.dataset.shopCat === cat) ? '' : 'none';
  });
}

function buyReward(card, cost, currency) {
  const currencyMap = {stars:'stars', shells:'shells', berries:'berries'};
  const el = document.getElementById(currencyMap[currency]);
  const cur = parseInt(el.textContent);
  if (cur >= cost) {
    el.textContent = cur - cost;
    card.classList.add('unlocked');
    card.querySelector('.reward-cost').textContent = '✅ Owned';
    card.querySelector('.reward-cost').style.color = 'var(--amber3)';
    card.onclick = null;
    spawnStar(card);
    const icon = card.dataset.icon;
    const name = card.dataset.item;
    const cat  = card.dataset.cat;
    addToInventory(icon, name, cat);
    saveAll();
  } else {
    card.style.borderColor = '#E24B4A';
    setTimeout(() => card.style.borderColor = '', 800);
  }
}

function addToInventory(icon, name, cat) {
  const gridId = 'inv-' + cat;
  const grid = document.getElementById(gridId);
  if (!grid) return;
  const empty = grid.querySelector('.inv-empty');
  if (empty) empty.remove();
  const card = document.createElement('div');
  card.className = 'inv-card';
  card.dataset.cat = cat;
  card.dataset.item = name;
  card.innerHTML = '<div class="inv-badge">new!</div><div class="inv-icon">' + icon + '</div><div class="inv-name">' + name + '</div><button class="inv-equip-btn">Equip</button>';
  card.onclick = function(e) { if (e.target.tagName !== 'BUTTON') toggleEquip(this); };
  card.querySelector('.inv-equip-btn').onclick = function(e) { e.stopPropagation(); toggleEquip(card); };
  grid.appendChild(card);
  setTimeout(() => { const b = card.querySelector('.inv-badge'); if(b) b.textContent = 'owned'; }, 3000);
}

function toggleEquip(card) {
  const cat = card.dataset.cat;
  const isEquipped = card.classList.contains('equipped');
  if (!isEquipped) {
    // Unequip any other item in the same category first
    document.querySelectorAll('.inv-card[data-cat="' + cat + '"].equipped').forEach(c => {
      c.classList.remove('equipped');
      c.querySelector('.inv-equip-btn').textContent = 'Equip';
    });
    card.classList.add('equipped');
    card.querySelector('.inv-equip-btn').textContent = 'Unequip';
  } else {
    card.classList.remove('equipped');
    card.querySelector('.inv-equip-btn').textContent = 'Equip';
  }
  updateEquippedBar();
  updateBearAccessories();
  saveAll();
}

function updateEquippedBar() {
  const bar = document.getElementById('equipped-bar');
  const noneLabel = document.getElementById('equipped-none');
  const equipped = document.querySelectorAll('.inv-card.equipped');
  bar.querySelectorAll('.equipped-chip').forEach(c => c.remove());
  if (equipped.length === 0) {
    noneLabel.style.display = '';
  } else {
    noneLabel.style.display = 'none';
    equipped.forEach(card => {
      const icon = card.querySelector('.inv-icon').textContent;
      const name = card.querySelector('.inv-name').textContent;
      const cat  = card.dataset.cat;
      const catLabels = {hats:'🎩',accessories:'💎',companions:'🐾',decorations:'🏡'};
      const chip = document.createElement('span');
      chip.className = 'equipped-chip';
      chip.title = cat;
      chip.textContent = icon + ' ' + name;
      bar.appendChild(chip);
    });
  }
}

function updateBearAccessories() {
  const bearSvg = document.getElementById('main-bear');
  if (!bearSvg) return;
  bearSvg.querySelectorAll('[id^="bear-acc-"]').forEach(el => el.remove());

  const equipped = {};
  document.querySelectorAll('.inv-card.equipped').forEach(c => {
    equipped[c.dataset.cat] = c.dataset.item;
  });

  const ns = 'http://www.w3.org/2000/svg';

  // Hats layer
  if (equipped.hats) {
    const g = document.createElementNS(ns,'g'); g.setAttribute('id','bear-acc-hats');
    const h = equipped.hats;
    if (h === 'Pink Bow')         g.innerHTML = '<ellipse cx="50" cy="12" rx="12" ry="7" fill="#F4A0BC" transform="rotate(-20 50 12)"/><ellipse cx="50" cy="12" rx="12" ry="7" fill="#D4537E" opacity=".5" transform="rotate(20 50 12)"/><circle cx="50" cy="12" r="5" fill="#F9C8D8"/>';
    else if (h === 'Flower Crown') g.innerHTML = '<text x="24" y="14" font-size="22">🌸</text>';
    else if (h === 'Witch Hat')    g.innerHTML = '<polygon points="50,2 40,20 60,20" fill="#4A2E6B"/><rect x="36" y="20" width="28" height="5" rx="2.5" fill="#6B3FA0"/>';
    else if (h === 'Mushroom Cap') g.innerHTML = '<ellipse cx="50" cy="16" rx="20" ry="10" fill="#D4537E"/><ellipse cx="50" cy="18" rx="13" ry="6" fill="#FEEFD4"/>';
    bearSvg.appendChild(g);
  }

  // Accessories layer
  if (equipped.accessories) {
    const g = document.createElementNS(ns,'g'); g.setAttribute('id','bear-acc-accessories');
    const a = equipped.accessories;
    if (a === 'Star Wand')          g.innerHTML = '<text x="74" y="52" font-size="16">⭐</text><rect x="80" y="52" width="3" height="20" rx="1" fill="#FAC775"/>';
    else if (a === 'Heart Glasses') g.innerHTML = '<rect x="32" y="26" width="13" height="10" rx="5" fill="none" stroke="#D4537E" stroke-width="2"/><rect x="55" y="26" width="13" height="10" rx="5" fill="none" stroke="#D4537E" stroke-width="2"/><line x1="45" y1="31" x2="55" y2="31" stroke="#D4537E" stroke-width="2"/>';
    else if (a === 'Rainbow Scarf') g.innerHTML = '<ellipse cx="50" cy="73" rx="16" ry="5" fill="#F9C8D8"/><rect x="44" y="74" width="8" height="12" rx="3" fill="#C5DFF8"/>';
    bearSvg.appendChild(g);
  }

  // Companions layer
  if (equipped.companions) {
    const g = document.createElementNS(ns,'g'); g.setAttribute('id','bear-acc-companions');
    const c = equipped.companions;
    if (c === 'Island Cat')     g.innerHTML = '<text x="76" y="85" font-size="18">🐱</text>';
    else if (c === 'Baby Duck')    g.innerHTML = '<text x="76" y="85" font-size="18">🐥</text>';
    else if (c === 'Bunny Friend') g.innerHTML = '<text x="76" y="85" font-size="18">🐰</text>';
    bearSvg.appendChild(g);
  }

  // Decorations layer (shown as background badge)
  if (equipped.decorations) {
    const g = document.createElementNS(ns,'g'); g.setAttribute('id','bear-acc-decorations');
    const d = equipped.decorations;
    if (d === 'Cozy Cottage')      g.innerHTML = '<text x="2" y="72" font-size="13">🏡</text>';
    else if (d === 'Sunflower Patch') g.innerHTML = '<text x="2" y="72" font-size="13">🌻</text>';
    else if (d === 'Festive Tent')    g.innerHTML = '<text x="2" y="72" font-size="13">🎪</text>';
    bearSvg.appendChild(g);
  }
}
</script>
<!-- DAY TASKS DRAWER -->
<div class="day-drawer-overlay" id="day-drawer-overlay" onclick="closeDayDrawer()"></div>
<div class="day-drawer" id="day-drawer">
  <div class="day-drawer-handle"></div>
  <div class="day-drawer-header">
    <div>
      <div class="day-drawer-title" id="drawer-title">Monday</div>
      <div class="day-drawer-sub" id="drawer-sub">Completed tasks</div>
    </div>
    <div class="day-drawer-close" onclick="closeDayDrawer()">×</div>
  </div>
  <div class="day-drawer-body" id="drawer-body"></div>
</div>

<!-- NOTE EDITOR MODAL -->
<div class="edit-modal-overlay" id="note-modal-overlay" onclick="if(event.target===this)saveAndCloseNote()">
  <div class="note-modal">
    <div class="note-modal-top">
      <input class="note-title-input" id="note-title-input" placeholder="Note title..." maxlength="60"/>
      <select class="note-subject-select" id="note-subject-select">
        <option>Biology</option><option>Math</option><option>English</option>
        <option>Chemistry</option><option>History</option><option>Art</option><option>Other</option>
      </select>
      <button onclick="saveAndCloseNote()" style="padding:7px 16px;border-radius:50px;border:none;background:var(--pink3);color:#fff;font-family:'Nunito',sans-serif;font-size:13px;font-weight:700;cursor:pointer;flex-shrink:0">Save ✓</button>
    </div>
    <div class="note-body">
      <textarea class="note-textarea" id="note-textarea" placeholder="Start writing your study notes here...&#10;&#10;Tip: Use • for bullet points, or write freely — whatever works for you 🌸"></textarea>
    </div>
    <div class="note-toolbar">
      <button class="note-tool-btn" onclick="insertSnippet('• ')">• Bullet</button>
      <button class="note-tool-btn" onclick="insertSnippet('→ ')">→ Arrow</button>
      <button class="note-tool-btn" onclick="insertSnippet('⭐ ')">⭐ Star</button>
      <button class="note-tool-btn" onclick="insertSnippet('❗ ')">❗ Important</button>
      <button class="note-tool-btn" onclick="insertSnippet('? ')">? Question</button>
      <span style="margin-left:auto;font-size:11px;color:var(--text3)" id="note-char-count">0 chars</span>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- AMBIENT SOUNDS DRAWER -->
<div class="ambient-drawer-overlay" id="ambient-overlay" onclick="closeAmbientDrawer()"></div>
<div class="ambient-drawer" id="ambient-drawer">
  <div class="ambient-drawer-handle"></div>
  <div class="ambient-drawer-header">
    <div class="ambient-drawer-title">🎵 Ambient Sounds</div>
    <div class="ambient-close" onclick="closeAmbientDrawer()">×</div>
  </div>
  <div class="ambient-body">
    <div class="sound-grid">
      <div class="sound-card" data-sound="rain" onclick="selectSound(this)">
        <div class="s-icon">🌧️</div>
        <div class="s-name">Rain</div>
        <div class="s-desc">Soft rainfall</div>
      </div>
      <div class="sound-card" data-sound="cafe" onclick="selectSound(this)">
        <div class="s-icon">☕</div>
        <div class="s-name">Café</div>
        <div class="s-desc">Coffee shop hum</div>
      </div>
      <div class="sound-card" data-sound="forest" onclick="selectSound(this)">
        <div class="s-icon">🌿</div>
        <div class="s-name">Forest</div>
        <div class="s-desc">Birds & leaves</div>
      </div>
      <div class="sound-card" data-sound="waves" onclick="selectSound(this)">
        <div class="s-icon">🌊</div>
        <div class="s-name">Ocean</div>
        <div class="s-desc">Gentle waves</div>
      </div>
      <div class="sound-card" data-sound="lofi" onclick="selectSound(this)">
        <div class="s-icon">🎹</div>
        <div class="s-name">Lo-fi</div>
        <div class="s-desc">Chill beats</div>
      </div>
      <div class="sound-card" data-sound="fire" onclick="selectSound(this)">
        <div class="s-icon">🔥</div>
        <div class="s-name">Fireplace</div>
        <div class="s-desc">Crackling fire</div>
      </div>
      <div class="sound-card" data-sound="wind" onclick="selectSound(this)">
        <div class="s-icon">💨</div>
        <div class="s-name">Wind</div>
        <div class="s-desc">Gentle breeze</div>
      </div>
      <div class="sound-card" data-sound="white" onclick="selectSound(this)">
        <div class="s-icon">⬜</div>
        <div class="s-name">White Noise</div>
        <div class="s-desc">Pure focus</div>
      </div>
      <div class="sound-card" data-sound="space" onclick="selectSound(this)">
        <div class="s-icon">🌙</div>
        <div class="s-name">Night</div>
        <div class="s-desc">Crickets & calm</div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="vol-row">
      <span class="vol-label">🔊 Volume</span>
      <input type="range" class="vol-slider" id="ambient-vol" min="0" max="100" value="60" oninput="setAmbientVolume(this.value)"/>
      <span class="vol-val" id="ambient-vol-val">60%</span>
    </div>

    <div id="now-playing-label" style="font-size:12px;color:var(--text3);text-align:center;margin-bottom:10px;min-height:18px"></div>
    <button class="stop-btn" id="ambient-stop-btn" onclick="stopAmbient()" style="display:none">⏹ Stop sounds</button>
  </div>
</div>

<script>
// ── Study notes ────────────────────────────────────────────────
const subjectTagStyles = {
  Biology:   {bg:'var(--pink)',   color:'var(--pink3)'},
  Math:      {bg:'var(--blue)',   color:'var(--blue3)'},
  English:   {bg:'var(--purple)', color:'var(--purple3)'},
  Chemistry: {bg:'var(--amber)',  color:'var(--amber3)'},
  History:   {bg:'var(--blue)',   color:'var(--blue3)'},
  Art:       {bg:'var(--purple)', color:'var(--purple3)'},
  Other:     {bg:'var(--surface2)', color:'var(--text2)'},
};

let notes = [
  { id:1, title:'Cell Structure — Key Terms', subject:'Biology',
    body:'• Mitochondria → powerhouse of the cell\n• Nucleus → controls cell activity\n• Ribosome → protein synthesis\n• Cell membrane → controls what enters/exits',
    date:'22 May' },
  { id:2, title:'Quadratic Formula Notes', subject:'Math',
    body:'x = (-b ± √(b²-4ac)) / 2a\n\n→ Use when factoring is too hard\n→ Discriminant b²-4ac tells you number of solutions\n   > 0 = two solutions\n   = 0 = one solution\n   < 0 = no real solutions',
    date:'21 May' },
];
let nextNoteId = 3;
let editingNoteId = null;
let activeNoteFilter = 'all';

function renderNotes() {
  const list = document.getElementById('notes-list');
  if (!list) return;
  list.innerHTML = '';
  const filtered = activeNoteFilter === 'all' ? notes : notes.filter(n => n.subject === activeNoteFilter);
  if (filtered.length === 0) {
    list.innerHTML = '<div class="notes-empty"><span>📝</span>No notes yet' + (activeNoteFilter !== 'all' ? ' for ' + activeNoteFilter : '') + ' — tap <strong>+ New note</strong> to start!</div>';
    return;
  }
  filtered.forEach(note => {
    const style = subjectTagStyles[note.subject] || subjectTagStyles['Other'];
    const card = document.createElement('div');
    card.className = 'note-card';
    card.dataset.id = note.id;
    card.innerHTML =
      '<button class="note-card-del" onclick="deleteNote(event,' + note.id + ')">🗑</button>' +
      '<div class="note-card-header">' +
        '<span class="note-card-subject" style="background:' + style.bg + ';color:' + style.color + '">' + note.subject + '</span>' +
        '<span class="note-card-date">' + note.date + '</span>' +
      '</div>' +
      '<div class="note-card-title">' + note.title + '</div>' +
      '<div class="note-card-preview">' + note.body.replace(/\n/g,' ') + '</div>';
    card.onclick = () => openNote(note.id);
    list.appendChild(card);
  });
}

function filterNotes(subject, btn) {
  document.querySelectorAll('.notes-filter').forEach(b => b.classList.remove('active'));
  btn.classList.add('active');
  activeNoteFilter = subject;
  renderNotes();
}

function openNewNote() {
  editingNoteId = null;
  document.getElementById('note-title-input').value = '';
  document.getElementById('note-textarea').value = '';
  document.getElementById('note-subject-select').value = 'Biology';
  document.getElementById('note-char-count').textContent = '0 chars';
  document.getElementById('note-modal-overlay').classList.add('open');
  setTimeout(() => document.getElementById('note-title-input').focus(), 100);
}

function openNote(id) {
  const note = notes.find(n => n.id === id);
  if (!note) return;
  editingNoteId = id;
  document.getElementById('note-title-input').value = note.title;
  document.getElementById('note-textarea').value = note.body;
  document.getElementById('note-subject-select').value = note.subject;
  updateNoteCharCount();
  document.getElementById('note-modal-overlay').classList.add('open');
  setTimeout(() => document.getElementById('note-textarea').focus(), 100);
}

function saveAndCloseNote() {
  const title   = document.getElementById('note-title-input').value.trim();
  const body    = document.getElementById('note-textarea').value.trim();
  const subject = document.getElementById('note-subject-select').value;
  if (!title && !body) { document.getElementById('note-modal-overlay').classList.remove('open'); return; }
  const now = new Date();
  const dateStr = now.toLocaleDateString('en-AU', { day:'numeric', month:'short' });
  if (editingNoteId) {
    const note = notes.find(n => n.id === editingNoteId);
    if (note) { note.title = title || 'Untitled note'; note.body = body; note.subject = subject; note.date = dateStr; }
  } else {
    notes.unshift({ id: nextNoteId++, title: title || 'Untitled note', body, subject, date: dateStr });
  }
  document.getElementById('note-modal-overlay').classList.remove('open');
  renderNotes();
  saveAll();
}

function deleteNote(e, id) {
  e.stopPropagation();
  notes = notes.filter(n => n.id !== id);
  renderNotes();
  saveAll();
}

function insertSnippet(text) {
  const ta = document.getElementById('note-textarea');
  const start = ta.selectionStart;
  const before = ta.value.substring(0, start);
  const after  = ta.value.substring(ta.selectionEnd);
  // Add newline before bullet if not at start of line
  const prefix = (before.length > 0 && !before.endsWith('\n')) ? '\n' : '';
  ta.value = before + prefix + text + after;
  const pos = start + prefix.length + text.length;
  ta.setSelectionRange(pos, pos);
  ta.focus();
  updateNoteCharCount();
}

function updateNoteCharCount() {
  const len = document.getElementById('note-textarea').value.length;
  document.getElementById('note-char-count').textContent = len + ' char' + (len !== 1 ? 's' : '');
}

// Wire up textarea char count
document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', () => {
  const ta = document.getElementById('note-textarea');
  if (ta) ta.addEventListener('input', updateNoteCharCount);
  renderNotes();
});
let audioCtx = null;
let ambientNodes = [];
let ambientGain = null;
let currentSoundKey = null;
let ambientVolume = 0.6;

function getAudioCtx() {
  if (!audioCtx) audioCtx = new (window.AudioContext || window.webkitAudioContext)();
  return audioCtx;
}

function makeGain(ctx, val) {
  const g = ctx.createGain();
  g.gain.value = val;
  g.connect(ctx.destination);
  return g;
}

function makeNoise(ctx, gain, type = 'white') {
  const bufLen = ctx.sampleRate * 4;
  const buf    = ctx.createBuffer(1, bufLen, ctx.sampleRate);
  const data   = buf.getChannelData(0);
  let b0=0,b1=0,b2=0,b3=0,b4=0,b5=0,b6=0;
  for (let i = 0; i < bufLen; i++) {
    const white = Math.random() * 2 - 1;
    if (type === 'pink') {
      b0 = 0.99886*b0 + white*0.0555179; b1 = 0.99332*b1 + white*0.0750759;
      b2 = 0.96900*b2 + white*0.1538520; b3 = 0.86650*b3 + white*0.3104856;
      b4 = 0.55000*b4 + white*0.5329522; b5 = -0.7616*b5 - white*0.0168980;
      data[i] = (b0+b1+b2+b3+b4+b5+b6+white*0.5362) * 0.11;
      b6 = white * 0.115926;
    } else { data[i] = white; }
  }
  const src = ctx.createBufferSource();
  src.buffer = buf; src.loop = true;
  src.connect(gain); src.start();
  return src;
}

function makeOsc(ctx, gain, freq, type='sine', vol=0.05) {
  const g = ctx.createGain(); g.gain.value = vol; g.connect(gain);
  const o = ctx.createOscillator(); o.type = type; o.frequency.value = freq;
  o.connect(g); o.start(); return [o,g];
}

function makeFilter(ctx, gain, type, freq, q=1) {
  const f = ctx.createBiquadFilter(); f.type=type; f.frequency.value=freq; f.Q.value=q;
  f.connect(gain); return f;
}

const soundBuilders = {
  rain(ctx, g) {
    const f = makeFilter(ctx, g, 'bandpass', 1200, 0.8);
    const n = makeNoise(ctx, f, 'pink'); return [n];
  },
  cafe(ctx, g) {
    // Low rumble + mid noise
    const f1 = makeFilter(ctx, g, 'lowpass', 400, 0.5);
    const f2 = makeFilter(ctx, g, 'bandpass', 900, 1.2);
    const n1 = makeNoise(ctx, f1, 'pink');
    const n2 = makeNoise(ctx, f2, 'white'); return [n1, n2];
  },
  forest(ctx, g) {
    const f = makeFilter(ctx, g, 'highpass', 600, 1);
    const n = makeNoise(ctx, f, 'pink');
    const [o1] = makeOsc(ctx, g, 880, 'sine', 0.01);
    const [o2] = makeOsc(ctx, g, 1320, 'sine', 0.008); return [n, o1, o2];
  },
  waves(ctx, g) {
    const f = makeFilter(ctx, g, 'lowpass', 600, 0.7);
    const n = makeNoise(ctx, f, 'pink');
    // Slow LFO for wave rhythm
    const lfo = ctx.createOscillator(); lfo.frequency.value = 0.15; lfo.start();
    const lfoG = ctx.createGain(); lfoG.gain.value = 0.3; lfo.connect(lfoG); lfoG.connect(f.gain||f.frequency);
    return [n, lfo];
  },
  lofi(ctx, g) {
    const notes = [261.6, 329.6, 392, 523.3];
    const oscs = notes.map(f => { const [o] = makeOsc(ctx, g, f, 'triangle', 0.018); return o; });
    const [o2] = makeOsc(ctx, g, 110, 'sine', 0.025); return [...oscs, o2];
  },
  fire(ctx, g) {
    const f1 = makeFilter(ctx, g, 'lowpass', 250, 0.5);
    const f2 = makeFilter(ctx, g, 'bandpass', 700, 2);
    const n1 = makeNoise(ctx, f1, 'pink');
    const n2 = makeNoise(ctx, f2, 'pink'); return [n1, n2];
  },
  wind(ctx, g) {
    const f = makeFilter(ctx, g, 'bandpass', 500, 0.4);
    const n = makeNoise(ctx, f, 'pink');
    const lfo = ctx.createOscillator(); lfo.frequency.value = 0.07; lfo.start();
    const lg  = ctx.createGain(); lg.gain.value = 0.4; lfo.connect(lg);
    return [n, lfo];
  },
  white(ctx, g) {
    const n = makeNoise(ctx, g, 'white'); return [n];
  },
  space(ctx, g) {
    const f = makeFilter(ctx, g, 'highpass', 3000, 1.5);
    const n = makeNoise(ctx, f, 'pink');
    const [o1] = makeOsc(ctx, g, 220, 'sine', 0.008);
    const [o2] = makeOsc(ctx, g, 440, 'sine', 0.005); return [n, o1, o2];
  },
};

function stopAmbient() {
  ambientNodes.forEach(n => { try { n.stop ? n.stop() : n.disconnect(); } catch(e){} });
  ambientNodes = [];
  if (ambientGain) { ambientGain.disconnect(); ambientGain = null; }
  currentSoundKey = null;
  document.querySelectorAll('.sound-card').forEach(c => c.classList.remove('active'));
  document.getElementById('ambient-stop-btn').style.display = 'none';
  document.getElementById('now-playing-label').textContent = '';
  updateAmbientHomeBtn(false);
}

function selectSound(card) {
  const key = card.dataset.sound;
  stopAmbient();
  const ctx = getAudioCtx();
  if (ctx.state === 'suspended') ctx.resume();
  ambientGain = makeGain(ctx, ambientVolume);
  ambientNodes = soundBuilders[key] ? soundBuilders[key](ctx, ambientGain) : [];
  currentSoundKey = key;
  card.classList.add('active');
  const name = card.querySelector('.s-name').textContent;
  document.getElementById('now-playing-label').textContent = '▶ Playing: ' + name;
  document.getElementById('ambient-stop-btn').style.display = 'block';
  updateAmbientHomeBtn(true, name);
}

function setAmbientVolume(val) {
  ambientVolume = val / 100;
  document.getElementById('ambient-vol-val').textContent = val + '%';
  // Update slider gradient
  const slider = document.getElementById('ambient-vol');
  slider.style.background = 'linear-gradient(to right, var(--pink3) ' + val + '%, var(--border) ' + val + '%)';
  if (ambientGain) ambientGain.gain.setTargetAtTime(ambientVolume, getAudioCtx().currentTime, 0.05);
}

function updateAmbientHomeBtn(playing, name) {
  const lbl = document.getElementById('ambient-btn-label');
  const sub  = document.getElementById('ambient-btn-sub');
  const ind  = document.getElementById('ambient-playing-indicator');
  const btn  = document.getElementById('ambient-home-btn');
  if (playing) {
    lbl.textContent = 'Ambient Sounds';
    sub.textContent = '▶ Now playing: ' + name;
    sub.style.color = 'var(--pink3)';
    ind.style.display = 'flex';
    btn.style.borderColor = 'var(--pink2)';
    btn.style.background  = 'var(--pink)';
  } else {
    lbl.textContent = 'Ambient Sounds';
    sub.textContent = 'Tap to choose a sound';
    sub.style.color = '';
    ind.style.display = 'none';
    btn.style.borderColor = '';
    btn.style.background  = '';
  }
}

function openAmbientDrawer() {
  document.getElementById('ambient-overlay').classList.add('open');
  document.getElementById('ambient-drawer').classList.add('open');
  setAmbientVolume(document.getElementById('ambient-vol').value);
}

function closeAmbientDrawer() {
  document.getElementById('ambient-overlay').classList.remove('open');
  document.getElementById('ambient-drawer').classList.remove('open');
}
</script>

<!-- LOGOUT CONFIRMATION MODAL -->
<div class="edit-modal-overlay" id="logout-modal-overlay" onclick="if(event.target===this)closeLogoutModal()">
  <div class="edit-modal" style="width:340px;text-align:center">
    <div style="font-size:40px;margin-bottom:12px">🚪</div>
    <div class="edit-modal-title" style="text-align:center">Log out of CareCloud?</div>
    <div class="edit-modal-sub" style="text-align:center;margin-bottom:24px">You'll be taken back to the sign-in page. Your data will be saved 🌸</div>
    <div style="display:flex;gap:10px">
      <button onclick="closeLogoutModal()" style="flex:1;padding:11px;border-radius:var(--radius-sm);border:1.5px solid var(--border);background:transparent;font-family:'Nunito',sans-serif;font-size:14px;font-weight:700;color:var(--text2);cursor:pointer">Cancel</button>
      <button onclick="logOut()" style="flex:1;padding:11px;border-radius:var(--radius-sm);border:none;background:#E24B4A;color:#fff;font-family:'Nunito',sans-serif;font-size:14px;font-weight:700;cursor:pointer">Log out</button>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- CUSTOM TIMER MODAL -->
<div class="edit-modal-overlay" id="custom-timer-overlay" onclick="if(event.target===this)closeCustomTimer()">
  <div class="edit-modal" style="width:380px">
    <button class="edit-modal-close" onclick="closeCustomTimer()">×</button>
    <div class="edit-modal-title">⚙️ Custom Timer</div>
    <div class="edit-modal-sub">Design your own study session 🌸</div>

    <div class="custom-row">
      <label>Focus time</label>
      <input class="custom-num" id="custom-focus" type="number" min="1" max="120" value="25"/>
      <span class="custom-unit">min</span>
    </div>

    <div class="custom-row" style="align-items:flex-start">
      <label style="padding-top:6px">Break time</label>
      <div>
        <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;margin-bottom:6px">
          <input class="custom-num" id="custom-break" type="number" min="0" max="60" value="5"/>
          <span class="custom-unit">min <span style="font-size:11px">(0 = no break)</span></span>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="custom-row" style="align-items:flex-start">
      <label style="padding-top:8px">Sessions</label>
      <div class="custom-sessions-row" id="session-pills">
        <button class="session-pill" onclick="selectSessions(this,1)">1</button>
        <button class="session-pill" onclick="selectSessions(this,2)">2</button>
        <button class="session-pill active" onclick="selectSessions(this,4)">4</button>
        <button class="session-pill" onclick="selectSessions(this,6)">6</button>
        <button class="session-pill" onclick="selectSessions(this,8)">8</button>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div id="custom-preview" style="background:var(--surface2);border-radius:var(--radius-sm);border:1px solid var(--border);padding:12px 14px;margin-bottom:16px;font-size:13px;color:var(--text2);line-height:1.6"></div>

    <div style="display:flex;gap:8px">
      <button class="btn-pink" style="flex:1" onclick="startCustomTimer()">▶ Start</button>
      <button onclick="closeCustomTimer()" style="padding:10px 18px;border-radius:50px;border:1.5px solid var(--border);background:transparent;font-family:'Nunito',sans-serif;font-size:14px;font-weight:700;color:var(--text2);cursor:pointer">Cancel</button>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

</body>
<div class="edit-modal-overlay" id="email-modal-overlay" onclick="if(event.target===this)closeEmailModal()">
  <div class="edit-modal">
    <button class="edit-modal-close" onclick="closeEmailModal()">×</button>
    <div class="edit-modal-title">Change Email Address</div>
    <div class="edit-modal-sub">We'll send a confirmation to your new email 📧</div>
    <label class="edit-form-label">Current email</label>
    <input class="edit-form-input" id="email-current" type="email" placeholder="your@email.com"/>
    <label class="edit-form-label">New email</label>
    <input class="edit-form-input" id="email-new" type="email" placeholder="new@email.com"/>
    <label class="edit-form-label">Confirm new email</label>
    <input class="edit-form-input" id="email-confirm" type="email" placeholder="new@email.com"/>
    <div class="pin-error" id="email-error"></div>
    <div style="display:flex;gap:8px">
      <button class="btn-pink" style="flex:1" onclick="saveEmail()">Save email</button>
      <button onclick="closeEmailModal()" style="padding:10px 18px;border-radius:50px;border:1.5px solid var(--border);background:transparent;font-family:'Nunito',sans-serif;font-size:14px;font-weight:700;color:var(--text2);cursor:pointer">Cancel</button>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- PASSCODE MODAL -->
<div class="edit-modal-overlay" id="passcode-modal-overlay" onclick="if(event.target===this)closePasscodeModal()">
  <div class="edit-modal">
    <button class="edit-modal-close" onclick="closePasscodeModal()">×</button>
    <div class="edit-modal-title" id="passcode-modal-title">Change Passcode</div>
    <div class="edit-modal-sub" id="passcode-modal-sub">Enter a new 4-digit PIN for your account 🔑</div>
    <div class="pin-hint" id="pin-hint">Enter new PIN</div>
    <div class="pin-row" id="pin-row-new">
      <input class="pin-box" id="pin1" type="password" maxlength="1" inputmode="numeric" pattern="[0-9]" oninput="pinMove(this,'pin2')"/>
      <input class="pin-box" id="pin2" type="password" maxlength="1" inputmode="numeric" pattern="[0-9]" oninput="pinMove(this,'pin3')" onkeydown="pinBack(event,'pin1')"/>
      <input class="pin-box" id="pin3" type="password" maxlength="1" inputmode="numeric" pattern="[0-9]" oninput="pinMove(this,'pin4')" onkeydown="pinBack(event,'pin2')"/>
      <input class="pin-box" id="pin4" type="password" maxlength="1" inputmode="numeric" pattern="[0-9]" oninput="pinMove(this,null)" onkeydown="pinBack(event,'pin3')"/>
    </div>
    <div class="pin-hint" id="pin-confirm-hint" style="display:none">Confirm new PIN</div>
    <div class="pin-row" id="pin-row-confirm" style="display:none">
      <input class="pin-box" id="pin5" type="password" maxlength="1" inputmode="numeric" pattern="[0-9]" oninput="pinMove(this,'pin6')"/>
      <input class="pin-box" id="pin6" type="password" maxlength="1" inputmode="numeric" pattern="[0-9]" oninput="pinMove(this,'pin7')" onkeydown="pinBack(event,'pin5')"/>
      <input class="pin-box" id="pin7" type="password" maxlength="1" inputmode="numeric" pattern="[0-9]" oninput="pinMove(this,'pin8')" onkeydown="pinBack(event,'pin6')"/>
      <input class="pin-box" id="pin8" type="password" maxlength="1" inputmode="numeric" pattern="[0-9]" oninput="confirmPinDone()" onkeydown="pinBack(event,'pin7')"/>
    </div>
    <div class="pin-error" id="pin-error"></div>
    <div style="display:flex;gap:8px">
      <button class="btn-pink" style="flex:1" id="pin-save-btn" onclick="savePasscode()">Set passcode</button>
      <button onclick="closePasscodeModal()" style="padding:10px 18px;border-radius:50px;border:1.5px solid var(--border);background:transparent;font-family:'Nunito',sans-serif;font-size:14px;font-weight:700;color:var(--text2);cursor:pointer">Cancel</button>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

</body>
<div class="edit-modal-overlay" id="edit-modal-overlay" onclick="if(event.target===this)closeEditModal()">
  <div class="edit-modal">
    <button class="edit-modal-close" onclick="closeEditModal()">×</button>
    <div class="edit-modal-title">Edit Profile</div>
    <div class="edit-modal-sub">Update your name, year, and goals 🌸</div>

    <label class="edit-form-label">Your name</label>
    <input class="edit-form-input" id="edit-name" type="text" placeholder="e.g. Mia Tanaka"/>

    <label class="edit-form-label">School year</label>
    <select class="edit-form-input" id="edit-year" style="cursor:pointer">
      <option>Year 7</option><option>Year 8</option><option>Year 9</option>
      <option selected>Year 10</option><option>Year 11</option><option>Year 12</option>
      <option>University</option><option>Other</option>
    </select>

    <label class="edit-form-label">My goals</label>
    <div class="goal-input-row">
      <input type="text" id="edit-goal-input" placeholder="Add a goal and press +" onkeydown="if(event.key==='Enter')addGoalChip()"/>
      <button onclick="addGoalChip()">+</button>
    </div>
    <div class="goals-edit-list" id="goals-edit-list"></div>

    <div style="display:flex;gap:8px;margin-top:4px">
      <button class="btn-pink" style="flex:1" onclick="saveProfile()">Save changes</button>
      <button onclick="closeEditModal()" style="padding:10px 18px;border-radius:50px;border:1.5px solid var(--border);background:transparent;font-family:'Nunito',sans-serif;font-size:14px;font-weight:700;color:var(--text2);cursor:pointer">Cancel</button>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

</body>
<div class="reflect-modal-overlay" id="reflect-modal-overlay" onclick="if(event.target===this)closeReflectModal()">
  <div class="reflect-modal">
    <button class="reflect-modal-close" onclick="closeReflectModal()">×</button>
    <div class="reflect-modal-header">
      <div class="reflect-modal-mood" id="rm-mood">🌸</div>
      <div class="reflect-modal-meta">
        <div class="reflect-modal-title" id="rm-title">Reflection</div>
        <div class="reflect-modal-date" id="rm-date"></div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="reflect-section">
      <div class="reflect-section-label">✨ What went well today?</div>
      <div id="rm-q1" class="reflect-section-text reflect-section-empty">Nothing written</div>
    </div>
    <div class="reflect-section">
      <div class="reflect-section-label">💭 What challenged you?</div>
      <div id="rm-q2" class="reflect-section-text reflect-section-empty">Nothing written</div>
    </div>
    <div class="reflect-section">
      <div class="reflect-section-label">🌸 What made you happy today?</div>
      <div id="rm-q3" class="reflect-section-text reflect-section-empty">Nothing written</div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

</body>
</html>
